name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: a couple more donors from Cresco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Organizing everywhere and taking no vote for granted isn't just a talking point — it's the centerpiece of our strategy to win this seat.
#
It’s Sunday evening, so we’ll keep this quick, Derek.
Each month, our team calculates *exactly* how much money we must raise in order to aggressively scale up our field organizing, host campaign events across the Commonwealth, keep the lights on at our new campaign office in Pittsburgh, and much more.
**After running the numbers just now, we figured out that if even a couple more folks from Cresco are able to donate, we'll be on pace to hit our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow.**
**[Will you please make your first $5 contribution before tomorrow at midnight? Our campaign's plans to organize in all 67 Pennsylvania counties depends entirely on how much we're able to raise before this milestone.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44135?refcode=ema20220213-4577&t=1&akid=4577%2E434096%2E9fz5pj)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44135?refcode=em20220213-4577&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4577%2E434096%2E9fz5pj)**
**Organizing everywhere and taking no vote for granted isn't just a talking point — it's the centerpiece of our strategy to win this seat.**
Together, we can add John Fetterman as that crucial 51st Democratic vote in the Senate. But we can't expect to do it without you, Derek.
**[Please chip in your first $5 if you can. This campaign is powered in huge part by online donations, so on behalf of all of us on Team Fetterman, we'd be so incredibly grateful for your support.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44135?refcode=ema20220213-4577&t=21&akid=4577%2E434096%2E9fz5pj)**
Thank you, Derek!
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ
**[Contribute Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44135?refcode=em20220213-4577&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4577%2E434096%2E9fz5pj)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220213-4577-footer&t=23&refcode2=4577_434096_9fz5pj&akid=4577%2E434096%2E9fz5pj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4577%2E434096%2E9fz5pj)

body:
| [ ](http://links.rabineforgovernor.com/u/click?_t=78abe9dc86324f49b823fc51cf303a82&_m=ad1ab8d1dc0941889bb24eafed6e8d46&_e=pioruC8IScbUQp-VMljoaBpAMx5mhqBhj1XN2lUp9IZGlIdHsXm5xR6kW6Chq55iW57ccRS0_SgeJkwO1sNdD3ZrbHJQUDKProQI02O32WlDmTvCca7rch8v6UpaEJztF6xU8XP-2Bl-JfvmPEYtHbsPFNY8yRX_twn7sWAuDMhfPLyLb1tjQIuqPp1osiBOI8qox9rLgQssYdvLcsEJHFuwTdKz3SrpKFnWhLwXj7eGJ_GpJJC7cPRlLtmktX-bh9cTJhhbXqN8t7hbFdT14oNXDGj0_5T1dw5GqPaUNf6t27NpJbHHLqLnl1POISNrQ4ji8Et5q55XXFiOfuZABS3RHoIerttr5pBizlOxRJQqxOfUcOixDua49gOJ-EqSrFAaqI-iZ8_bSXRRUlUImTzicpjnU7H2m_D8Gwm0E8FIkzJ-dyY8e3V4AyQwq2gD0HkiTyTFSE6Q0qrpWYA_9H1jpEza-jhdxZEEfkARUh_zElQ-bOrTdfxkPkczhoNBkPlbB_bexZNZspz4SOLoQQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

The lawsuit I filed against Joe Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandate made it to the Supreme Court and won big.

My lawsuit protected 84 million workers across America who would have fallen under the OSHA mandate classification. I have said for months that this job-killing vaccine mandate is unconstitutional. **He wanted to force hardworking Americans to choose between their jobs or their freedom.** Our country was founded on the principles that each and every person has the right to free choice, and as your next Governor, I will never forget that fact.

| Dear Patriot, I am a proud American, but I stand with the Canadian truckers. Every human being has a God-given right to defend their rights and their freedoms, no matter who they are or where they live. It is nothing short of inspiring to watch. And it makes me that much more determined to end the tyrannical COVID restrictions in America that we have been living under for almost two whole years. If the truckers in Canada can fight back against unjust laws in their country, you and I can fight back here as well. I don't know about you, but I won't be satisfied until every last COVID restriction is repealed and consigned to the dustbin of history. Time and time again, when there has been a crisis, the government has taken advantage of the fear and panic to expand their own power and permanently restrict liberty. This is what happened after 9/11, when laws like the Patriot Act passed, giving the government enormous powers that, to this day, they still have not relinquished. I refuse to let the same thing happen with COVID. Every restriction must be repealed. Freedom must be fully restored. The Canadian truckers know this. They have won small victories, such as when the province of Alberta repealed their vaccine mandate. But they have kept their eye on the bigger prize -- the repeal of all COVID mandates, and the return of all freedoms that have been lost during this pandemic. As Americans, you and I must follow the same path. That's why the elections this November are so important: they will be a referendum on the COVID mandates the Democrats have put in place. If the Democrats are defeated, we will have a golden opportunity in front of us to restore normalcy. However, if the Democrats win, they will rush to put mandates on us the moment a new "variant" is discovered -- just like they have so many times before. That is what is at stake in this election. The Democrats are targeting many seats this November, but there are few people who they have attacked as aggressively as they have attacked me. They know they are losing their grip on power, and after I exposed their hero Fauci for his dishonesty, they are desperate to take their most hated enemy down with them. They have put millions of dollars behind the effort to smear and destroy me. If they succeed, it will send the message that no one is safe, and they can do the same to anybody. And by defeating me, they would ensure that I cannot fight back against them the next time they try to bring back COVID restrictions. [But together, you and I can stop all of this from happening. Will you step up and join me by contributing $100, $50, $25, or $10 today?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DfDxL_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi796ecIOvM6SE6diViw-2FqmXj0E2LhT7LEWL0SGekIbcbNtZAEAKVsRVvEhjXPWr9S8r51WxQIreTNyTscPoLdSzJTeQkAoz26-2FVlZZZi3XZU8rBnZC3wuaHNbDuuafHo8eRZFu-2Bc47iF-2FZjMi4Dcr31jvHj8UAF0M8LkkClnoqFPrdzkvXpGEIN8BqZDyS6xdX4dJ6IWJjhzsRhXmnJCf6MjCo3TtUdC-2B4PI6auOLJiL9QJuI4VrC8ZGOw222hBwb-2F2XB-2FMq0UJggdxMZUP6IUAbsRpFl8nqxR1-2BP2mE4x18rH9ExAiXJqcSwXxNhOqyWoRNy2IEdJTyETPxosOEcgrQ-3D-3D) Your generous contribution will go towards fighting back against Democrat lies and smears in this year's election. And furthermore, it will help me remain in the U.S. Senate, so that I can fight to remove every last tyrannical COVID restriction. After all, the U.S. government's response to COVID will be remembered as one of the most appalling power grabs in our nation's history. It must be completely erased. Every last vaccine passport, every last mask mandate, every last travel restriction -- all of it must go. I have already filed a bill to get rid of the vaccine mandate in Washington, D.C. But that's just the beginning. There is a lot more work to be done. Regaining our freedom will require conservatives like you and I to work together. And it will require me to fend off Democrat attacks and keep them from taking my Senate seat. [Will you stand with me and help work towards that goal by chipping in $100, $50, $25, or $10 today?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DH8gm_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi796ecIOvM6SE6diViw-2FqmXj0E2LhT7LEWL0SGekIbcbNtZAEAKVsRVvEhjXPWr9S8r51WxQIreTNyTscPoLdSzJTeQkAoz26-2FVlZZZi3XZU8rBnZC3wuaHNbDuuafHo8eRZFu-2Bc47iF-2FZjMi4Dcr31lBmxzRDo8qN1qAtBTz-2BknxG1x2-2Be5VpS307FkpuSWXlXP-2FLSDb73F4TgwzE9TUi1NwAlu1pVQjgcTQL33-2FjyUpO5FeLX9silH69OqR7cQApG0KJGtZUbMyIz6VGyAAcC7jB4CUeAjixSGJyPY0FvFvgs1wsL6ZUmWi2nf2K-2F9XxGb0lZDRrso7mhwBJYkVRBw-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul ****

name: Doug White
subject: Doug White's weekly newsletter
body:
Republicans are at war over the future of their party and the latest battleground for GOP infighting is right here in Washington’s 4th
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a1NxsISM7/c?w=oXebDp8kfmbr8ixKY-aG1lIKNuUkE4BuRnu1ezltWMc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2ExTnhzSVNNNz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Recent endorsementsreveal a fracturedWashington State GOP
---
|
---
| | Republicans are at war over the future of their party and the latest battleground for GOP infighting is right here in Washington’s 4th Congressional District. While a divided opposition is good news for Democrats, it underscores the urgency of my campaign for Congress. Since 2016, Republicans have become increasingly divided between the old-guard “establishment” members of the party and the new, more extremist Trump faction. A number of significant endorsements this week show Washington Republicans intend to support perhaps my most dangerous opponent, Loren Culp. The failed 2020 gubernatorial nominee earned Donald Trump’s endorsement this week. Culp is a vocal supporter of the former president and even reads from the same political playbook as Trump. Despite losing by over half-a-million votes, Culp refused to concede the 2020 race, just as Trump did.On the other side of the Republican tug-of-war is Dan Newhouse, seeking to represent Washington’s 4th District for a fifth term. While he maintains benefitting from generous corporate donors, Newhouse’s support from Republican voters has been drying up after he voted to impeach president Trump. Benton County Republicans endorsed neither, opting to back Rep. Brad Klippert instead. Local GOP leaders voting against the national party line is rare, speaking to the depth of the party’s ideological disunity. Finally, former NASCAR driver Jerrod Sessler earned the endorsement of former Trump advisor and famed Q-anon acolyte Michael Flynn. Sessler has likely curried favor with Flynn due to his wildly conspiratorial claims about the COVID vaccine and publicly calling for CDC Immunologist Dr. Anthony Fauci to be hanged.
---
| |
---
| | Let me be clear: there are no “reasonable Republican” candidates. They do not represent the traditionally conservative views of their constituents any longer. Witnessing this dangerous hodgepodge of conservative candidates vying to take control over C.D. 4 has reinforced the grave importance of electing me, Doug White, to Congress. Central Washington needs a grassroots movement and a Representative who voraciously fights for our community in the US House of Representatives. Our district does not need a Congressperson who gains power through sucking-up to corporate donors and disgraced former Presidents. While my Republican opponents are busy back-biting and attempting to out-radical one another, my campaign is focused on what matters to voters. While I remain committed to attending Town Halls, meeting voters and solving issues like the COVID-19 epidemic, the GOP candidates are laser-focused on appeasing political elites.Yesterday, for example, District 4’s current Representative Dan Newhouse was busy releasing a long-winded presser about the “dangers” posed to Washingtonians by Mexican immigrants and blaming them for drug overdose deaths. All this — mind you — is happening while more than 2,000 of our fellow Americans continue to die from COVID each week. Instead of using the power voters entrusted in Dan Newhouse to protect our communities, he uses his power to engage in political theater and further demonize the marginalized.
---
| |
---
| | Democrats like myself are the only smart path out of this mess. With your help, we can elect a Congressman who will make progress on the issues Central Washington cares about: the pandemic, economic security, climate change, trade policy, public safety. We must capitalize on the Republican party’s divisions. We cannot — however — underestimate the threat presented by any of my opponents were they to be elected. [My vision for Congress](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a1NxsISM7/c?w=kcZwAsvMHtOcmb7u4jlTvlOdRNSOYWDhFWmcxFL_wds.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3Zpc2lvbiIsInIiOiJhZTcxMjY3NS02MzNjLTRmN2MtZjA5My1jZTk2MTAyOTNjM2EiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIwNDk2ZmZlMC1jMGJhLTQ2MDYtOTk4Ni1jMjgwMzdlOGQxNTUifQ) eschews political stunts and conspiratorial rhetoric. Instead, I will devote my time to [protecting Central Washington from the effects of climate change](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a1NxsISM7/c?w=fPWhZxZCiSfobS6p2bW2FfIeEaIZmzZBHYJyPvTfLuE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3Bvc3QvYWxsLW9mLWNlbnRyYWwtd2FzaGluZ3Rvbi1jYW4tZm9sbG93LW1ldGhvdy12YWxsZXktcy1sZWFkIiwiciI6ImFlNzEyNjc1LTYzM2MtNGY3Yy1mMDkzLWNlOTYxMDI5M2MzYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9), [negotiating fair trade deals that benefit farmers and consumers,](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a1NxsISM7/c?w=kxyfxxnkIrsYHfgjlv4bxHWoKtUiX2EzHTZAxALp3xc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3Bvc3Qvd2UtbXVzdC1wcm90ZWN0LW91ci1mb3JlaWduLW1hcmtldHMiLCJyIjoiYWU3MTI2NzUtNjMzYy00ZjdjLWYwOTMtY2U5NjEwMjkzYzNhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0) and [reforming America's broken campaign finance laws](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a1NxsISM7/c?w=fTSMYld5if8SgbzJmkkDRs34042Z89XypoExhNZBLLU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3Bvc3QvaXMtY29uZ3Jlc3MtdGhlLWdvbGRlbi10aWNrZXQtdG8tcmljaGVzIiwiciI6ImFlNzEyNjc1LTYzM2MtNGY3Yy1mMDkzLWNlOTYxMDI5M2MzYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9), to name a few priorities. My Republican opponents lack a clear platform and rely instead on sloganeering or endorsements from political elites to hide their absence of a policy vision. clean_body: Republicans are at war over the future of their party and the latest battleground for GOP infighting is right here in Washington’s 4th | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Recent endorsementsreveal a fracturedWashington State GOP | | | Republicans are at war over the future of their party and the latest battleground for GOP infighting is right here in Washington’s 4th Congressional District. While a divided opposition is good news for Democrats, it underscores the urgency of my campaign for Congress. Since 2016, Republicans have become increasingly divided between the old-guard “establishment” members of the party and the new, more extremist Trump faction. A number of significant endorsements this week show Washington Republicans intend to support perhaps my most dangerous opponent, Loren Culp. The failed 2020 gubernatorial nominee earned Donald Trump’s endorsement this week. Culp is a vocal supporter of the former president and even reads from the same political playbook as Trump. Despite losing by over half-a-million votes, Culp refused to concede the 2020 race, just as Trump did.On the other side of the Republican tug-of-war is Dan Newhouse, seeking to represent Washington’s 4th District for a fifth term. While he maintains benefitting from generous corporate donors, Newhouse’s support from Republican voters has been drying up after he voted to impeach president Trump. Benton County Republicans endorsed neither, opting to back Rep. Brad Klippert instead. Local GOP leaders voting against the national party line is rare, speaking to the depth of the party’s ideological disunity. Finally, former NASCAR driver Jerrod Sessler earned the endorsement of former Trump advisor and famed Q-anon acolyte Michael Flynn. Sessler has likely curried favor with Flynn due to his wildly conspiratorial claims about the COVID vaccine and publicly calling for CDC Immunologist Dr. Anthony Fauci to be hanged. | | | | Let me be clear: there are no “reasonable Republican” candidates. They do not represent the traditionally conservative views of their constituents any longer. Witnessing this dangerous hodgepodge of conservative candidates vying to take control over C.D. 4 has reinforced the grave importance of electing me, Doug White, to Congress. Central Washington needs a grassroots movement and a Representative who voraciously fights for our community in the US House of Representatives. Our district does not need a Congressperson who gains power through sucking-up to corporate donors and disgraced former Presidents. While my Republican opponents are busy back-biting and attempting to out-radical one another, my campaign is focused on what matters to voters. While I remain committed to attending Town Halls, meeting voters and solving issues like the COVID-19 epidemic, the GOP candidates are laser-focused on appeasing political elites.Yesterday, for example, District 4’s current Representative Dan Newhouse was busy releasing a long-winded presser about the “dangers” posed to Washingtonians by Mexican immigrants and blaming them for drug overdose deaths. All this — mind you — is happening while more than 2,000 of our fellow Americans continue to die from COVID each week. Instead of using the power voters entrusted in Dan Newhouse to protect our communities, he uses his power to engage in political theater and further demonize the marginalized. | | | | Democrats like myself are the only smart path out of this mess. With your help, we can elect a Congressman who will make progress on the issues Central Washington cares about: the pandemic, economic security, climate change, trade policy, public safety. We must capitalize on the Republican party’s divisions. We cannot — however — underestimate the threat presented by any of my opponents were they to be elected. eschews political stunts and conspiratorial rhetoric. Instead, I will devote my time to , and , to name a few priorities. My Republican opponents lack a clear platform and rely instead on sloganeering or endorsements from political elites to hide their absence of a policy vision. With your help, we can leave GOP infighting and inaction in the past and put a Democrat in Congress who will focus on the kitchen-table issues that matter to the 4th District. name: Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3hskm--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I’m humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
* Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.
* A record 29 Democrats have retired so far.
* This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I’ve ever seen.

I want to introduce you to 8 of the best:

Esther Joy King (IL-17)
Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hskm-1y42w-4qqlpo2/)
---

* 5 seats to take back the house
* 29 Dem retirements
* 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition.

**The numbers are good.**

But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine.

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hskm-1y42x-4qqlpo3/)
---

As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour:

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hskm-1y42y-4qqlpo4/)
---

Thank you,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hskm-1y42z-4qqlpo5/)
---
Leader Kevin McCarthy

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hskm-1y430-4qqlpo2/ "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action")
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hskm-1y431-4qqlpo3/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

I want to introduce you to 8 of the best: Esther Joy King (IL-17) Amanda Adkins (KS-03) Bruce Poliquin (ME-02) Ryan Zinke (MT-01) Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07) Monica De La Cruz (TX-15) Wesley Hunt (TX-38) Derrick Van Orden (WI-03) | | 5 seats to take back the house 29 Dem retirements 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition. The numbers are good. But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine. | | As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour: | | Thank you, | Leader Kevin McCarthy A note from Kevin: | "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action" As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>" The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started. name: Firearm Man
subject: Your FEMA burial site
body:
If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. Remember you can unsubscribe

[http://https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/one_click_unsubscribe/336/56327/955e45f292e71595f2825f8d60b73215b4b21f1c]

here at any time.

[https://www.firearmman.com/]

February 14th, 2022

[https://www.firearmman.com/]

This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

They’ve been exposed.

As of February 14th, 2022, over 13 government agencies have full access to your entire credit card purchase history.

Here’s why this is very bad for you,

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know 3 simple steps to become invisible to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the new and FREE book “Avoiding the Eye” by Richard Marshall.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

But your Free copy of this shocking book doesn’t just help you protect your purchase records...

Inside, you’ll also discover:

Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... and how to shut it up.

How common appliances spy on you

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

- and how to blindfold them for good.

Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

The CIA openly admitted before Congress all of this is happening.

And that’s why the author of “Avoiding the Eye”, Richard Marshall, wants you to have his new book for Free

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

!

Marshall is one of the top survivalists in the nation and claims to have extensive government connections – wants to keep Americans informed and protected.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

And while Richard's nice... he ain’t rich. Which means supplies are limited to just 200 copies - and a ton have already been claimed.

To keep the government’s nose out of your business click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

Thank You.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by newsletter@firearmman.com

Manage Subscriptions

https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/unsubscribe/336/56327/955e45f292e71595f2825f8d60b73215b4b21f1c

name: Rand Paul
subject: dirty secret about masks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense? We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0v9vvjf2aq28v4ii6g7r5g8ql7qoh381m98sl0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr5cmobepbkcph69cdh6di39ob6c4q70slme2o7ed33ejgn4crmear32c9ieurjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applmhjr4c366hhb6oj7m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z13gtl30cu05dufb0doobc7q557mhr4t8fsqupf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs) | |
---
Friend, aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense?

We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wear masks on federal property. Children must wear masks in the classroom. With no scientific support for it.

That’s what I had a chance to discuss with Fox News recently.
__
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0r5orira76gf99oao4dh3sl8hvkdf4opjb4f5q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9hdiq33lgi99ra5c65q1b8210vfs3vdavbem2ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs)
Here's the dirty little secret about masks... It's got nothing to do with public heath.

**It’s ALL about submission.****_It's always been more about collectivism. It's been about growing government power over your lives._**

That's never been more clear than now, as these lawless bureaucrats continue with their mask requirements and shaming of the unmasked - despite the fact that the science has been clearly anti-mask for a long time.

**But it's time to draw the line.**

We can't continue to submit forever. We can't let our children be punished for personal health decisions. I'm taking a stand already and I've introduced legislation that will get rid of the federal mandate for masks on planes.

Enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo5mvsqdcal02b700vu7u6ul755rcpua36uccvr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $75**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zntv883epuarvn9jgr8u61651i8tnf5tc0kul9qg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zksp563rfpe2pmcafbo0nd4abb0kv2dv9hmm66ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7sblh2m8gka257il26qo641v0e550odoorgrpoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs)
For too long we’ve heard that this madness is TEMPORARY._We’re told to give up our freedom. Just wear the mask. Just be quiet. It’s only 2 weeks._

Well, it’s been 2 years. And they’ll never give up this game unless WE make them.

**We must stand strong on the side of science, reject needless masks, reject government overreach, and defend our freedom.**

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5qdhhr9ou6c76g66ogbcj3u3nrrg1fs87r2l1bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm0o36c5h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m embarrassed to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcc28pqseeusrq1ai35iu1mmlp4qa2gf5a3mm640_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0ttjclp32p9lc6q6eo3lm5ieaojlmoobcctgckqe4o37clj6as9i62q6at71eurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddkcup32phmc2pm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm2o71chge4p724no)
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0684p3stv7cit77flgv7hb1mogdo6qhl6lfn2ag_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm8o72cjh2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in January made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in January, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my January fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start February off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.
| | [RUSH $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkrijrfuqgbmlkgapvjo8mtmn6vbr1c077i5n8t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm8o72cjh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zar18g640c039k39b4p6bt6uqsnqsbkf1kha1ia8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm8o72cjh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7bggvj91mauvig6rdonupq2skl1i6v9c4gufjb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm8o72cjh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zds552loo1mm2022mt54rkpe8vcl23bju10upmoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm8o72cjh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh2s14m2atvfp2jnpg3v0j6fd1gkk6nac5bo8uo0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm8o72cjh2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za7ufje9i37re85c1t3vsaou84mfj46ur208po60_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3gm8o72cjh2bs)
Senator John Kennedy

| February 11, 2022 Contact: Charity Barry [Charity@charitybarryforcongress.com](mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.com)
---
| Joe Biden's Latest Outrageous Proposal
---
| The Biden Administration, in an effort to combat the drug epidemic we face across the country, has proposed the funneling of $30 million in public funds through "The Harm Reduction Program" that will facilitate the continued use of drugs in our communities.
The use of American tax-payer dollars to provide drug users the means to continue their self-destructive habit is not only a betrayal of the public trust; it is an illegal violation of the 1994 Violent Crime Control and Law Enforcement Act, a bill authored by then-Senator Biden himself.
My campaign wholly condemns the Biden Administration for their lack of leadership in tackling the very real issue of drug use in our country while simultaneously refusing to act on the very real threat posed at our southern border where unprecedented levels of illicit drugs flood in unchecked. Furthermore, my campaign condemns the Biden Administration for its use of public monies that exacerbates rampant drug use across the country, thereby decreasing safety and security in our neighborhoods.
This program will in fact increase, not reduce, harm in our communities and in our nation as a whole.
---
| | |
---

name: Ashley Ward
subject: Weekly Update: Rural Communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Weekly Updates

https://youtu.be/TO5X5MWhJMI [https://youtu.be/TO5X5MWhJMI]

I have lived and worked in rural communities throughout the Carolinas and nationwide. I've never met a more innovative group of people, working to improve their communities with very few resources. Too often, we forget that a safe and equitable future means that we bring everyone along. We often talk about climate change or economic crises as "all hands on deck" moments. But the truth is, not all hands are on deck. In order to make real, substantive change, we must have everyone at the table.

My work frequently involves bringing people together to address the issues that challenge their communities. Building coalitions is not only part of my job, but it is one of the most rewarding things I do. Whether I'm working on climate adaptation in the Carolinas or water issues in the western United States, there is one thing we all have in common: we want to be heard. I make it my job to listen. And then we can find a way to move forward together. I hope to be able to bring these skillsets to Congress, and also to build these same coalitions in our district. We need to continue to talk with each other, work with each other, and learn from each other.

SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-litdrop]VOLUNTEER KICKOFF!
Alternate text [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/All%20Hands%20on%20Deck%21.jpg]

VOLUNTEER KICKOFF
Join us if you can! We are hosting a volunteer kickoff! Food, fellowship and fun!
Help with yard signs, post cards, phone banking, and more!
RSVP by February 15th [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com]

IN THE COMMUNITY
Section Header
Virtual Meet and Greets
Do you have friends or neighbors who would like to meet Ashley? Consider hosting a virtual meet and greet! These are low-key events where you gather a few of your friends to meet and talk with a Congressional candidate.
Virtual meet and greets are a great way to talk with Ashley about the issues that most concern you and your community.
Learn More [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com]
Alternate text [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/compare-fibre-fRGoTJFQAHM-unsplash.jpg]Alternate text [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Canvass1.jpg]Canvassing
Each weekend we head out into the community to spread the word about the campaign. To be safe, we hanging literature on doors, a no-contact way to canvass.
We have lots of folks to reach, which means we need lots of volunteers. I hope you will consider joining us for a couple of hours on a Saturday or Sunday.
Sign up to volunteer! [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-litdrop]
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Yard%20Sign%20%287%29.png]

YARD SIGNS ARE HERE!
Yard signs are an effective way to get word out about my campaign. We need as many folks as possible to show their support and put a yard sign in their yard!

REQUEST A YARD SIGN [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/yard-sign]

Dear friends,
I'm ready to use my scientific background, my community perspective, and my professional policy experience to solve problems. To get there, I need your help. I hope you will consider donating to my campaign. In a grassroots campaign like mine, every donation counts!

SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]Section Header
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States

subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs05UyaH-N

While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who
slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story-especially
the tragedies that
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os05UyaH-N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

While
many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew
the giant, they likely don't know his full story-especially the
tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to
repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about
fathers and sons.

King
David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of
life's most important questions, including: What are my
responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I
lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way
to lead others?

Taught by
Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, "The David
Story: Shepherd, Father, King" examines the Old Testament books
of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores
David's character and the consequences of his choices on his
family and the people of Israel.

This is
why we've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd,
Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve
your copy using this secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd

By
viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God,
family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn
more about what truly matters in life.

I hope
you'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with
your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or
homeschool curriculum.

Let's
learn what truly matters in life by studying "The David Story."

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

P.S. If
you'd like to secure a DVD box set of "The David Story" while
they're available, you can have one shipped directly to your home
for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching
millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve
your DVD box set using the secure link below:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Peter - it’s time for Democrats to invest in rural America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
| |
---
Peter -- You’re receiving this email because we suspect you care about making sure Democrats win across the country, including rural America. So do we. That's why United Rural Democrats exists. Republicans take full advantage of rural Americans for their votes but don’t deliver on anything like access to broadband, affordable health care, and good-paying jobs. It’s time to reshape the narrative: Democrats have the back of rural Americans and we’re going to bat to reach voters. We’ve already made major strides so far. From reaching roughly 200,000 voters this year in Louisiana, Virginia, South Dakota, and Oklahoma to traveling 60,000 miles to 39 states, we’re talking to voters everywhere and listening to what they have to say. It's clear: voters in rural states feel like leaders in Washington have turned their back on them. Rural voters are feeling left out and disillusioned by the very representatives they elected in the first place. We can do better. And we will. United Rural Democrats believes that if we organize with people who understand these communities, we can take these places back. And if we win back rural America, we can’t lose. Do you agree? [**Take the pledge to support organizing and investing in every community across the country so Democrats can compete everywhere again.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41776158/330285418/106998941?ms=wse1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5ZmUwNzhkLWE2OGQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O0rI_N7CoprP7-xVxgjf4CK1foahY9_vaLIdnEN-kFE=&emci=7cef1c2a-1826-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=19fe078d-a68d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9364878) **[Sign on now →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41776160/330285421/106998941?ms=wse1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5ZmUwNzhkLWE2OGQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O0rI_N7CoprP7-xVxgjf4CK1foahY9_vaLIdnEN-kFE=&emci=7cef1c2a-1826-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=19fe078d-a68d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9364878)** Thanks for your support, Team United Rural Democrats

From reaching roughly 200,000 voters this year in Louisiana, Virginia, South Dakota, and Oklahoma to traveling 60,000 miles to 39 states, we’re talking to voters everywhere and listening to what they have to say. It's clear: voters in rural states feel like leaders in Washington have turned their back on them. Rural voters are feeling left out and disillusioned by the very representatives they elected in the first place. We can do better. And we will. United Rural Democrats believes that if we organize with people who understand these communities, we can take these places back. And if we win back rural America, we can’t lose. Do you agree? Thanks for your support, Team United Rural Democrats | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . United Rural Democrats 111 Lynn Ave Ames, IA 50014 United States

name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: Candidate for Congress Vernon Jones signs U.S. Term Limits Pledge; Pledges to Serve Just Three Terms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vernon Jones for Congress JonesforGeorgia
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE February 14, 2022
PRESS CONTACT: [VERNONJONESPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM](mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
PRESS RELEASE: Candidate for Congress Vernon Jones signs U.S. Term Limits Pledge; Pledges to Serve Just Three Terms
---
Statement by U.S. Congressional Candidate & former State Rep.Vernon Jones (R)
---
| |
---
---
|
---
| Athens (02/14/2022): Today, former State Representative and Trump-endorsed candidate for Georgia's 10th Congressional District Vernon Jones announced his support for Congressional TERM LIMITS by signing the U.S. Term Limits Pledge and by personally pledging himself to serve just three terms.
"In recent years, Congress has become less of what our founding fathers intended and more so of a retirement home. Conservatism and courage has been replaced by cronyism and corruption. It's no wonder a majority of Americans support congressional term limits", Jones remarked.
"I'm not going to Washington to wine and dine, then die. I'm going to Washington to serve, fight the Left, become Nancy Pelosi's worst nightmare, then come back home. To God's country, far and away from the Swamp.", Jones continued.
"I encourage my opponents to make the same pledge, and let the good people of the 10th know where they stand", Jones added.

---
| |
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Conservative Democrat, Jones officially switched parties after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and delivering a keynote address at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat the radical left, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.

name: Rushern Baker
subject: Valentine’s Day
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Today is supposed to be a day about love. And I have to say, the amount of love and support this campaign has received both humbles and invigorates me. It shows that we are standing for something, and that people are noticing. It shows what we can accomplish when we all work TOGETHER.
Nancy and I are in this because of love. Both for the great state of Maryland, and more importantly the great PEOPLE of Maryland. We know you, we love you, and we are going to fight for you.
Tomorrow is our mid-February fundraising deadline. We’d love to hit our goal before midnight, but we need another 238 contributions. Can you donate today and help us get there? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,

Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

**Happy Valentine’s Day... _and Happy Early Voting Day!_**

We put our hearts and souls into voter outreach this weekend, doing everything we could to reach key voters before many of them cast their ballots TODAY. _And now we wait..._

But while several Texans are already making their final voting decisions this morning, there are still so many undecided voters and untapped opportunities across this district that we cannot leave behind.

Since we put a ton of resources into this past weekend’s efforts of turning out early voters, it’s crucial that we replenish funds ASAP if we’re going to keep the momentum strong up until the primary on March 1st — **_which is now only about TWO weeks away._**

**Our FINAL mid-month benchmark deadline is TOMORROW, but we’re short $6,492. We put our hearts and souls into voter outreach this weekend, doing everything we could to reach key voters before many of them cast their ballots TODAY. And now we wait... But while several Texans are already making their final voting decisions this morning, there are still so many undecided voters and untapped opportunities across this district that we cannot leave behind. Since we put a ton of resources into this past weekend’s efforts of turning out early voters, it’s crucial that we replenish funds ASAP if we’re going to keep the momentum strong up until the primary on March 1st — which is now only about TWO weeks away. **EXTENDED DEADLINE: Renew your 2022 Membership!
DEADLINE: FEBRUARY 7th, 2022**
---

---
We’re counting on YOU. I just checked our most updated records, and I hate to tell you that your 2022 Membership has been marked as **LAPSED**.

**[We couldn't bear to see you go, so we have extended the deadline to February 7th.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hu03-1y5oq-4qqlpo3/ "We couldn't bear to see you go, so we have extended the deadline to February 7th. ")** If you haven’t stepped up to renew your Membership, I’ll be forced to assume you’re not serious about saving America from Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

---
Renewing your 2022 Membership is the best way to support House Republicans and their efforts to take back control of our country from the Left. Unless we have you on board, we’re POWERLESS to Pelosi’s House Democrats and their dark money war chest.

**[Please, renew your 2022 Membership NOW to help us fight back against the Radical Democrats in the House!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hu03-1y5ot-4qqlpo6/ "Please, renew your 2022 Membership NOW to help us fight back against the Radical Democrats in the House!")**

As a 2022 Member, you’ll play the most important part in our mission to bring real America First conservative values back to Congress. **[Can I count on you to step up before midnight tonight?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hu03-1y5ou-4qqlpo7/ "Can I count on you to step up before midnight tonight?")**

Thank you for your support. We can’t win this fight without you.

Regards,

Mike Pompeo
70th United States Secretary of State

| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hu03-1y5ov-4qqlpo8/ "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hu03-1y5ow-4qqlpo9/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hu03-1y5ox-4qqlpo0/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Dear Friend,
**Roses are red, violets are blue, the midterms are coming, are your friends as ready as you?**
**A pledge is a promise you make to vote on Election Day, and it’s a commitment we take pretty seriously here at NextGen!** We know that we’re more likely to stick to a plan when we make a public promise to complete it.
We also know that peer-to-peer, person-to-person conversations are our best strategy to mobilize our communities to the polls and make generational change in our government. **That’s where you come in.**
[**Spread the word: Ask your friends, family, or even your crush to pledge to vote!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41780854/330305457/1049242753?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjg0OGMyNi1hZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=61H56Dd2ZPy6ZLXkCqwTPDss63z67e1U2cTrbWQ0J9A=&emci=051349b3-698b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cb848c26-af8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)

**Asking for a pledge is as easy as clicking a button** — and you can make that ask through email, Facebook, or Twitter. If you’re really feeling the love, share on all three!

clean_body: | | | On this special day, ask someone you care about if they’ll commit to vote in the midterm elections! | | | Dear Friend, Roses are red, violets are blue, the midterms are coming, are your friends as ready as you? A pledge is a promise you make to vote on Election Day, and it’s a commitment we take pretty seriously here at NextGen! We know that we’re more likely to stick to a plan when we make a public promise to complete it. We also know that peer-to-peer, person-to-person conversations are our best strategy to mobilize our communities to the polls and make generational change in our government. That’s where you come in. With the midterm elections fast approaching, we can’t think of a better way to build political power than bringing more members of our community into the fold of our democracy. Asking for a pledge is as easy as clicking a button — and you can make that ask through email, Facebook, or Twitter. If you’re really feeling the love, share on all three! So today, tell that cutie they’ve got a civic duty and ask if they’ll commit to vote! "CTA Button" With love, NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: My Opponent Harassed his Coworkers
body:
True Story: Donald Trump tried | |
---
| | |
---
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kb_feb_email_el
| Friends, True story: Donald Trump tried to nominate my opponent to a cabinet position in 2018. But Ronny couldn’t even get past a Republican Senate. Why? Well,[ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=2f1b47729d&e=4712f71bea)[CNN reported](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=f96d44b7bc&e=4712f71bea)[ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=e2744a81f9&e=4712f71bea)that **Ronny got drunk in the middle of the night and started pounding on a female colleague’s hotel room door** while on duty.
After that incident, the Pentagon’s Inspector General investigated Ronny, and [found](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=bd78f83d8d&e=4712f71bea): [**_[Jackson] made sexual and denigrating comments about a female subordinate, violated the policy for drinking alcohol while on a presidential trip and took prescription-strength sleeping medication that prompted concerns from his colleagues about his ability to provide proper care._**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=49887c5627&e=4712f71bea) Ronny Jackson wasn’t fit for the Cabinet, and he’s not fit for Congress.
I can and will beat him, but I cannot do it alone. _**[Will you chip in to help our campaign kick Harasser Ronny out of Congress?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=860587ba24&e=4712f71bea)**_

All my thanks,
Kathleen Brown
Democrat for TX-13
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene & Mary Miller
subject: Impeach. Convict. Remove.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marry Miller for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

IMPEACH. CONVICT. REMOVE.

I need you to sign your petition to help us
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN.
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN - SIGN YOUR PETITION
Last year, Mary and I were part of the
historic number of newly-elected pro-Trump conservative women who
took Washington, D.C. by storm.

Since her first day in office, she has served
as a faithful defender of the America First policies of secure
borders, low taxes, less regulations, and fair trade.

In fact, Mary has become one of my closest
allies in Congress - standing shoulder to shoulder with me by
co-sponsoring three articles of impeachment against Joe Biden.

You see, Mary Miller isn't a career
politician.

She is a farmer, a Christian, and a devoted
wife to her husband, Chris. She's also a mom of seven
homeschooled children and a grandmother of seventeen!

Unlike the D.C. elites, Mary understands the
value of hard work and the dignity that comes from earning an
honest living.

That's why she decided to step out of her
comfort zone and run for office.

Mary saw firsthand just how much President
Trump's America First policies boosted the economy.

Low taxes, less regulation, rising wages, and
energy independence brought real and positive change to her
Illinois community.

But President Trump's success also exposed
just how many other "status quo" politicians had failed
hardworking families like Mary's for too long...

Mary knew something had to change. She knew
conservatives like you deserved real America First representation
in Washington.

Today, it is such a blessing to have Mary
fighting beside me in Congress.
That's why I'm teaming up with Mary Miller to
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN - SIGN YOUR PETITION
You see, it's because of conservatives like
her that we have a real shot at stopping the left's socialist
takeover and saving our country.

But Mary's commitment to defending the
traditional American values of family, faith, and freedom has
made her the #1 target of the corrupt Democrat machine.

And they've already enlisted their elite
billionaire donors to spend millions of dollars to unseat her in
2022.

So, as we prepare for one of the most
important midterm elections in our history, we must make sure we
defend real America First conservatives like Mary.

That's why I'm asking you to do TWO things
today:

First, please read Mary's email below, which
lays out what's at stake if we don't take back our government
from Joe Biden and the corrupt, leftwing extremists who control
him.

And second, please consider making a generous
$35 grassroots donation to Mary Miller for Congress.

I can say, without hesitation, that it will
be money well spent. Mary Miller is the kind of real America
First conservative who will never stop fighting for us.

Today, I hope you will join me in fighting
for her.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene

Member of Congress (GA-14)

P.S. We need to keep America First patriots
like Mary Miller in Congress.

That's why I'm asking the most dedicated and
committed conservatives I know to please consider supporting Mary
with a generous $35 donation today.

Thank you!

Peter,

Joe Biden must be IMPEACH. CONVICTED.
REMOVED.

I had no choice but to rush you this email
without further delay.

I'm Congresswoman Mary Miller.

Last year, I was elected to Congress as a
true America First Conservative ready to take on the Swamp, defy
the establishment's rules, and be a thorn in the side of the fake
news media.

And well, let's just say our fight to put
America First hasn't made us very popular with the D.C. Ruling
Elite...

That's because, since day one, we've been
exposing Joe Biden's socialist plot to weaken our country through
illegal immigration, out-of-control inflation, and immoral and
unconstitutional mandates.

But now his incompetence and corruption
aren't just hurting us here at home...

Biden's botched Afghanistan withdrawal left
13 American service members dead, thousands of Americans stranded
behind enemy lines and billions of dollars of weapons and
military equipment in the hands of terrorists.

Peter, Joe Biden's failed leadership is a
threat to our national security, and his authoritarian mandates
are a threat to the American way of life.
That's why I'm teaming up with MTG to IMPEACH
JOE BIDEN - SIGN YOUR PETITION

That's also why I hope I can count on you to
join our team by signing your petition to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN and
give an urgent $15 pledge of support today.

But before you decide to join me, let me tell
you a little more about who I am - and who I'm not.

I'm the mother of seven children and the
grandmother of seventeen.

Together with my husband, Chris, we operate
the Oakland, IL grain and cattle farm that has been in our family
for over 40 years.

I'm also a former homeschool mother, a
Christian, and a Sunday School teacher.

What I'm not is a lawyer. Or a lobbyist. Or a
member of the establishment.

In short, I'm one of you. And I have no
interest in becoming one of them.

That's why I have a huge target on my back.

I know I don't need to tell you what's at
stake.

As one of our country's strongest
conservatives, you already knew Joe Biden would be a disaster for
our country...

You knew he was a corrupt career politician
who spent the last 50 years in Washington selling out America to
the highest bidder.

Now Biden is more concerned with appeasing
the most radical members of his base than actually defending our
country and protecting its citizens.
That's why Joe Biden must be removed from
office. SIGN YOUR PETITION TO IMPEACH BIDEN

But since filing these articles of
impeachment, the left has been after me like never before.

They know their majority hangs by a thread -
so now they're fundraising against me, attacking my record, and
shadow-banning me on social media.

I refuse to be intimidated.

And I hope you won't be either.

Because we MUST speak up now.

And we MUST hold the corrupt ruling class
accountable for the fraud and failure of the Joe Biden
Presidency.

But I can't do this on my own.

You see, even though recent polls show that a
majority of Americans believe Joe Biden is unfit for office,
there are still some conservatives who haven't signed on to our
articles of impeachment.

And the truth is, if I'm going to rally the
rest of the Republican Party to join this effort, I'm going to
need an overwhelming show of support.

That's where your help will make all the
difference.

So will you help me remove the most corrupt,
incompetent President ever foisted upon the American people?

And will you help me fight back against the
Democrats who are determined to silence me?

If your answer is yes, please sign your
pledge of support to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN along with a $15 gift
today.

And if you can give a larger gift of $25,
$50, $100, or any amount up to the $2,900 maximum, it would send
a loud and clear message that Americans want Joe Biden IMPEACHED
NOW.

This is a pivotal moment in history.
Americans everywhere are realizing Joe Biden's Presidency is a
failure and a fraud.

But we cannot wait - we must act today to
build on this momentum.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Sincerely,

Mary Miller
Congresswoman (R-IL)

P.S. Americans everywhere realize Joe Biden
is a failure and a fraud.

That's why it's time for Republicans to FIGHT
FOR OUR COUNTRY and IMPEACH JOE BIDEN.

Will you help me?

Please sign your pledge your support to
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN today.

Thank you!

Paid for by Marry Miller for Congress.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 17, 2021.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isC3gYaHUN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osC3gYaHUN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

I’m proud to support my friend Charlie Gearing in his campaign for the Texas State House. And I’m hoping you’ll help me make sure we get him to Austin.
I am supporting Charlie because he’s the rare candidate who is running because he wants to do the job, not just hold the title. He has a servant’s heart and the intelligence and experience to be an effective representative on day one.

At a time when Roe v. Wade is under assault, Charlie’s commitment to reproductive rights is crucially needed. Electing strong leaders who will go to Austin and fight to repeal the most dangerous abortion restriction in the country, Senate Bill 8, and to protect the rights of nearly 7 million Texas women should be one of our top priorities.

Charlie is the fighter we need in Austin. Will you join me in supporting his campaign by chipping in $10 or more right now? Donate here >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Let’s help Charlie Gearing bring his Texas progressive values to Austin as your state representative. I hate to play favorites in a primary, but Charlie is special, and we need your help to finish the campaign strong and elect a Democrat who will never back down from Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick - and you know I know a little bit about standing up to those boys.

You have been at the heart of this campaign from day one, and I am so grateful for all you have done to help Charlie run a strong campaign. Please join me in helping him finish this race strong by chipping in $10 or more today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Much love,

Wendy Davis
Former State Senator

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Our ads worked in Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Thanks to your unwavering support, our radio ads in Virginia - targeting African American and Latino swing voters in Lynchburg,
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4rb88qk2eqnlo422lie9gkb9cktivihsp16r79o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3imeoj0s3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8c74scoj0tpim9pjddjmedjm1ptj6tjb4pj4chhmephlcqpr0sr4m3hn8opncurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddkc1p3ephkssqj8ptgmlin49fg)
I hope that you will help us win the battle for the Senate and the House in the 2022 midterm elections! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5klb6hbusert5ti18hlm9lmmnj9lq3up2irs3s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3imeoj0s3h2bs)
---
###### _A Message from..._
##### John Philip Sousa IV
###### National Chairman of Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
###### _Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee_
| Dear Fellow Conservative Patriot, Thanks to your unwavering support, our radio ads in Virginia - targeting African American and Latino swing voters in Lynchburg, Richmond, Hampton Roads, and Northern Virginia - were extremely successful. Just look at the results in this Fox News exit poll: | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zug0qovi9k7q0abgcblkefaaeekokoirbqtaj7l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3imeoj0s3h2bs)
---
Republican nominee Glenn Youngkin won the Latino vote! And he also received 13% or more of the Black vote, which is very good for a Republican candidate.
And this wasn’t the only exit poll that showed these results!
Our carefully-placed radio ads were highly effective and helped the Republican Party sweep the Virginia statewide offices in the 2021 elections. It wasn’t easy. After all, Joe Biden won Virginia by 10 percentage points a year earlier.
And that is something that you should be very proud of, Fellow Conservative Patriot. **Your generous support for Stars and Stripes Forever PAC has drastically changed the political landscape in the past few election cycles.** Our efforts to bring minority voters back to the party that shares their values and **TRULY** cares about their and their family's future was successful.
Something else you won't see the liberal media report is that our radio ads helped significantly in the 2020 Senate election wins in Alabama, Maine, and Iowa (and almost Michigan). We also helped flip a few congressional contests. Notably, our ads focusing on Asian swing voters secured congressional wins for Young Kim and Michelle Steele (both Korean Americans) in two major swing districts in Orange County, California.
Could you imagine how liberals would react if Republicans dominate the upcoming 2022 midterm elections and continue to significantly improve with Black, Latino and Asian voters?
Just look at this deranged post-Virginia 2021 tweet below from a prominent liberal commentator.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqe1j1jbd21hnv13vgau5lumum1ruhj3a050hi58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3imeoj0s3h2bs)
---
Ah yes! How else could anyone explain how a Black Republican woman (Winsome Sears) won statewide in Virginia? Those swing voters simply must LOVE white supremacy!
The new Virginia Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears even responded to Jemele’s tweet:
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57db2vrk950isd11hg32r8fcdeqi1obba5f5o0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3imeoj0s3h2bs)
---
**WOW!** That’s an amazing response.
Now, imagine how liberals will react when Republicans flip the House AND the Senate with increased support from minority voters this November in a massive **RED WAVE**!
Their heads will explode!
And then Biden won’t be able to pass any radical legislation.
All of that is why we **MUST** win the 2022 elections!
As you know, since 2013 with the Run Ben Run draft campaign and subsequently Stars and Stripes Forever PAC, we have successfully concentrated on increasing the minority vote for conservatives by broadcasting the truth to African Americans, Latinos, and Asians.
Using the Nadler Method, our ads have been highly effective. We have a strong track record.
**[I hope that you, as one of our most loyal supporters, will help us win the battle for the Senate and the House in the 2022 midterm elections by donating a gift of $202.20, $100, $50, $20.22, or at least $5.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfc14o0trr3cqrn5ql1gol490vd3tsql0ovmg5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3imeoj0s3h2bs)**

Thank you for reading my messages and for supporting Stars and Stripes Forever PAC.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Early Voting is Finally Here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Early Voting is finally here! Polls are open from 7:00 am to 7:00 pm and [you can find a convenient polling location by clicking here!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5759894c488044d8bfa40f7d79b75625&_e=yRaHCTjSgMcm5EPiR4fxUbdhOFb6eensw0bUOZXJbqo_9KSissFIqCYGt5-57w40bMisokbuVVvE6PBG8-7eCwt5a5SrCJ8EEUxi_nu3ULgaPdTEYacbb9V1gtCSxtKM_Uvs6z-YmBnMF_MB2qDjtE3dq_-s6ocT8ZmgBTVffRZ8jyTkHRRdPeSS7bg46xc4bBJakuK0i4qihYlvuxox339ClkwdfPMLbbC6O7vLOxrAg0s0upImWIjHzeAq5nOcma5Xor_kqJ9YIMQzqhn_3p2SidXP3a2NBQtbaYnMIGw%3D)

The past 7 months have been absolutely incredible. I have been blown away by supporters like you who have welcomed me into your homes, spent your weekends block-walking, and contributed your hard-earned money to our campaign. Our campaign has incredible grassroots energy because of supporters like you.

I fought to defend our country from enemies abroad, and while in Washington, I'll fight to secure our southern border, for the lives of the unborn, and will stand up against Joe Biden and his radical allies in Congress.

I hope I can count on your support.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

I’ve seen what Mitch McConnell and the GOP are capable of. Over the years, they’ve moved from Senate race to Senate race, tearing down Democrat after Democrat by dumping tens of millions from their war chest into nasty attack ads.
We know this is their playbook, so luckily we know how to fight back. So here’s the plan, we’ve got three important jobs we need to do.
Democrats must protect vulnerable incumbents like Raphael Warnock, flip open GOP-held seats in states like North Carolina, and defeat Republicans like Marco Rubio.
**_Boy, it’s a lot of work!_**
But if we slip up and lose even one seat, we hand our Senate majority back to Mitch McConnell and fail to deliver lasting progress on big issues like voting rights. We can’t let that happen.
[_**So what do you say? Will you chip in to support Defend the Senate? Any amount you can give will go a long way, and I’ll be so grateful to know you’re supporting this important, grassroots work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41783773/330319462/999668826?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220214_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTllNjY4OC1iNzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWI1nOVeqX8FSYl8v3-5ygesZZl2Rv3JGzPB7BeoVb8=)

subject: A quick update, and a request

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kOhC5lUzcwsZSC32qqZRpFVLpyfK2260PGUNpoeGMkc=/MlTiHbKzo6ToXu2NMKGPeEnMiz63oGBtJw4XCwc-tTg=?refcode=E14044-20220214-ValentineSurrogate-header-Holiday-RegTemplate-SurrogateLocal-NA&amount=19) | Happy Valentines' Day to you and your loved ones! This is Pam (Josh's wife). Thank you so much for the outpouring of love and support we received to celebrate the news of our baby on the way. As we celebrate Valentines' Day today, Josh and I are thinking a lot about all the love we have for our soon-to-be daughter, and about what sort of future we want to create for her. Some of the most important issues for the future are going to be determined over the next few years: are we going to aggressively combat climate change? Are we going to adequately protect women's access to reproductive healthcare? Are we going to address growing economic inequalities? The threats we face have never been more real. There's never been a more important time to think seriously about the role we want to play in creating the future we want for our loved ones. **The midterm election coming up has never felt higher stakes.** I know Josh has everything it takes to continue fighting for us - but we need your help to keep him there. We’re facing a small gap already – around $1,000 short of where we need to be – and I can’t stress enough how crucial it is that we pick this up.

**[Before I get into it, will you contribute $15 toward my reelection campaign today? Just click here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41784793/330324594/1627587959?refcode=EM_FR_220214mm1_mm_lbr_actives_8_ng_na_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGFkODA5Yi1iYThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oS0AUnH_wOzkPZHl1HUhKi9scZhg0xaf3QzH1_uPRt8=)**

We set some aggressive goals at the start of the year, and after a great start, our fundraising has fallen off pace.

There are so many reasons why staying on track with our goals is so important.

**_First_** , our campaign is at the top of the ticket this year. There are no Presidential or Senatorial races that can help turn out voters, so Democrats are counting on my team to do some heavy lifting and excite voters in all three counties.

**_Second_** , hitting our goals this early in the campaign season enables us to plan ahead and build the backbone of a successful campaign.

**_Last_** , the race for control of the House is up for grabs. It could come down to the wire, and Delaware **_must_** stay blue if we want to keep Democratic control in Congress.

**[So, can you contribute $15 toward my reelection campaign today and help us close our fundraising gap by Tuesday night?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41784794/330324595/1627587959?refcode=EM_FR_220214mm1_mm_lbr_actives_8_ng_na_l2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGFkODA5Yi1iYThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oS0AUnH_wOzkPZHl1HUhKi9scZhg0xaf3QzH1_uPRt8=)** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** | | ****[$15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41784795/330324596/1627587959?refcode=EM_FR_220214mm1_mm_lbr_actives_8_ng_na_EL15&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGFkODA5Yi1iYThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oS0AUnH_wOzkPZHl1HUhKi9scZhg0xaf3QzH1_uPRt8=)****

name: Tom
subject: Happy Valentine's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Few things in life are more important than family. Reading all these emails I punctually drop in your inboxes you’d think politics is life. With 18 hour campaign days I sometimes think that is the case, too.

I am a blessed man. I have a wife and two kids; and Lucy, a little yorkshire terrier to boot. I am told it is a million dollar family and I couldn’t agree more.

Three years ago to the month, my wife Maria was diagnosed with breast cancer. We didn’t know if she would survive. The thought of our Mary and George growing up not knowing their mom haunted us for a weekend until a team of cancer doctors, radiologists and surgeons assured us it was winnable, 90 percent, in fact.

A lot of family and love got us through 18 months of treatment. But, so did health insurance. Let’s be honest.

My wife and before her, my mom who died of breast cancer, were lucky to have good health insurance. Over 30 million Americans have NO insurance, the numbers growing everyday with the COVID crisis. How do they pay for mammograms? Do they even get one? How many cancer cases, heart conditions or other diseases go undetected and how many lives are taken which could have been saved had they been able to afford health care?

This is one more reason why I support Medicare for All.

It is patently unfair that some have health insurance and have the means to treat their maladies and cure terminable illness and some do not.

My wife and my mom and the thirty million Americans without any insurance fuels my passion and drives this campaign. If we can insure just one more person it would be worth it. But let’s make it really count. Let’s insure everyone and make sure in the richest country on Earth, no one has to lose a loved one because they lack health care.

Happy Valentine's Day!

---
|
---
