clean_body: | | Few things in life are more important than family. Reading all these emails I punctually drop in your inboxes you’d think politics is life. With 18 hour campaign days I sometimes think that is the case, too. I am a blessed man. I have a wife and two kids; and Lucy, a little yorkshire terrier to boot. I am told it is a million dollar family and I couldn’t agree more. Three years ago to the month, my wife Maria was diagnosed with breast cancer. We didn’t know if she would survive. The thought of our Mary and George growing up not knowing their mom haunted us for a weekend until a team of cancer doctors, radiologists and surgeons assured us it was winnable, 90 percent, in fact. A lot of family and love got us through 18 months of treatment. But, so did health insurance. Let’s be honest. My wife and before her, my mom who died of breast cancer, were lucky to have good health insurance. Over 30 million Americans have NO insurance, the numbers growing everyday with the COVID crisis. How do they pay for mammograms? Do they even get one? How many cancer cases, heart conditions or other diseases go undetected and how many lives are taken which could have been saved had they been able to afford health care? This is one more reason why I support Medicare for All. It is patently unfair that some have health insurance and have the means to treat their maladies and cure terminable illness and some do not. My wife and my mom and the thirty million Americans without any insurance fuels my passion and drives this campaign. If we can insure just one more person it would be worth it. But let’s make it really count. Let’s insure everyone and make sure in the richest country on Earth, no one has to lose a loved one because they lack health care. Happy Valentine's Day! | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

body:
They're focused on me and scared | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bf75be876fcb/another-walz-smear-job?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Half truths and desperate emails seem to come from all directions when you're trying to win a state! Tim Walz is _targeting_ our campaign because he knows that we can win. Look at this ridiculous letter he just sent out to his far-left supporters. They call us "misinformation peddlers" and yet Walz's party is pulling back mask mandates and vaccine passports because they are underwater in the mid-term elections!

They know who the real threat is and [we need your help to win](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ba8c2f365f&e=33b11688c1). Read the letter:
---
|
---
| Peter - can you feel the momentum? For the first time in a very long time the DFL/media machine fears a Republican victory! Join our [small-dollar movement and contribute $17.76, $35, or more](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=a8b107119c&e=33b11688c1)!

And that momentum isn't just felt in Minnesota; our campaign is getting nationwide attention as the POLITICAL SCIENCE falls apart and the narratives they used to demonize me crumble. Check out my Fox News Segment with Laura Ingraham this past Friday:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b022192380&e=33b11688c1)
---
| It is time to unify as a Republican movement! We _can_ restore safety to our streets; we _can_ trust real science instead of political science; we _can_ prioritize students over broken institutions and political indoctrination; we _can_ ensure our elections are secure and trustworthy!

Let's not be afraid to be a better state! We can be nation-leading with job creation and a robust economy too. Our campaign has built a movement that can win and change the dynamic of Minnesota going forward.

I hope you'll join me and help [build our war chest](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=da0b0bb4a9&e=33b11688c1) to defeat Tim Walz!

In Freedom and with Great Optimism for our Future,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor
Minnesota

|

These last few months have just been incredible. Tina is unbelievably committed to the fight to build an Oregon we can all be proud of.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785870/330329788/-2010496638?refcode=em22_220214_vday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKxKCQ5jTk2gXRB0dQqeo0dh7R9oJS7qEpm-eEG00Cc=)

I want to take the time to recognize and celebrate her hard work this Valentine's Day by giving Tina a special gift. The best Valentine's Day gift I can think of this year is extra support for our campaign.

But friends, I am going to need your help to make that a reality.

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Let's break up with the Republican Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Let’s be honest, Valentine’s Day can be a polarizing holiday. **But don’t worry, we have a breakup everyone can get behind. It’s time we dumped the Republican Party once and for all.** Are you in?!
For too long, the Republicans have been messing us around, pointing fingers and assigning blame to distract from their problematic behavior. **News flash: this relationship is toxic. We’ve got to get out of it, now.** And there’s no better place to start than in California’s 23rd district.
**[We have a real shot of flipping this district and winning this election, but it’s going to take all of us to do it. I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and help this district break up with my problematic opponent. Can I count on you today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785803/330329634/-431919476?refcode=2-14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zd9spPWJCcTfQIQnrGJ-jWQtglfsqZiVi4S4Vsu9f24=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785806/330329645/-431919476?refcode=2-14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zd9spPWJCcTfQIQnrGJ-jWQtglfsqZiVi4S4Vsu9f24=)**

**I believe this district is ready to break up with my Republican opponent and embrace a true champion for the people instead.** The constituents of California’s 23rd deserve a relationship with their elected representative that’s based on mutual respect and honesty. But my opponent cares more about loyalty to Trump than the people of this district.
He collects checks from big industries while the average worker in his district is barely making a living wage. He votes against bills that would bring vital resources to this district, then takes credit for them when they pass. **We deserve better than manipulation and deceit. We deserve progress and solidarity. **
**[I pledge to be the kind of representative the people of this district can trust to show up, listen, and respond to their needs. But I can’t get to Congress without your help. I’m asking you to make an investment in my campaign today, so our future is better tomorrow. Will you help us out? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785808/330329654/-431919476?refcode=2-14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zd9spPWJCcTfQIQnrGJ-jWQtglfsqZiVi4S4Vsu9f24=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

subject: Ed Thelander and Paul LePage to Submit Petitions Wednesday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Ed and Governor Paul LePage will be turning in their ballot signatures this coming Wednesday, February 16th, together in Augusta at 11:30 a.m. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1004ac1aea35/a-strong-finish-to-8847538?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=cdcc987bd5&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> | | | | | It seems like only yesterday that these two fine Republican candidates launched their ballot access signature gathering efforts with an event at the Golden Rooster in Saco. Now here we are, just over a month later, and candidate for Maine’s 1st Congressional District Ed Thelander and Governor Paul LePage will be turning in their signatures to get on the ballot this coming Wednesday, February 16th, together in Augusta at 11:30 a.m.
>
> Supporters will be gathering in the parking lot outside of Maine GOP Headquarters, 9 Higgins St., and then heading over to the Capitol Building to host a rally to show both Janet Mills and Chellie Pingree that Maine wants to send Ed Thelander to represent us in Washington, and that we all want Governor LePage back in office!
>
> Our special thanks go out to everyone who contributed to the effort, some standing out in the cold with freezing pens, some racing from one caucus to another, some going door-to-door to collect the necessary number of signatures. It was a huge display of support for both candidates, and the speed with which the goals were met is a sign of the coming Red Wave in November!
>
> Please join Ed and Paul Wednesday morning, February 16, at 9 Higgins Street in Augusta to send a loud and clear message that 2022 is a Republican year!
>
> * * *
>
> If you have any notarized/certified petitions to turn in, please reply directly to this email and we will make arrangements to meet with you and pick them up.
>
> Please don't delay, get your petitions in **ASAP! **If you gave petitions to anyone else, please let me know or send me their contact information so I can follow up with them. If you have any questions, or need any help, call Liliana directly at (207) 882-6053, or call me directly at (207) 805-4246, or simply reply to this message and we will help you.
>
> Thank you again,
> ---
>
> Mike Pajak
> Campaign Manager
> (207) 805-4246
> [**_www.thelanderforcongress.com_**](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=40f38a52fa&e=f8a0a76a2b)

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: My heart is with the survivors of Parkland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I will never forget

---
| |
---
Friend,

I will never forget the days following the massacre at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida.
Not even two weeks after the tragedy of gun violence shook our community, I met with survivors from Parkland. They were just kids. They were grieving. As an entire nation watched, they turned their grief into action – pleading with lawmakers like Marco Rubio who refused to pass laws to help prevent the sort of violence they lived through.

Do you know what the students from Parkland told me just days after they survived the shooting, friend? **They told me they were scared to go back to school. **

They told me they were scared someone else would get their hands on a weapon of war like the one that killed their friends. That they, too, might be murdered by someone who never should have had a gun in the first place.

What I asked myself then – and what I've asked myself too many times following a mass shooting in this country – was this: **What kind of nation are we when our children grow up scared to go to school?**

What kind of nation are we when our _children_ fear walking through a school doorway armed with metal detectors? What kind of nation are we when our communities, of all ages and backgrounds, feel fear at their places of worship? Fear malls, concert halls, movie theaters or nightclubs? Fear walking down the street?
_It's a grave moral failing_ – made all the more grave by sellouts like Marco Rubio who have blocked legislation in the Senate, passed by me and other House members, that could save lives. You have my word as Florida's next U.S. senator, I will do so much better than Marco Rubio.
We have too many anniversaries like this, friend. Too many days out of the year where we look back on a tragedy that never should have happened. Too many days where mothers and fathers, brothers and sisters, friends and loved ones are consumed by grief, reminded that someone precious was taken from them too soon.

It's painful. But amidst pain, here's what I remember: The students and other survivors of Parkland chose bravery. Through their trauma, they organized. Through their pain, they spoke out. Through their anger, they marched. Through their love for those lost, they galvanized a movement that could not be overlooked – could not be dismantled by the corrupt influence of the gun lobby.

**Those of us elected __ to lead ought to follow their example – because only through bold, tangible change can we _truly_ honor those taken from us. In Parkland. In Orlando. In far too many American communities. **

That's why, today, I want to reaffirm not just that my thoughts and whole heart are with the survivors of Parkland. **My word is with them too, and my word is as follows: I will do whatever I can to end the scourge of gun violence in America.**

Val Demings
|
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785698/330328520/-144803992?refcode=jtk2357-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjNGMzNy1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGP6WtzbvgZWy89hpelzgypIo2xeZvmBHrd2ji1uhp8=&emci=32f07e2a-738b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6e6c4c37-bf8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/32f07e2a-738b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/6e6c4c37-bf8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjNGMzNy1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGP6WtzbvgZWy89hpelzgypIo2xeZvmBHrd2ji1uhp8=&id=123159867).

Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate
clean_body: I will never forget | | Friend, I will never forget the days following the massacre at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. Not even two weeks after the tragedy of gun violence shook our community, I met with survivors from Parkland. They were just kids. They were grieving. As an entire nation watched, they turned their grief into action – pleading with lawmakers like Marco Rubio who refused to pass laws to help prevent the sort of violence they lived through. Do you know what the students from Parkland told me just days after they survived the shooting, friend? They told me they were scared to go back to school. They told me they were scared someone else would get their hands on a weapon of war like the one that killed their friends. That they, too, might be murdered by someone who never should have had a gun in the first place. What I asked myself then – and what I've asked myself too many times following a mass shooting in this country – was this: What kind of nation are we when our children grow up scared to go to school? What kind of nation are we when our children fear walking through a school doorway armed with metal detectors? What kind of nation are we when our communities, of all ages and backgrounds, feel fear at their places of worship? Fear malls, concert halls, movie theaters or nightclubs? Fear walking down the street? It's a grave moral failing – made all the more grave by sellouts like Marco Rubio who have blocked legislation in the Senate, passed by me and other House members, that could save lives. You have my word as Florida's next U.S. senator, I will do so much better than Marco Rubio. We have too many anniversaries like this, friend. Too many days out of the year where we look back on a tragedy that never should have happened. Too many days where mothers and fathers, brothers and sisters, friends and loved ones are consumed by grief, reminded that someone precious was taken from them too soon. It's painful. But amidst pain, here's what I remember: The students and other survivors of Parkland chose bravery. Through their trauma, they organized. Through their pain, they spoke out. Through their anger, they marched. Through their love for those lost, they galvanized a movement that could not be overlooked – could not be dismantled by the corrupt influence of the gun lobby. Those of us elected to lead ought to follow their example – because only through bold, tangible change can we truly_ honor those taken from us. In Parkland. In Orlando. In far too many American communities. That's why, today, I want to reaffirm not just that my thoughts and whole heart are with the survivors of Parkland. My word is with them too, and my word is as follows: I will do whatever I can to end the scourge of gun violence in America. Val Demings |

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Spreading love
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Hi Peter!
# [#]
While our country is easily focused on division and hatred, days like today remind us what’s really important: love!

It is love for this country, our community, and my family that keeps me going and I hope the progress we continue to make reflects just that. The past year has been more difficult than we expected, but I am nevertheless thankful for what we have achieved together as one team.

On a day when it’s all about love, I want to make sure you know that you and your support is greatly appreciated every step of the way.

Whatever you decide to do this Valentine’s Day, please be safe and remember that we are all in this together!

Whoever you decide to celebrate today with, my wife and I hope you stay safe!

Wishing you a happy Valentine’s Day,
Mike Thompson

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Will you help me fire Liz Cheney?
body:
Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-a
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqnjualm3qojjk22b9mcjme0mjf85u4gpoal3e18_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1c3ncjg72sricjge8sr0e1hjacrlm4pr4t30cdhnep9hcsrb2dlnchjrecljc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8q6cdj0mmoefcjkcoon1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm2o73chhm2pr24no)
Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?... |
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Will you help me **FIRE Liz Cheney** and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to _"bring it."_

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zte0sj0om6270q8p2b69qtr23rkp1ncne8hslf4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu4pp723pkrjbepciv6tcpims7s2b50g4j86og5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise _millions_ for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a _60 Minutes_ interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney. [**Will you help me with an urgent donation today?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zoi5j39msrh20ccsedi7fo66a2tj43lsisrtogvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, **let me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just the values that Joe Biden and his socialists hate - they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party...and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know - like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was dupped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdtqgsq7c5fag4f6tmtct4dlld2te3lm5hqknr98_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5o0kcqhtmsso0leqhvg0op1tdob6hmei2qhvjvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming - and the American people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need:_yours_ .**

[**Will you make an emergency campaign donation to let me know I have it?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8h23lioa40vcj1fsod93aj5qg2c5700jqj95mjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn3f8qojts2f72fh42j14vhg6bgkekn87dt3ch40_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something - this will be the most important race in the entire country - but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing _for good_ .**

[**So please, won't you make an emergency campaign donation to FIRE Liz Cheney right away?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbbluu0aihl3s0uvmhti69fcb5bshajj1pom7vug_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdp6cq447thablunu380bikgn0ug181mkvusbgag_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z503q2idve8qq7t4phmid09p4vh8i70lep5rdab8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

PS: It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

[**No more - will you make an urgent donation to my campaign to defeat her in the Republican primary?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0ui3qv8sfg7cg2v07vsvq8oi77q4vtvlqghh1oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)

[DONATE](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeceua291901gpk6vf6q464tus1cp1uol2mhglh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)

---
| [ ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlas5jmdhah9964csbqap2mggh5ac77a1ck14a58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm8or1cth2bs)
---

| Paid for by:
Hageman For Wyoming
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyanne, WY 82003
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2ze14pqivu7tohtnh4st56hqeg9eek62t6taq3qlg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zee9683l8jh1d5vkij8p2nevbu67gar13av2o0po_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c5ge6p33c5jm49fg)

body:
our country is in vital need of protection. From radical anti-Americanism. From destructive socialist policies. And from the actual pandemic of weakness that has plagued our conservative politicians for far too long. Friend, our country is in vital need of protection. _From radical anti-Americanism. From destructive socialist policies. And from the actual pandemic of weakness that has plagued our conservative politicians for far too long. _
It’s time for someone who will defend America, stand strong for our values, and fight for what is best for our nation. **_It’s time to send in a Marine. Let’s send JD Vance._** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69085%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qqS7V1wUbzT93sRCpSNBYA&sysid=1) [CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT JD >> ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69086%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dXqkYlLRCFk0Wcj5AchbPA&sysid=1) With the midterm elections more critical than ever before, we can’t afford to mess this one up. JD Vance served in the United States Marine Corp. He fought in Operation Iraqi Freedom. And now that the battle for freedom is here at home, he’s ready to fight again. He will take on the career politicians and woke Democrats who are destroying the American Dream. _And he won’t back down from mainstream fake news or the cancel culture-obsessed elites._ _And in this critical swing state - that strength and courage is exactly what we need to win._ With Democrats in Washington stomping on our Constitutional rights, we can’t let their totalitarian and radical control last a second longer. _WE MUST WIN. WE MUST TAKE BACK THE SENATE. _ **But we can’t do that if we don’t win this race in Ohio. ** That’s why it’s time we send in a Marine. **Please, chip in now to get JD to Washington:[https://secure.winred.com/protect-ohio-values/action-3705937-pa/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69087%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fyKL86iOjWNc%2bYvVWaJ15w&sysid=1)** Even if you can only spare $5, please, give what you can. Every dollar counts. Thank you in advance.

Protect Ohio Values | |

name: Annie Andrews
subject: When you’ve seen what I’ve seen, you can’t stay silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
Four years ago, we learned of yet another tragic school shooting, this time in Parkland, Florida, where 17 students’ and staff members’ lives were stolen.

| Friends,

Four years ago, we learned of yet another tragic school shooting, this time in Parkland, Florida, where 17 students’ and staff members’ lives were stolen.

Two days later, I was dropping my oldest daughter off at kindergarten and saw an armed police officer patrolling the drop off-line for the first time.

That day, I called my Senators and tried to explain my fear, frustration, and anger over their lack of action to prevent community-based gun violence.

Two weeks later, I was sitting in my first Moms Demand Action for Gun Sense in America chapter meeting.

**As a mom and a pediatrician, I believe we have a moral imperative to act, and I’m done waiting for our elected officials to do the right thing.** Gun violence is the leading cause of death among kids under the age of 18, and I’ve treated too many near-fatal pediatric gunshot victims _not_ to speak up and demand change.

Imagine caring for a 3 year old little girl whose face is permanently disfigured due to an unintentional gunshot wound that could have been prevented with a secure storage law. Or a 17 year old boy who is now paralyzed from his second gunshot wound that could have been prevented with federal funding for hospital-based violence intervention programs.

**When you have seen what I’ve seen, you can’t stay on the sidelines and stay silent.**

[Please join me in honoring the lives stolen four years ago at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School by signing on to demand action to prevent future gun violence tragedies.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41787902/330337560/-1471307163?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220214_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=XbxfJChcltgS%2FdZ39uQUbUFGeQ7NJ2JH6B1vqZuR8t7dQYwoLiKS0Bv0uhGvjgpm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjZmMDU5ZS1jNDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHoyqu9oybxj-vTxprJe4ELEmmIMhRh31bDMdzWT8f4=&emci=c06f059e-c48d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c66f059e-c48d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)

Thank you for standing with me to build a safer future for our children.

Dr. Annie Andrews

---
* * *
**[Click here to unsubscribe from Dr. Annie's email list.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c06f059e-c48d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/c66f059e-c48d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjZmMDU5ZS1jNDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHoyqu9oybxj-vTxprJe4ELEmmIMhRh31bDMdzWT8f4=&id=108220752)**

**FEATURED ARTICLE**

[**California Law Would Require Parents to Disclose to Schools Presence of Firearms in Home**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/50fbb0a0d6d66635/17b1e56962a282d6c3d6b838967d376c/35693 "California Law Would Require Parents to Disclose to Schools Presence of Firearms in Home")
---
California Senate Bill 906, introduced by Senator Anthony Portantino (D-25), makes it mandatory that parents of students disclose firearm ownership status to the schools their children attend, including how they are stored. It requires that these questions be placed on the forms used to register or enroll students, and these forms may be made available to law-enforcement under certain conditions.

clean_body: New Gun Laws, U.S. Businesses Collaborating with China, Ukraine, COVID Lockdowns, and more... | | | | FEATURED ARTICLE "California Law Would Require Parents to Disclose to Schools Presence of Firearms in Home" California Senate Bill 906, introduced by Senator Anthony Portantino (D-25), makes it mandatory that parents of students disclose firearm ownership status to the schools their children attend, including how they are stored. It requires that these questions be placed on the forms used to register or enroll students, and these forms may be made available to law-enforcement under certain conditions. Being with someone as long as I’ve been with Wes allows you to watch them accomplish their dreams and make their impact on the world.
I’ve watched Wes become an Army officer and lead soldiers into combat in Afghanistan, build a business to help underserved Baltimore students go to college, and serve as the CEO of a national nonprofit organization, distributing over $600 million to families living in poverty.
And most importantly, I’ve watched him become an amazing, loving father to our two beautiful children over the years.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41788259/330339170/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214valentinesday_dm_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjJlOWI0OC1jNjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AD9X5Hz6LtVwlLyx_UBQylLF5qlmmK9xXlU4QbWJZ30=)

**[Help me show Wes some love and support today as he’s busy working hard on the campaign trail. Make a grassroots donation of any amount now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41788260/330339171/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214valentinesday_dm_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjJlOWI0OC1jNjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AD9X5Hz6LtVwlLyx_UBQylLF5qlmmK9xXlU4QbWJZ30=)**

name: Team Beshear
subject: Cornerstone of our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Our ability to vote and have a say in our government is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans. But across the country, we've seen Republicans pass unfair redistricting maps in an attempt to silence the voices of millions of voters. Peter,

Our ability to vote and have a say in our government is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans. But across the country, we've seen Republicans pass unfair redistricting maps in an attempt to silence the voices of millions of voters.

Our state constitution guarantees that elections should be equal and free – that means voters pick their representatives, not the other way around. But right here in Kentucky, Republicans quietly passed unfair maps last month, and they did it quickly and without transparency. They're trying to play politics with our maps to benefit their party without regard for the folks who elected them.

**Fortunately, Andy stood up for Kentuckians and vetoed these unconstitutional maps.**

Andy knows voting is the cornerstone of our democracy, and he won't stand for Republicans playing politics with Kentucky districts. He'll always fight to ensure every Kentuckian has the representation they deserve, but he needs your help to keep up the fight in Frankfort.

**[If you're with Andy in the fight to ensure every Kentuckian can fairly make their voices heard, will you rush a donation before our mid-month fundraising deadline to support his re-election campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41788282/330339222/-758409691?refcode=em22_220214_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220214_mm1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDY1ZWY3YS1jNjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EYBasvIOTv3EOEmwoykiSzRJLZkrPCUhd3B3KXQ2P6Q=)**

Thanks for being a part of this team,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he's relying on grassroots support – not outside money – to help him do it. Our average online donation this month is just $25.11. Will you chip in our average donation, or whatever you can afford, to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41788283/330339223/-758409691?refcode=em22_220214_mm1_fnd_gq_act___test_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220214_mm1_fnd_gq_act___test_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=25.11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDY1ZWY3YS1jNjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EYBasvIOTv3EOEmwoykiSzRJLZkrPCUhd3B3KXQ2P6Q=)

clean_body: Our ability to vote and have a say in our government is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans. But across the country, we've seen Republicans pass unfair redistricting maps in an attempt to silence the voices of millions of voters. Peter, Our ability to vote and have a say in our government is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans. But across the country, we've seen Republicans pass unfair redistricting maps in an attempt to silence the voices of millions of voters. Our state constitution guarantees that elections should be equal and free – that means voters pick their representatives, not the other way around. But right here in Kentucky, Republicans quietly passed unfair maps last month, and they did it quickly and without transparency. They're trying to play politics with our maps to benefit their party without regard for the folks who elected them. Fortunately, Andy stood up for Kentuckians and vetoed these unconstitutional maps. Andy knows voting is the cornerstone of our democracy, and he won't stand for Republicans playing politics with Kentucky districts. He'll always fight to ensure every Kentuckian has the representation they deserve, but he needs your help to keep up the fight in Frankfort. = Thanks for being a part of this team, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he's relying on grassroots support – not outside money – to help him do it. Our average online donation this month is just $25.11. Will you chip in our average donation, or whatever you can afford, to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

I know you probably get a lot of emails discussing "goals," but these benchmarks are critical to ensuring that our fundraising is on track to keep our campaign running.
New Hampshire is a deeply purple state, and falling short of even a small goal could be the difference between winning and losing. I hate asking for money, but in 2016, my race was the closest in the country, and now the GOP is spending millions to buy this seat and flip the Senate red. **With the Senate split 50-50, falling short is not an option.**
Look, I’m not relying on megadonors and outside interest groups like the GOP is. My campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5 or more whenever you can because you believe in what we’re fighting for. In fact, our average online donation is just $24.51 – I’m really proud of that.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Endorsements, campaign stops, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Commissioner Elliott stated, “Michael Brown has the leadership skills and knowledge of many issues that need to be fixed in Michigan.” | | | |
---
| | |
## Endorsements, Campaign Stops and more.
---
|
---
|
### County Commissioner Mac Elliott Endorses Michael Brown for Governor
I'm happy to announce today that I've been endorsed by Berrien County Commissioner Mac Elliot. Mac Elliott serves as Chair of the Berrien County Board of Commissioners and I'm honored to have his support.
---
|
---
|
> _“Michael Brown has the leadership skills and knowledge of many issues that need to be fixed in Michigan. We served together on the Berrien County Board of Commissioners and he has my support personally and financially. Please join me in supporting him for Governor. You will be impressed with his common sense and ability to relate to all citizens.”_
> – Mac Elliott, Berrien County Commissioner

Mac Elliott joins a growing list of endorsements including [State Representative Beth Griffin](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=7fa4e5c626&e=0636b97700), [St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a874c5e2f2&e=0636b97700), [Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=84ed6fc618&e=0636b97700), and rocker [Ted Nugent](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f1355a845e&e=0636b97700), among others.
---
|
---
|
### More from the campaign trail...
I recently toured **Edgewater Automation** in Saint Joseph, Michigan. Edgewater specializes in helping companies automate production in various industries. Their brainstorming process and design of automation equipment is amazing.
---
|
---
---
| Skilled trades are crucial for the success of companies like Edgewater. Under my administration every high school will have a qualified skilled trades advisor. I will fully support manufacturing and the trades as Governor. Companies looking to return production close to home instead of overseas are vital for Michigan's future.

A big thank you to **Mayor Mike DeVore** and **Mayor Pro Tem Marty Chambers** for hosting a reception for me at the Main Street Inn in **Lowell, Michigan**. In addition to the great guests I was also able to attend the City Council meeting and thank the city council members for the service to the community.
---
|
---
---
| In **Lansing** , I addressed the **Michigan Republican State Committee** meeting. Honored to discuss my campaign and our agenda to fix Michigan. Even grabbed a quick selfie outside the capitol building.
---
|
---
---
| I had the pleasure of speaking at the **Clare & Gladwin County Republican Parties - Lincoln Day Brunch. **It was also good to hear updates from Speaker of the House Jason Wentworth and Congressman John Moolenaar.

Meeting more citizens from the area was great. This was my second time visiting Clare & Gladwin Counties to talk about how we can fix Michigan. I discussed my plans for reducing the state income tax, ending the deer baiting ban in Michigan, returning children to classrooms, and my commitment to rural law enforcement. I also talked of the importance of fully funding drug enforcement in order to keep methamphetamine and fentanyl out of our communities.
---
|
---
---
| To win the race and defeat Whitmer, counties like Clare and Gladwin will be crucial. I was glad to be back. It will take a relentless campaigner to beat these radical Democrats.

Together we can do it. Will you join me?
---
|
---
| [VOLUNTEER TO HELP MICHAEL‘S CAMPAIGN](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=6d6d799a89&e=0636b97700 "VOLUNTEER TO HELP MICHAEL‘S CAMPAIGN")
---
|
---
|
### Finally
In case you missed it, we had some lighthearted fun this weekend poking fun at the millionaires spending a ton of money on Super Bowl ads. Check it out.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=da22d1c77b&e=0636b97700)
---
| [DONATE TODAY TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE!](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=edadbf9c73&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE!")
---
|

Contributions to Michael Brown for Governor are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.
---

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: Happy Valentine's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=Valentinesl_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=Valentinesl_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hi Friends,
Today is Valentine's Day, and for me this holiday goes beyond the traditional concepts of love and romance. For me, love is so much bigger than that because of the love for my parents, cousins, friends, and the people of this district.
I reflect on the love I felt growing up here. It reminds me of the immense gratitude I have to meet so many people of Virginia’s 8th and for my community of volunteers who take time out of their lives to phone bank and attend meet & greets.
And most of all, there are supporters like you. There is a lot of love that goes into moving this campaign forward, and I wanted to take the time to wish you all a Happy Valentine's Day and to thank you for your continued support!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=Valentines [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=Valentines]
Your support means everything. Thank you!
Victoria Virasingh

clean_body: [] [] [] Hi Friends, Today is Valentine's Day, and for me this holiday goes beyond the traditional concepts of love and romance. For me, love is so much bigger than that because of the love for my parents, cousins, friends, and the people of this district. I reflect on the love I felt growing up here. It reminds me of the immense gratitude I have to meet so many people of Virginia’s 8th and for my community of volunteers who take time out of their lives to phone bank and attend meet & greets. And most of all, there are supporters like you. There is a lot of love that goes into moving this campaign forward, and I wanted to take the time to wish you all a Happy Valentine's Day and to thank you for your continued support! [] Your support means everything. Thank you! subject: Spreading the love for New Mexico
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41789357/330344410/-2081290588?code=jtk1161-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ4MDYwMS1jOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kdKSRzVZnHfpXaRATdS7IMnEML8EKeuilkoEZF1qpM=&emci=0f62baa8-738b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3480601-c98d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I love this state. I come from 12 generations of New Mexicans, and because of my family's long history here, my love for the Land of Enchantment runs deep.
**Since it's Valentine's Day, I want to spread the love for my state by telling you about a few of my favorite things about New Mexico:**
💙 **New Mexico's natural beauty is unmatched.** Our state isn't called the Land of Enchantment for nothing.** ** Carlsbad Caverns National Park, Bandelier National Monument, and White Sands National Park are just a few of the natural spaces that never cease to amaze me.
💙 **New Mexico is a multicultural community.** From the Indigenous tribes that have always lived on this land to Hispanic families like mine, the people in our state are committed to uplifting one another. That cultural diversity has also created some of the best traditions – and food.
💙 **New Mexico has a rich cultural legacy.** Influential artists like Georgia O'Keefe have called our state home. We’re putting our state on the map as a hub for filmmakers with shows like “Better Call Saul” and blockbuster hits like “The Avengers.”
Of course, I could go on bragging about our state for hours, but I want to hear what _you_ love about New Mexico, Peter. **Please, if you have just a few seconds to spare, use the link below to write me a message about your favorite parts of New Mexico:**
**[What do you love about New Mexico?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41789358/330344411/-239823744?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1161-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ4MDYwMS1jOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kdKSRzVZnHfpXaRATdS7IMnEML8EKeuilkoEZF1qpM=&emci=0f62baa8-738b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3480601-c98d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)**
| | [WRITE YOUR LOVE LETTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41789362/330344412/-239823744?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1161-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ4MDYwMS1jOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kdKSRzVZnHfpXaRATdS7IMnEML8EKeuilkoEZF1qpM=&emci=0f62baa8-738b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3480601-c98d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)

Michelle Lujan Grisham

name: Zoe Bunnell
subject: Today is the 10th Valentine’s Day that Chris and I have spent together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
I’m Zoe, Chris is my husband (and truly the only man who could ever motivate me to write an email to a bunch of people I don’t know about Valentine’s Day). | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41789388/330344526/-1668125556?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214valentinesday_zb_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAyMmMzNy1jOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AAksEm2J6uAQz15mBgkP9zDc1U-aaisDAE5NT-mMUP8=)
---
Hi Derek — I’m Zoe, Chris is my husband (and truly the only man who could ever motivate me to write an email to a bunch of people I don’t know about Valentine’s Day). Today is the 10th Valentine’s Day that Chris and I have spent together. Things definitely look a little different after a decade together. For starters, his hair is about 3 inches shorter since Chris and I met just weeks after he got out of the Navy, and he was basking in his freedom from the Navy’s haircut regs. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41789389/330344527/-1668125556?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214valentinesday_zb_90da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAyMmMzNy1jOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AAksEm2J6uAQz15mBgkP9zDc1U-aaisDAE5NT-mMUP8=)
---
We’ve also since added three kids to the mix, which any parent can attest brings both new challenges and new meaning to any relationship. Sure, it’s much harder to just hop out for a date night on Valentine’s Day, but it also makes our hearts explode watching our kids excited to spread love to all of their friends and classmates. One of our favorite Valentine’s to date was when we were snuggled at home together just two weeks after welcoming our second daughter into the world.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41789390/330344528/-1668125556?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214valentinesday_zb_90da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAyMmMzNy1jOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AAksEm2J6uAQz15mBgkP9zDc1U-aaisDAE5NT-mMUP8=)
---
This Valentine’s, Chris will be out on the campaign trail working hard to earn the trust of supporters like you — and I wouldn’t have it any other way. From our early days studying together at law school to building our family together in Western PA today, the one constant in our life has been Chris’s dedication to public service.
Sometimes that may mean I’ll be spending Valentine’s alone on my couch watching Hulu, but that minuscule sacrifice will be so worth it if Chris can make even the smallest difference in the lives of people who need this country to do better.
**[So today, I want to remind Chris that he has an army of support behind his campaign that’s stronger than ever. Will you contribute $10 or any amount to his campaign today as a Valentine’s Day gift? I know it would mean a lot to him knowing you have his back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41789391/330344529/-1668125556?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214valentinesday_zb_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAyMmMzNy1jOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AAksEm2J6uAQz15mBgkP9zDc1U-aaisDAE5NT-mMUP8=)**

clean_body: I’m Zoe, Chris is my husband (and truly the only man who could ever motivate me to write an email to a bunch of people I don’t know about Valentine’s Day). | = Hi Derek — I’m Zoe, Chris is my husband (and truly the only man who could ever motivate me to write an email to a bunch of people I don’t know about Valentine’s Day). Today is the 10th Valentine’s Day that Chris and I have spent together. Things definitely look a little different after a decade together. For starters, his hair is about 3 inches shorter since Chris and I met just weeks after he got out of the Navy, and he was basking in his freedom from the Navy’s haircut regs. | = We’ve also since added three kids to the mix, which any parent can attest brings both new challenges and new meaning to any relationship. Sure, it’s much harder to just hop out for a date night on Valentine’s Day, but it also makes our hearts explode watching our kids excited to spread love to all of their friends and classmates. One of our favorite Valentine’s to date was when we were snuggled at home together just two weeks after welcoming our second daughter into the world. = This Valentine’s, Chris will be out on the campaign trail working hard to earn the trust of supporters like you — and I wouldn’t have it any other way. From our early days studying together at law school to building our family together in Western PA today, the one constant in our life has been Chris’s dedication to public service. Sometimes that may mean I’ll be spending Valentine’s alone on my couch watching Hulu, but that minuscule sacrifice will be so worth it if Chris can make even the smallest difference in the lives of people who need this country to do better. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = We are at such a pivotal point in history, and I know how important this race is for Western Pennsylvanians and the whole country... name: Are You Still a Republican
subject: Please be truthful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We need to know if you're still in support of putting America FIRST or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7563qcmosb73i7mgedfn8rdt0k7vtamccbggm4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hmaoj2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1melob9ob1c8oebcphcipnaoth6up30obn6pjm6clheko72cb0caqjdd32e8rrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applmhjr4tb66jgb6p37m2qmash5u)
| ****
---
**URGENT:
_The number of Americans identifying as Republican is the lowest it has been in a decade -- (from Gallup Polling)_**
* * *

Listen, friend, we're trusting you to tell us the truth...

| Have you left the Republican Party?

[** ****No, I'm still a Republican ➞ **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5r84i9fub69nh998avmhbd0ns79rlh5lg628mng_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hmaoj2c3h2bs)
[** ****Yes, but I'm still a conservative ➞ **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6hcnhjin4rr1iciruoh06n6c2kt37asj38s4ivo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hmaoj2c3h2bs)
[** ****Yes, and now I'm a Democrat ➞ **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsebq5sf9a8aighp011ll7kn5keijbrh9nvaeur0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hmaoj2c3h2bs)

---

A recent release from Gallup polling is being used to back liberal media claims that Republicans are _"leaving the party in droves"_ \-- and if it's true, it means the worst has happened...and that support for Joe Biden is growing.

Is it true? [**Respond now ➞**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrmsa96h1hlpkqrivhr22lmbsepbnk1jq2v1v2jg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hmaoj2c3h2bs)

**Please do not delay for even a second.** We need to hear back from you ASAP. _We need to know if you're still in support of putting America FIRST_ or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden. Only with your input can we work to build a winning Republican strategy and retake the Senate.

Will you respond using the buttons above?

**Let us know before 11:59PM TONIGHT by clicking one of the buttons above or using your personal link below:[Official GOP FLASH Poll Secure ID #YXBwcm92YWxzQHBvcGFjdGEuY29t](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z96g7a319p4vbbn5k4u9dpmktj3eqig6tp4tu168_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hmaoj2c3h2bs)**

Waiting on your response,

Senate Republicans

name: Maya Fontheim (Jazz Lewis for Congress)
subject: RE: Results and vision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Hey there, Maya Fontheim here from Jazz Lewis for Congress.
Just bumping up this message from our campaign manager Marvin over the weekend. Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT and we still need to reach our $10,000 grassroots goal so we can keep reaching voters ahead of our June primary. Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or the most generous amount you can? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=bump_link1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Give $5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=abx5] Give $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=abx10]
Give $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25] Give $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50]
Give $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode2=abx100] Give Other » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=abx-other]

Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to Congress from Maryland. He has an incredibly strong record of delivering real change for the families he represents through his service in the House of Delegates. As Marvin mentioned, this is a solidly blue district, so we can elect Jazz to be the bold, progressive, effective leader we need in Congress by winning the Democratic Primary on June 28.
But first, we must meet our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight TONIGHT. Rush $5, $10, $25, or the most generous amount you can to make sure we reach our $10,000 mid-month goal in time >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=bump_link2]
Thanks for being on our team!
Maya Fontheim
Team Finance, Jazz Lewis for Congress
---Begin Forwarded Message---
Hi there, it’s Marvin James, Jazz’s campaign manager.
I’ve known Jazz for over ten years, and I’ve seen firsthand how the work he has done in the Maryland House of Delegates has changed lives. I’m so honored to be helping lead the charge to send Jazz to Congress and win this critical open seat for progress, so he can continue to make positive change for our families on an even bigger scale.
Here’s how this race is shaping up here in Maryland’s Fourth District: the winner of our Democratic primary this June 28 will almost certainly carry this district in November. That means we have just a little over four months until Election Day, and in a crowded primary field, we need to reach every single voter we can.
Right now, we’re up against our mid-month fundraising deadline in the shortest month of the year. I’ve got to ask, will you pitch in $5, $10, $25, or the most generous amount you can to make sure we reach our $10,000 mid-month goal in time? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_link1]
Maryland families deserve leaders in Congress who will deliver real results instead of empty rhetoric. Jazz has already proven he can do just that through his service in Maryland’s House of Delegates. Like banning solitary confinement for juveniles and pregnant women, funding a grocery store in a food desert, and getting the first cardiac care unit in Prince George’s County built.
Jazz is the effective, boldly progressive leader we need fighting for us in Congress. We can win this seat for progress, but only if we can communicate with enough voters about Jazz’s record of results and vision to move our communities forward.
But Jazz didn’t come from money. His family fought their way to the middle class, so our people-powered campaign is depending on lots of folks to give whatever they can to make sure we get our message out.
That’s why I’m asking you now to give what you can. Even $5, $10, $25 -- or whatever you can give -- will be a massive help in getting to our mid-month goal so we can keep reaching voters across our district, win our June primary, and elect an effective, bold progressive to this critical open seat >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_link2]
136 days to go!
Marvin James
Campaign Manager, Friends of Jazz Lewis
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8a27a40c-ca8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/3eb37c43-ca8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIzN2M0My1jYThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dv0Pa-df3pz8RVtebSlrXCWrly3ZuRlID86R5sC-WAk=&id=129997837 .

| The USPS is in **_UTTER TURMOIL_** because of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy -- so Joe Biden’s Attorneys General are acting now. **We know we can SAVE the Post Office from DeJoy’s clutches** , _but it’s going to take a coalition of 900 Democrats to keep the pressure on and urge him to resign._

Peter: _There are only_ **three things** _you need to know:_

**1:** Donald Trump appointed far-right donor DeJoy to Postmaster General in an attempt to destroy vote-by-mail.

**2:** Since, DeJoy implemented sweeping reforms that slowed down deliveries, increased prices, and DAMNED the Post Office.

**3:** Attorneys General across the country are trying to stop DeJoy from jeopardizing our Post Office further -- _and we need to stand by their side to oust him._
So, Peter, we need to keep the pressure on and act before it’s too late.
**[900 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: SIGN OUR PETITION TO OUST DEJOY »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41789740/330346320/901191845?refcode=UD_20220214_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMmUwOTY3LWNhOGQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zaKHnOXgaDFKIyEhVPz-wShoRtJtbHn-VKLU4M7YOBk=&emci=577a4113-bc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=de2e0967-ca8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4584036)**

| Peter,

Happy Valentine's Day from all of us at Team Spanberger! We hope you're able to spend today showing the people in your life how much you appreciate and care about them.

We're putting together a card for Abigail to show how much we care about her and the work she's doing to improve life for Virginians, [_**and we 'd love it if you'd sign her card.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/QxdWwv5kUEW85wcNofzGSb5GGr0_1iTrLbhP8GXkEv4=/DepJSd3CKDTr9RTaEmCkDpy6cxp_f6px-TuLPMhUgSE=)

| [SIGN ABIGAIL'S CARD ](https://act.myngp.com/el/QxdWwv5kUEW85wcNofzGSb5GGr0_1iTrLbhP8GXkEv4=/DepJSd3CKDTr9RTaEmCkDpy6cxp_f6px-TuLPMhUgSE=)
---
We hope showing Abigail how many people across Virginia's 7th District support her work will bring a smile to her face this Valentine's Day, **so thank you in advance for making this surprise possible.**

Happy Valentine's Day from all of us at campaign HQ!
Whitney Holt

**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 14, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** It's time to get out and vote early for Ken Paxton because Texas deserves an AG with a record of stopping Biden's vax mandates, ensuring our elections are secure, keeping Texans safe from border crisis, protecting the lives of the unborn, & preventing our children from abuse.

**Link: **[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8S5y-KOtKAs](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=cdbd004f75da4449b31fe351c719aef5&_e=mTzBDfIyq2_PnMJeabQJ0blrKELjBRoDBI-KsqILgKerHpsIvZhhsmQi4_ucFTB43oW2Vge--428_hUMeVPmNsvVzBf8UMXNCP7gE0qFlDlUmTNWtah3kw4zldqfAOhj-aZKd0K7fTY5Qa_sm212Y5BZDTrj2vc8ZamQA5YWKAsg8-OCRfGVrjKIwOFmXyBdmEpBzetmoWXOisFKC42rl7S9tIZLn2ylELc1uV-7lZH6uhKtFj2YADGBM8Eqlkmv-7ZKDpua-x-TxV--L0rDgXTvIGf6grNoqBDjh3hDMVU%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Time To Get To The Polls, Texas**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable for their refusal to enforce our immigration laws, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. He'll never stop fighting for you. ~ Ken Paxton is endorsed by the National Rifle Association, CPAC, Texas Alliance for Life, Texas Homeschool Coalition, Hispanics Against Socialism, Collin County Conservative Republicans, BIZPAC, United Republicans, Asian Republican Club of North Texas, Dallas Police Association, Collin County Deputies Association, and the Houston Police Officer’s Union Political Action Committee.

~ Ken Paxton has a proven record of success against the Biden administration, and specifically on the border and immigration-related cases. That's why he's the most effective and best candidate to continue as AG. His record of effectiveness and success against this reckless and liberal administration and their efforts to take away Texans’ fundamental freedoms speaks for itself.

~Ken Paxton is deeply devoted to America’s founding values and the conservative values Texans hold dear. Ken Paxton has a deep passion and respect for our U.S. Constitution that he's shown through his previous service in the Texas House, Senate, and now as Attorney General.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=cdbd004f75da4449b31fe351c719aef5&_e=mTzBDfIyq2_PnMJeabQJ0al-zPY7iiP4EIOc_oDdpTiklmaVCGMVjw7Ese_e7Q-xFY_QXoNduQWWjj8PHUEI30QriPdTMha5hgKYChDESp5ToaBexGX00buI31UjoqKGnmXxXAseLvxz2cTuDL2PBf2U3dOxJovJltwArpOE63T9mWYBcKh-IF49ya_ezriWSoiCLmoM02la2IJAG14sNpi7nhzL-N8vZJRx5lNXaPZodbKpf73Lee8_DKJPwkC_92aD3AyDMC4ceXXp4C2dFA%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=cdbd004f75da4449b31fe351c719aef5&_e=mTzBDfIyq2_PnMJeabQJ0al-zPY7iiP4EIOc_oDdpTiklmaVCGMVjw7Ese_e7Q-xHwdlWN3TuBdrVScSwPr2hmK2zuAwNTt8ha87Gpp0HITtUWP8XbXlUPLWAwZxd9NfgsUoIb3s4RMBxv4qFMhnmkAVfcWTsa5n2J9kPrDmnJqNepbXhWx_3ZuVWJlb0ZxSHzFE-VDsu1GqWMqR3-dlJ4Zjau2HeD1ErHN46XGMz7XvTZ6lDPjNpMvKHyeNFwME8VW_y4Dg2yvOKz9CFgDY_A%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=cdbd004f75da4449b31fe351c719aef5&_e=mTzBDfIyq2_PnMJeabQJ0al-zPY7iiP4EIOc_oDdpTiklmaVCGMVjw7Ese_e7Q-xkF8NrVVHQHW7fsTMoXAamX3tssJkfzF3Hugd794JTajkhmBXKa7A_Wk8QKAAxmqIfZWZWmFJxuzLkgmutZnaykIB-aTEg5BjOwdVwm_dJjcpR_9H8MeiRdaWnLAbHiten3Ii73gKSPZjYDHp6oxwtCIO0nzxFPR5fKLO_n-kRmhJ3XWpGsL5yJ4zToTzYzz6uv6TXNLED3IU8B4Ylcusyw%3D%3D)

Shontel Brown for Congress
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tobias Read
subject: “This is the native home of hope”
body:
Today is the 163rd anniversary of Oregon’s admission to the Union as the 33rd state.
---
| | Dear Peter, Today is the 163rd anniversary of Oregon’s admission to the Union as the 33rd state. We’ve been through a lot in that time, and not all of it good. We’ve struggled against ourselves time and again, and Oregon hasn’t always been a great home to equality. But we’ve also shared in the tremendous bounty of our home and have worked together to make it, in my humble opinion, the best state in the country. **[I recorded a short video message for the occasion that I hope you’ll take a look at.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790152/330347877/-803653937?v=_XzqNV_K8M0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTgwNWVmYS1jYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxaiKEw0Ypvnl4pTHWRFMgsDEErnC7Uams2zKtk126I=&emci=a17be5f3-cc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2e805efa-cc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790153/330347878/-803653937?v=_XzqNV_K8M0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTgwNWVmYS1jYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxaiKEw0Ypvnl4pTHWRFMgsDEErnC7Uams2zKtk126I=&emci=a17be5f3-cc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2e805efa-cc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126) Oregon is beautiful, from her rugged coast to the high desert, the mountain lakes to our very own global city of Portland. But so are the people who live here. Oregonians are hardworking and spirited, hardy and innovative, and we are a people with virtually unlimited potential for future greatness despite the obstacles we have yet to overcome. I want to share with you a few words written by Wallace Stegner, sometimes called the Dean of Western Writers, that I hope will resonate with you as they do with me. “One cannot be pessimistic about the West. This is the native home of hope. When it fully learns that cooperation, not rugged individualism, is the quality that most characterizes and preserves it, then it will have achieved itself and outlived its origins.” I, for one, remain hopeful. Stay safe,

---

clean_body: Today is the 163rd anniversary of Oregon’s admission to the Union as the 33rd state. | | Dear Peter, Today is the 163rd anniversary of Oregon’s admission to the Union as the 33rd state. We’ve been through a lot in that time, and not all of it good. We’ve struggled against ourselves time and again, and Oregon hasn’t always been a great home to equality. But we’ve also shared in the tremendous bounty of our home and have worked together to make it, in my humble opinion, the best state in the country. Oregon is beautiful, from her rugged coast to the high desert, the mountain lakes to our very own global city of Portland. But so are the people who live here. Oregonians are hardworking and spirited, hardy and innovative, and we are a people with virtually unlimited potential for future greatness despite the obstacles we have yet to overcome. I want to share with you a few words written by Wallace Stegner, sometimes called the Dean of Western Writers, that I hope will resonate with you as they do with me. “One cannot be pessimistic about the West. This is the native home of hope. When it fully learns that cooperation, not rugged individualism, is the quality that most characterizes and preserves it, then it will have achieved itself and outlived its origins.” I, for one, remain hopeful. Stay safe, * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Join me in supporting Greg Casar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
Real change has always come from the ground up, not the top down. That’s why it’s so important that we elect leaders in Congress who know how to build a grassroots movement for change.
Greg Casar is one of those leaders. As a labor organizer, he knows how to create meaningful change for Texas working families, which is why I’m proud to endorse him in the race for Texas’s 35th Congressional District. With early voting starting TODAY in Texas, can you join me in supporting Greg’s campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-bernie?refcode=02.14_bernie_email]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-bernie?refcode=02.14_bernie_email][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94297/images/bernie.jpeg]Greg has spent his career fighting for progress for working families. As a community organizer, labor leader, and public servant, Greg has taken on powerful interests and delivered results for the people who need it most.
He’s fought to raise wages and guarantee benefits for low-income workers, boosted affordable housing, and defended reproductive rights as they’ve been under assault by right-wing politicians. That’s the kind of leadership we need in this moment.
At a time when millions of families are living paycheck to paycheck, now is the time to elect bold leaders who will fight for a progressive agenda for the working class. With early voting already underway and election day just around the corner, I hope you’ll join me in supporting Greg’s campaign. Chip in now to help elect Greg Casar, a progressive fighter with a bold vision for our future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-bernie?refcode=02.14_bernie_email]
Thank you,
Bernie Sanders

subject: Four years after Parkland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790328/330348749/1641658269?refcode=email-header&code=jtk346-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA1YjZlMS1jZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTqQfsahOmBLQCl815eCVIl4cyzm5cUHQBPA6DrbRe8=)

Peter,

**Four years ago today, 14 children and three staff members were murdered in Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida.****** The tragedy is the single deadliest high school shooting in United States history.

And in the four years since, there has been little to no movement on the effort to ban assault weapons at the federal level. Even AR-15s, the weapon used during the Parkland massacre, are still for sale in most states. [**Peter, will you sign our urgent petition to ban assault weapons?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790330/330348751/689016012?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk346-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA1YjZlMS1jZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTqQfsahOmBLQCl815eCVIl4cyzm5cUHQBPA6DrbRe8=&emci=ee93513b-718b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8e05b6e1-cd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
