The statistics are devastating. **_39,000 people_** in the U.S. die from gun violence every year, _**3 million children**_ are exposed to gun violence yearly, and more than _**292,000 students**_ have experienced gun violence at school since Columbine in 1999. Despite this, we are struggling to pass commonsense legislation that would _save_ lives because we're up against wealthy and powerful interests who would rather hold on to their profits.
**Peter, we’ve lost too many children and loved ones to the gun violence epidemic. Earlier this month, I met with President Biden to discuss the gun violence epidemic that continues to devastate New York and the rest of the country. And that’s why I’ve spent my time as your attorney general working tirelessly to crack down on gun violence and get guns off our streets. But I need the support of every last fearless fighter to continue our work — and our petition closes at midnight. [So please, will you add your name to our crucial petition and demand a BAN on assault weapons?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790332/330348754/689016012?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk346-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA1YjZlMS1jZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTqQfsahOmBLQCl815eCVIl4cyzm5cUHQBPA6DrbRe8=&emci=ee93513b-718b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8e05b6e1-cd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790333/330348755/689016012?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk346-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA1YjZlMS1jZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTqQfsahOmBLQCl815eCVIl4cyzm5cUHQBPA6DrbRe8=&emci=ee93513b-718b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8e05b6e1-cd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)

subject: Early voting starts today
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski
body:
Early voting starts today, February 14. It's go time. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13600198?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=c78b977321&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Since I first launched this campaign 20 months ago, we've had one goal: **to beat Ken Paxton and restore ethics and integrity to the office of Texas Attorney General. **

Over the course of our effort, we've travelled all across our great state, holding over 250 events in over 100 counties. We've reached millions of Texan voters through online video, direct mail, text messaging, and block walking. And we've won high-profile endorsements that prove that we are the campaign prepared to win in November. As a third generation Texas trial lawyer, a grandson of the legendary Watergate Special Prosecutor Leon Jaworski, a former mayor of Galveston, Texas and an international mediator who resolves difficult disputes five days a week, **I am capable, tested and ready for this job**. I intend to fulfill the consequential duties of office with a public servant’s heart, just as when I was mayor of Galveston, TX following Hurricane Ike, and just as I have done for over thirty years in Texas state and federal courts serving large and small businesses, community institutions and people in all walks of life.

**Integrity, experience, and the rule of law will win this election.**

That's why I'm asking for your vote in the Texas Democratic Primary.

**Early voting starts today and continues through February 25. **

To turn Texas blue, we're going to have to show up. I'm doing my best to show up for the people of Texas every day. **All I can ask is that you do the same by casting your vote for me in the Primary.**
Thank you for your support,

Joe Jaworski
---

name: Marco Lopez
subject: personally asking for your help today, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to be one of the 2,500 Election Year Founding Donors we need to defeat GOP extremism this year and flip Arizona's governorship blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
My story is the story of Arizona: I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my parents instilled in me a belief that, if you work hard, anything is possible. I grew up knowing that to be the promise of Arizona – and it's what I'm running to restore.

Throughout my life, I've been blessed to be able to live out that promise, but too few people can say the same. I became mayor of my hometown of Nogales, served in the Obama administration and started a small business to create jobs in the state I love. But thanks to the failed leadership of Republicans like Doug Ducey, thousands of Arizonans have watched our health care and education systems suffer, our democracy face constant threats and our future get darker.
**I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona – to restore the bright future we and our families deserve. Right now we're officially in the election year, so I can't afford a single misstep. That means I need you with me, friend, from the very beginning. So I'm asking personally:**
**[Will you give $5 or more now to become an Election Year Founding Donor to our people-powered movement and guarantee we have what it takes to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790590/330349627/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBkN2M5NS1jZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GPLkxUt8f3Jj9ZLlVl3TT0TuJMh9smGmCt8AGQZ6p5Y=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790591/330349628/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBkN2M5NS1jZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GPLkxUt8f3Jj9ZLlVl3TT0TuJMh9smGmCt8AGQZ6p5Y=)
Becoming an Election Year Founding Donor of our campaign is about more than a donation – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, defend the right to vote and build a state that works for _all_ people.
And here's the thing: It's not just the movement we need – it's a movement we can _win_. POLITICO has called this the most competitive open-seat race of 2022 AND Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says it's a toss-up, which means we have a serious chance of winning. The GOP will spend MASSIVELY to bolster Trump's handpicked candidate, Kari Lake (R), but if we do this right, we can beat them anyway.
We CAN flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make so much progress for all our people – but I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me to make it happen. **So please, I'm counting on your support: [Rush $5 or more now – before our critical midnight deadline – to become an Election Year Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790592/330349629/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBkN2M5NS1jZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GPLkxUt8f3Jj9ZLlVl3TT0TuJMh9smGmCt8AGQZ6p5Y=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790593/330349630/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBkN2M5NS1jZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GPLkxUt8f3Jj9ZLlVl3TT0TuJMh9smGmCt8AGQZ6p5Y=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41790594/330349631/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBkN2M5NS1jZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GPLkxUt8f3Jj9ZLlVl3TT0TuJMh9smGmCt8AGQZ6p5Y=)

subject: Proof that Hillary Clinton Planted the Russia Investigation
disclaimer_text: paid for and authorized by Hillary Clinton
body:
New investigation shows that the Hillary Clinton campaign infiltrated Trump Tower AND the White House | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/18db5fb80fde/proof-that-hillary-clinton-planted-the-russia-investigation?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d58d461878&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

I'm sure you remember the lengths to which Democrats went trying to prove their wild conspiracy that President Trump had colluded with Russia in 2016.

Special Counsel Robert Mueller spent nearly two years on his investigation, only to conclude that there was no collusion.

Now it gets even better. Not only is there no evidence of President Trump ever having colluded with Russia, a new investigation has shown that **[the Hillary Clinton campaign paid to infiltrate Trump Tower and AND take information from White House servers in an attempt to link President Trump to Russia.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7122e6e384&e=fc83fb200d)**

We've always known that the Mueller investigation was a partisan witch-hunt. Now it's beginning to look like a partisan witch-hunt that was paid for and authorized by Hillary Clinton.

I don't know about you, but I've had enough of Democrats who are willing to break laws, hide the truth, and do whatever they think will achieve their political goals.

Our country deserves better, and Virginia deserves better. That's why I'm running for Congress to push back on the insanity of the radical left and give you honest and transparent representation.

I'm excited to oust the Democrats and restore normalcy to Virginia and our country, but I can't do it without your help. **[Will you please consider chipping in with $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to help me take back the 10th District and give you the representation you deserve?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d93836459b&e=fc83fb200d)**

body:
There's no better Valentine's Day gift! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/ar-15-giveaway-extension-5066161?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=93b5ff3ba7&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Dear Patriot:

Here in Arkansas, we support our Second Amendment.

The Regime doesn't give us our freedoms.

_God does._

But our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before from the Left.

**They want to take our guns. They say it every day.

_RINOs like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, are helping them do it by supporting Red Flag gun confiscation._**

They're defunding the police.

They're letting drug dealers, rapists, and murderers go free. George Soros-funded District Attorneys across our country are refusing to enforce the law.

Crime is out of control, and murders are skyrocketing.

**Meanwhile, they want to make sure that normal, decent, patriotic citizens like you and I can't defend ourselves.**

They want to make sure that all we have is a criminal underclass and a totalitarian overclass.

_There has never been more reason to own a gun. You owe it to yourself and, more importantly, to your family._

Be ready to defend them against the predators that the Left is unleashing against all of us.

**I'm giving away a Radical Firearms 16" SOCOM 5.56 AR-15 Rifle.**

[](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=710efbc0ec&e=eda539b26b)

Initially, this was a Christmas giveaway. But, after the Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, I decided to extend it for Valentine's Day--_because there is no better expression of love than to be ready to defend your loved ones._

[_**Enter today for your chance to win!**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=efa6297c0e&e=eda539b26b)

We'll be choosing the winner at random just before Valentine's Day, and you could end up with a brand new AR-15 at your door.

[_**Though contributing is not required in order to win, I'm hoping you'll also chip into my America First campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=dee6405697&e=eda539b26b)[.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=aeea2c99f7&e=eda539b26b)

[_**I need your help to defeat a weak RINO and protect our God-given rights in Washington, so enter my gun giveaway today, and please contribute what you can**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=2739ca89ba&e=eda539b26b)[. ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5cf85a5958&e=eda539b26b)

For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. I'm giving away an AR-15 for Valentine's Day!** [_**Enter for your chance to win, and while you're at it, chip in to support my America First congressional campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e0673588f0&e=eda539b26b)[** _._**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=35e233ba9d&e=eda539b26b)

body:

3. I’m behind my goal of 5,000 donors for the month of February and I cannot afford to fall short.

Red States - like Utah - are being targeted by the Democrats. They know their razon-thin Senate majority is vulnerable and they are doing whatever it takes to win.

No one is safe - including me.

That’s why it’s imperative I hit each and every one of my fundraising goals - to show strength. [**Will you chip in even just $3 before midnight so I can stay on track of my February goal, WIN THIS RACE, and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d5eef0c165414506bad752bf4ffb38da&_e=uYxeYrtX_yTErNVbZXciG23glDTIDwF8x7TLo8myBeHaL9HHNOfexVKVVJ3tk9cUi7PPRXK8fb-ofBLowzVLKIZm9qnTJ0OXy71CxccanUf85OgICYHFAT51p0GLRrE1JGKFCZQUbyrAW8UameNHfYgStXN0vlyIMOg3-tSI3z18j98-Ue4ZvWKaIH8yTNiKpwidSgN1X-x3uRIzWruVv60PkEj95EQ59HlI7wjrfpzvWpm99fh8Ug19dotQIOiJuya-2_gzLcHsUJwnK3OnjLnzmwPA4FwA8j9XfGaCWGdRTErGdbvvdJx0NVo-jeDrFdDvVPVyuChl0DLZy7g9OCp2sEEZ2TUt9-eXDYW4h5IrfGwYXLircAOIwJvs9_jq)

subject: John Selker’s Climate Change Policy Conversation is tomorrow at 7pm!
body:
Reminder: The Policy Conversation with candidate John Selker for Congress starts tomorrow!

Dominique Bachelet continues the series on Tuesday February 15th at 7 pm on Zoom with the topic of Global Climate Change.

Dominique Bachelet and John Selker will discuss climate change issues for our communities. Then the floor opens for you to share your thoughts with John for what is needed here and now and to as him your questions

[REGISTER HERE](https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJwpcu2upz8uH9VP8UrfEuFOtLBBEx6e_mtR) to receive a Zoom link to join the conversation.

See the attached document for more details on registering for the Policy Conversations.

name: Democratic House Majority is in DANGER
subject: we’ll be quick, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
This is really important.

|
---

name: Katie Pavlich
subject: They tried to silence me
body:
If you’ve watched me co-host “The Five” on Fox News or guest co-host “Fox and Friends” then you know I don’t apologize for my conservative values, and I’ll defend my constitutional rights to the hilt. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9562%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kKrwlhukqXobFeF3RsUEbg&sysid=1)
If you’ve watched me co-host “The Five” on Fox News or guest co-host “Fox and Friends” then you know I don’t apologize for my conservative values, and I’ll defend my constitutional rights to the hilt. I’m proud of America... **NOT ASHAMED!** **And, I know since you are reading this, that you aren’t ashamed of America or our values either.** **But there are millions of young people who aren’t provided with the truth about your conservative ideas... ** [**Will you help give these young people the opportunity to hear your conservative ideas?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13464%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r9kbTBfes5BN0D0W%2bOfrLg&sysid=1) It’s easy to see why young people are impressionable to liberal indoctrination. They’re high school and college students in schools where free speech is under constant assault and where political correctness and socialism is pushed in the classroom. Liberals bully students showing interest in your conservative ideas. I should know--just ten years ago I was a young, impressionable student at the University of Arizona. **It didn’t take me long to realize that my teachers didn’t just dislike the conservative values my parents had instilled in me...****_they hated them._** My professors relied on MSNBC and CNN as the “gold standard” when it came to presenting the “truth” in their classes. But I had no idea they’d try to silence my voice until I got involved with a national conservative organization called **Young America’s Foundation (YAF).** With YAF’s support and access to their campus lecture program, I decided to invite conservative author and activist **David Horowitz** to speak on our campus. He had just written a book about “how radical professors at America’s top colleges indoctrinate students and undermine our democracy. “ And I was just about to discover just how right he was. Just two days before the lecture, the school threatened to shut David Horowitz’s lecture down unless our campus group coughed up cash to pay for “security” because administrators had deemed the lecture “controversial.” Meanwhile, leftist activists tore down our signs and posters advertising the event so students wouldn’t know about it. Then, just three hours before the start of the event, the school moved the lecture to a hidden-away classroom in the hopes that no one would show up. Yet, despite every roadblock they threw at us, **the event was a HUGE success.** University of Arizona students got to hear David Horowitz explain why free enterprise and conservatism are the true roots of freedom. **And I learned a valuable lesson: ** **The Left will do anything to prevent young people from hearing conservatives because they know that students who hear the truth about our values will reject socialism.** Oh, you won’t hear much about the threats, violence, and intimidation pointed at conservatives in schools from the mainstream media. But I've witnessed it firsthand. [**And despite the fear and intimidation tactics these radical leftists use in schools, I want you to know YOU can play a pivotal part to ensure more young Americans hear the truth about our conservative values by joining YAF today.**** **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13475%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JD6w54DIaN9WmXiEmAVY2A&sysid=1) **You see, YAF had such an impact on my life that today I’m one of their speakers.** And I personally know how enraged the Left can get when we speak up for commonsense values that used to be taken for granted - such as border security, free enterprise, and traditional family values. For example:
* When I spoke at the university of Wisconsin, radical campus activists protested my speech by committing an obscene act that should have been treated as sexual harassment. Instead, the university ignored protestors, labeled me as “controversial” and imposed a “security fee” on the local YAF chapter.
* And later, at Kennesaw State University in Georgia, campus administrators tried to prevent me from speaking. They claimed I was “controversial,” and campus administrators tried to force the local YAF chapter to pay a heavy handed “security fee” in a clear effort to stifle free speech.

But I’m not the only YAF speaker who’s had to deal with this kind of intimidation. Many other YAF speakers have been disrupted... **and even seriously endangered.** **Ben Shapiro was threatened by a violent Antifa terrorist demonstration, after U.C. Berkeley was forced to allow him to speak after a lawsuit filed by YAF.** The First Amendment says every American deserves to have their voice heard in the public square. Everyone deserves a chance to share their opinion and defend their viewpoints. **_But the Left is terrified of your ideas._** That’s why the Left seeks to SILENCE our voices, instead of debating us. I’ve heard many good people say it’s too late...there’s nothing we can do to stop the Left from indoctrinating young people on college campuses with socialism. **_But it’s simply not true - YAF is living proof we CAN stop them. _** Time and time again, **_YAF has sued campuses who sought to censor conservative speakers and WON_** - ensuring young Americans can hear our shared conservative values and ideas. **Let’s face it - with the far Left firmly in control of our public school system and most colleges, young Americans won’t hear these basic truths unless YAF is there to tell them** And time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students. **[If you want to help recruit the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement, I hope you will make a tax-deductible gift to Young America’s Foundation today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13476%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xFpjYnOTyjKhhvL%2bm0r81w&sysid=1)** Remember, the Left is determined to silence voices like ours in schools across the country. In fact, they tried their best to stop YAF... _Your support of YAF is so important because without your help, they'll succeed and your conservative values WILL BE SILENCED._ **This is simply not a battle we can afford to lose.** We must decide whether our country remains a bastion of freedom or it will be twisted and transformed into a socialist dystopia. The next generation is the key in ensuring that our nation doesn't make the wrong choice. Thank you in advance for you support of this crucial mission. Gratefully, **K atie Pavlich ** _Fox News Contributor_ _New York Times Bestselling Author_ _Editor, Townhall.com_ _Young __America's Foundation Speaker_ [**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13477%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nHrY5DEZgburSrd%2fzMi5%2fQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13478%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QskxvTh91b74v700evEjag&sysid=1) | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13479%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HqwrWCUsl%2foY2u5Z70EK2w&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13470%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fEzSUvE%2fVB74Evw943Y3NQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13471%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TRrfRzvWxXopDS0mHWgPBA&sysid=1)

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker said

body:
Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcqth7pnq7s2qi13fdtu2a38ansg68pga1mgptjg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uqp70tbn6eo64dr3mthn4ohiclr66pjm6aomeobkserj5ctjmsoj6o9ncdp64ptnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcsqr8ptie1j7cp5jc3jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1c5ge6o70shi649fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zofst2iv99imlkbmp1qq915p399vl0p8uf9t6t30_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America’s children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It’s state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2674bp1r8js5bkks3gg26h3h09r27pumjlgpjso_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can’t do any of this without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsevdo6j6sb9mk8fsvm1em78d573q0k913jr7050_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2nhjnokff4q8ge66nogidrnnto1149oi4eppq18_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you’re not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what’s worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we’ve left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it’s easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zar4q5n3cj893a33h553vli4mjt7chqi2avte3kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqg7uvn1a3lq5h274hn7t6atinkjc3l4805v311o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) **_And I have the 3 R’s Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! [**But, friend, we can't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year??**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm006tair53aeoutn5o0f9q97rfp40javc8fv8e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) Now, I’m guessing you’ve never heard of me before... **....But, I’d be willing to bet you’ve heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I’ve had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC’s 3 R’s Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here’s what each of them said: **> >>> Tucker Carlson: "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **> >>> Laura Ingraham: **"For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.: **"The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _"lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [**Please consider helping us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, or $100.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuur24k28hvt9198u4nf29k2utp2harejkdu6p9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) _With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. **And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens.** Sincerely, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpctph6bdmfrhvacgejh4ieudf0v4hb25ur9q0j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3vc3nd60mtvmtj5inu55kti2pg6akc144ff7ui0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0lupj9v6kla654aksqagajh92dp4huc54d83e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjb0hasraqp62611tm97p4jl2ilohjjqqm5u1qs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkl7jge4aamhpdojg411qv3sj0tlnsun52bqpkv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3hm1o74chh2bs)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America’s children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. As I discussed on Tucker Carlson Tonight , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like George Soros have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. . And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you’re not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist. Then, what’s worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we’ve left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it’s easy to feel defeated. But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. Let me introduce myself. And I have the 3 R’s Battle Plan to do just that! Resign: we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. Recall: we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. Replace: We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! Now, I’m guessing you’ve never heard of me before... ....But, I’d be willing to bet you’ve heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. I’ve had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that the 1776 Project PAC’s 3 R’s Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer! Here’s what each of them said: > >>> Tucker Carlson: "Parents have almost no support, but now they do. The 1776 Project PAC is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." > >>> Laura Ingraham: "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the 1776 Project is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." > >>> Donald Trump Jr.: "The 1776 Project is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC. But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC. With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values... And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. | FL-13 Shows Amanda Makki the Love During 2022 Campaign Kickoff!
---
|
Happy Valentine's Day!

I hope you're spending this special day doting on the ones you love!

As you know, we had our official 2022 Campaign Kickoff event at Burrito Social and the turnout was tremendous! I am so honored that over 150 supporters joined us and 6 Pinellas County Republican Mayors rallied supporters for our campaign!

I had the opportunity to meet many new people and catch up with many of you who have been with me throughout this journey. Watch the video below for a peek at the event!

This is just the first of many great events to come this season. If you couldn't make it this time, I hope you'll join me in the future. **We have a[Veterans Town Hall](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c4ef3cdca5&e=c2296cffff) coming up on March 2nd in Largo. **Keep scrolling for more details and to join us!

Amanda Makki

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Will you sign our card for the Fab Four?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41792206/330359708/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220214-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc4NWU1Zi1kNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4chUwMx8YJq-7QdnuZdmrcnAAx1TQhMpfaL69TnpNig=)
---
| Happy Galentine’s Day, Peter!

Galentine’s is a day for gals and pals to come together and celebrate love and friendship.

In that spirit, we want to send a Galentine’s message to Susan and some of her closest friends — fellow Pennsylvania Democratic Reps. Madeleine Dean, Chrissy Houlahan, and Mary Gay Scanlon. [_**Will you join us in signing a card for the Fab Four?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41792207/330359709/-639443975?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc4NWU1Zi1kNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4chUwMx8YJq-7QdnuZdmrcnAAx1TQhMpfaL69TnpNig=&emci=64a2cded-ae8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f8785e5f-d58d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5543981)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41792208/330359710/-639443975?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc4NWU1Zi1kNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4chUwMx8YJq-7QdnuZdmrcnAAx1TQhMpfaL69TnpNig=&emci=64a2cded-ae8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f8785e5f-d58d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5543981)
| [SIGN THE CARD ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41792211/330359711/-639443975?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc4NWU1Zi1kNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4chUwMx8YJq-7QdnuZdmrcnAAx1TQhMpfaL69TnpNig=&emci=64a2cded-ae8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f8785e5f-d58d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5543981)
---
As a bonus, when you sign the card you’ll be able to access an exclusive Galentine’s card to send to your own pals.

Pennsylvania was the largest state without female congressional representation before these gals came together to make sure Pennsylvania women had a voice in the House. As thanks for all the support they show us, we want to send a special message from all of their teams — and that includes you!

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Don’t let your tax dollars fund abortions
body:
Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsb15pv0j1us8dulghaa9lnsookgt515qdkifbpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jm8pj0sph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqbcojm62qb9plkmoo6epbkespndcbi6dj6ed5i6gprfcjjmeq7ap5m6hq36t37mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbd30e9omcc3n6kr3fc5lclp2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpp1dksek4vqi1fj4hdkbqp8rnk6kube8dso4qk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jm8pj0sph2bs) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?

Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone.

[**With your gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today, you can help us stand up to Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer and ensure that you do not have to pay for abortions with your tax dollars.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z29pv741sakagnkalauhnird82js2ncrtg6rcjto_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jm8pj0sph2bs)
[**STOP taxpayer-funded abortions!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj6o24od17jjse0f66tltum2ufk8bt95ncfh8s9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jm8pj0sph2bs)
The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including:
* The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion;
* A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities;
* An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and
* A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs.

According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58 percent of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I and many thousands of other Americans who value life speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn. President Biden’s new proposed federal budget even removed the Hyde Amendment.

You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure that the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations.

[**Will you help with your immediate gift today?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z56pd3bi1rtn828qeo5rccchmov2thlvdlg2kqog_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jm8pj0sph2bs)

Ever since our founding nearly 30 years ago, Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress.

We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well.

But now, the situation has become much more urgent. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and President Biden have full control of our government. Pro-life Americans are once again on defense. And the pro-abortion Left is moving more aggressively than ever to direct our tax dollars to fund the abortion industry.

It is critical that we shore up every ounce of pro-life support we can muster to protect the Hyde Amendment until we can reestablish a pro-life majority in Congress next November. With your support, FRC Action can lead the charge, as we have for nearly three decades.

Your gift today will enable us to continue rallying support for the Hyde Amendment and pro-life policy on Capitol Hill. It will fund consistent outreach to our nationwide network of pastors and faith leaders. It will help us continue raising awareness about the clear and present threat to the Hyde Amendment.

And it will enable us to hold the line against taxpayer-funded abortion when it matters most!

[**Please help us fight back against President Joe Biden, Speaker Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Schumer, and their pro-abortion allies today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmq3pj0orgulbjn80a9gjbf1fupietivu93vmig8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jm8pj0sph2bs)
[**STOP taxpayer-funded abortions!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zre8a3lfk0a9gssbbqbe7r3bg891invkedj2ce08_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jm8pj0sph2bs)
Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election.

clean_body: Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions? | | Dear fellow American, Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions? Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone. The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including: The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion; A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities; An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs. According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58 percent of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I and many thousands of other Americans who value life speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn. President Biden’s new proposed federal budget even removed the Hyde Amendment. You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure that the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations. Ever since our founding nearly 30 years ago, Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress. We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well. But now, the situation has become much more urgent. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and President Biden have full control of our government. Pro-life Americans are once again on defense. And the pro-abortion Left is moving more aggressively than ever to direct our tax dollars to fund the abortion industry. It is critical that we shore up every ounce of pro-life support we can muster to protect the Hyde Amendment until we can reestablish a pro-life majority in Congress next November. With your support, FRC Action can lead the charge, as we have for nearly three decades. Your gift today will enable us to continue rallying support for the Hyde Amendment and pro-life policy on Capitol Hill. It will fund consistent outreach to our nationwide network of pastors and faith leaders. It will help us continue raising awareness about the clear and present threat to the Hyde Amendment. And it will enable us to hold the line against taxpayer-funded abortion when it matters most! Thank you, and God bless! For America, Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin Executive Vice President Family Research Council Action | FRC Action 801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001 Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election. body:
* * *

[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_e&n=1) | Dear Friend, For twenty years I led as a pro jobs, pro-choice Democrat proudly serving the people of Northwest Oregon in the legislature. **Today, I’m officially the people’s candidate for Governor.** On Friday, I pulled out my phone and with a couple clicks on the Secretary of State website, I joined the 991,360 Oregonians who are unaffiliated with any party. That's a lot of us. While my party label may be different, my bedrock values remain the same. I’m running and will serve as an independent leader, loyal only to the people of Oregon. Because only the people, not the broken political parties, can rescue Oregon from the failures of Kate Brown, Ted Wheeler and Tina Kotek. | | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
AZ-04 congressional candidate Tanya Contreras Wheeless continues to hit the campaign trail with a jam-packed schedule. Tanya has had a great time meeting so many of you while knocking doors with her team and at events around the district. Tanya wants to get out and speak with as many of you as possible and our team is always looking for invitations. If you would like to invite Tanya to meet with your group or would like to volunteer at a future event, please reply to this email.

**Roses are red. Violets are blue. Tanya is fighting for the East Valley and to win we need you. Happy Valentine’s Day!**

We need to get as many petition signatures as possible to get Tanya on the ballot, as well as to show the Democrats that we mean business by blowing past our signature total goal.

If you haven't signed Tanya's petition yet, you can sign it [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=646854d9b4&e=bd2b55b0e3). Please forward this email to friends, family, and neighbors and ask them to sign as well.

If you have any questions about petitions, reach out to our team by replying to this email or texting or calling us at 480-420-7822.
---

Hi friend,
Mondaire reached out yesterday asking you to contribute before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline and help protect his seat in November’s election.

Let’s work together to keep up the energy as we fight to defend Mondaire’s seat and our Democratic majority in Congress. = Thank you for your continued support, Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Jim DeMint
subject: The Genocide Olympics
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Ever since China was awarded the 2022 Winter Olympics, we knew it was going to be bad. But this bad?
The opening ceremony was a Hollywood-produced commercial for Beijing's communist dictatorship. You know, the tyrants who just:
▶︎ Unleashed a lethal pandemic on the world;
▶︎ Kidnapped a Chinese tennis star for speaking out; and,
▶︎ Is conducting ethnic cleansing against their Uighur minority.
This would be bad enough to have sit through. But America's woke, corporate Left is adding insult to injury:
▶︎ NBC embarrassed itself by parroting Chinese propaganda about the Uighur genocide.
▶︎ Nancy Pelosi urged brave athletes not to speak out against China's human rights atrocities.
▶︎ The head of the International Olympic Committee urged silence, too, because speaking up could - gasp - end the Olympics.
▶︎ And of course, the entire event is being financed by U.S. corporations. Olympic advertisers and partners are trying to keep a lower profile this year, but the truth is the truth: the Genocide Olympics have U.S. corporate sponsorship.
Help Americans wake up to the dangers of Woke Capital by supporting CPI today!
Sadly, it gets worse.
A new report just found that Big Tech's alliance with China is deeper than we ever realized. Silicon Valley isn't just outsourcing jobs, they're helping Beijing develop new military and public surveillance technologies.
This is the fruit of the Left's anti-Americanism: U.S. corporations helping China murder its own citizens and threaten the United States, and being given cover for it by American television networks and reporters. This isn't the free market - it's the capture of the market by a
foreign adversary and the global corporations in its pocket.
CPI is leading the fight against Big Tech corruption, but we need your support.
CPI's Digital Defense Initiative has been leading the conservative charge against Big Tech. We're working with leaders in the House, Senate, and around the country to shine a light on their monopolies, politics, and corruption.
Big Tech is a threat to American freedom. They are censoring our speech, silencing our leaders, twisting the news, rigging our elections, and spying on us 24/7 - kind of like their pals in Beijing.
Conservatives must be prepared to take them on and if necessary, break them up. The Left has chosen their side - we have to do the same, or liberty will have no champions.
Please help Americans defeat Big Tech tyranny by supporting CPI's Digital Defense Initiative today.
At CPI we will fight for your freedom, and everyone else's, as long as it takes. When we chant U-S-A!, U-S-A!, it's not just for our athletes. It's for our country and the ideals on which it was founded.
Together, conservatives will restore them to Washington and defend them everywhere in the world.

For Freedom,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

 

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 FaxCPI.org

SUPPORT CPI

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

name: Team Holly
subject: LOVE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: I know the struggles Colorado families face
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41780887/330305574/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214mm2rs_dyc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUyOWY5Ni1hZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RquW3I828GSH3vY4pw8HO4JNsd3XCbRrwVC-iJK2Zo=)
---
Hello, Peter — My team sent you an email the other day about the extreme right figures we’re up against. And look, the things these people say and do every day are genuinely scary. Anti-vax, anti-choice, anti-worker, anti-democracy... it feels like there’s no end to it. But I know that it’s not enough to just be _against_ these people. So before I ask you to [**chip in to our critical $15,000 end-of-month goal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41780888/330305578/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214mm2rs_dyc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUyOWY5Ni1hZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RquW3I828GSH3vY4pw8HO4JNsd3XCbRrwVC-iJK2Zo=), I want to tell you about the work I’ve done — and will do — for Coloradans. I’m running for Congress to build on my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado’s 8th District: in my pediatrics practice, in the halls of the state capitol, and at community gatherings with neighbors, friends, and family. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41780889/330305603/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214mm2rs_dyc_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUyOWY5Ni1hZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RquW3I828GSH3vY4pw8HO4JNsd3XCbRrwVC-iJK2Zo=)
---
As a practicing pediatrician, I’ve seen how badly our healthcare system needs reform. And I’ve used my unique perspective to pass bills in the state legislature that lower insurance costs and increase access to the quality care that so many families lack.
I was in high school when my mom became a U.S. citizen, and we voted together for the first time in the 2000 presidential elections (for Al Gore, of course). In my first legislative election, I saw voters bring their young children to translate for them at the polls — so as soon as I became the representative for HD-34, I championed legislation to increase voter turnout and access by expanding access to multilingual ballots.
In Congress, I will fight tirelessly to make underrepresented communities like my own a part of the civic process at a time when extremists are actively working to exclude us from making our voices heard.
**But there are only so many things I can do as a state legislator.** My parents taught me to always jump in to help without being asked, and when this seat was created, I knew I had to step up.
**As you probably know by now, this election for CO-08 is going to be extremely tight, and we need to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to keep pace with everything the GOP throws at us.[Can you pitch in $25 or more to help us hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41780890/330305637/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214mm2rs_dyc_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUyOWY5Ni1hZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RquW3I828GSH3vY4pw8HO4JNsd3XCbRrwVC-iJK2Zo=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---

clean_body: | = Hello, Peter — My team sent you an email the other day about the extreme right figures we’re up against. And look, the things these people say and do every day are genuinely scary. Anti-vax, anti-choice, anti-worker, anti-democracy... it feels like there’s no end to it. But I know that it’s not enough to just be against these people. So before I ask you to =, I want to tell you about the work I’ve done — and will do — for Coloradans. I’m running for Congress to build on my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado’s 8th District: in my pediatrics practice, in the halls of the state capitol, and at community gatherings with neighbors, friends, and family. | = As a practicing pediatrician, I’ve seen how badly our healthcare system needs reform. And I’ve used my unique perspective to pass bills in the state legislature that lower insurance costs and increase access to the quality care that so many families lack. I was in high school when my mom became a U.S. citizen, and we voted together for the first time in the 2000 presidential elections (for Al Gore, of course). In my first legislative election, I saw voters bring their young children to translate for them at the polls — so as soon as I became the representative for HD-34, I championed legislation to increase voter turnout and access by expanding access to multilingual ballots. In Congress, I will fight tirelessly to make underrepresented communities like my own a part of the civic process at a time when extremists are actively working to exclude us from making our voices heard. But there are only so many things I can do as a state legislator. My parents taught me to always jump in to help without being asked, and when this seat was created, I knew I had to step up. As you probably know by now, this election for CO-08 is going to be extremely tight, and we need to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to keep pace with everything the GOP throws at us.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am writing to ask you to make a $3 contribution to help me fight to change our gun laws. Especially today. Please.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Four years ago, the morning announcements at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida included the daily affirmation, “Life supports me in every way possible.”
#

Friends -
Four years ago, the morning announcements at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida included the daily affirmation, “Life supports me in every way possible.”
There was a Valentine's Day reminder to all students that “love has many definitions, but abuse isn’t one of them.”
Hours later, we all watched in horror as terrified children were raced out of school with their hands in the air as police raced toward the school, toward the shooting happening inside.
We saw the images of the parents in parking lots crying, desperate for information about their kids.
Years later, our thoughts and our prayers remain with the families and friends of those who lost loved ones on that day. But the truth is, for those who have had the power to act since that day, their thoughts and prayers are not nearly enough.
It is hard to imagine that Congress has accepted the horrific acts of that day, and the many school shootings since, as something that we as a society have to accept—that we have to live with as just something that happens here in America.
But the truth is, we do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine, and we must never stop demanding that our leaders not only acknowledge the tragic realities of gun violence in America, but that they take long overdue action to keep our children and our communities safe.
Congress knows how to solve this problem.
They can decide to protect our children in their classrooms, in their communities, and on their way to school.
Or they can continue to do nothing.
But make no mistake, it is a choice.
At Giffords, we are going to keep fighting until we have a Congress that decides it wants to take action to make our communities safer from gun violence. But I cannot do that alone:
[**Can you please make a contribution—$3 or whatever you can afford—to help me continue the fight to make our communities, and our children, safer from gun violence in this country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220214-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1560_3935704_JAquCm&akid=1560%2E3935704%2EJAquCm)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220214-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1560_3935704_JAquCm&akid=1560%2E3935704%2EJAquCm)**

| | Happy Valentine’s Day, Peter. Believe it or not, this is my 18th year with Jasmine as my valentine, and these days that means starting the morning with heart-shaped pancakes for the kids and celebrating tonight with a Valentine’s Volcano cake that Cal, Wyatt, and Jasmine made. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793557/330365272/1978205994?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220214_FR_ValentinesDay_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTcxY2I3Ny1kYThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EopPUZ1zq_SCfL0NrGJFwCQGqX_dI2amJFxceTmfhHw=) We fought hard for our right to marry each other, and there is nothing I am more proud of today than our family. Now, as a family, we are all in on Jasmine’s campaign. I truly believe she is going to bring the leadership that WNC deserves to Congress. body:
| Hi Peter, I hope you’ll let me borrow a moment of your time this Valentine’s Day to introduce myself — my name is Cynthia, and I’m Phil Arballo’s wife. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793734/330365924/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220214_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWYyMzQyOC1kYjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HfCPkBRX58cyo2tWa8n7lODPSQiBJy5d4T0kv5dm3YQ=) _Here we are on our wedding day over 8 years ago!_ My husband is running for Congress in California to fight for the future of working families just like ours. [**So today, I’m asking you to contribute $3 to our campaign, then keep reading why Phil has what it takes to turn this open, battleground seat blue:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793735/330365925/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220214_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWYyMzQyOC1kYjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HfCPkBRX58cyo2tWa8n7lODPSQiBJy5d4T0kv5dm3YQ=) | [Please, click here to chip in $3 today! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793736/330365926/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220214_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWYyMzQyOC1kYjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HfCPkBRX58cyo2tWa8n7lODPSQiBJy5d4T0kv5dm3YQ=)

I’ve known Phil for a long time, and he’s never had anything handed to him.

He worked minimum wage jobs to make ends meet as the first to attend college in his family. He built his small business from the ground up and committed his time to serving our community.

In 2020, he came just short of defeating Republican Devin Nunes — and now, Phil is running again to deliver the people‐first representation families like ours desperately need.

**Phil is a dedicated father to our two children, and he’s working hard to make sure they,_and families like ours across California_ , have a bright future ahead of them.**

[**With Phil in Congress, I know our kids, our communities, and our democracy will be well‐represented with a strong Latino voice. But we can’t get there without you, Peter. So this Valentine’s Day, I count on your $3 donation toward Phil’s $25,000 mid‐month fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793737/330365927/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220214_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWYyMzQyOC1kYjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HfCPkBRX58cyo2tWa8n7lODPSQiBJy5d4T0kv5dm3YQ=)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Don’t let your tax dollars fund abortions
body:
Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zklmjets0vup92effbfsmnhq1h58ve72gpevprk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfepdkshhjfdr1mdp63cb6mdgj8t32ear36dr7c1ge4pjgcpp79oli6qon6oj7m3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddkc1p76phge2pm8dtgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrvfmg2d3tqkfobgcajb6a7uvv30v9qk8ehb0mp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh2bs) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?

Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone.

[**With your gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today, you can help us stand up to Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer and ensure that you do not have to pay for abortions with your tax dollars.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0r9a80d3slvj2hudd0it5r7vua97eelpjpnje9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh2bs)
[**STOP taxpayer-funded abortions!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z19plbocqbrenqak6h4saojvtdt82924n8hcbrs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh2bs)
The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including:
* The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion;
* A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities;
* An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and
* A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs.

According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58 percent of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I and many thousands of other Americans who value life speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn. President Biden’s new proposed federal budget even removed the Hyde Amendment.

You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure that the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations.

[**Will you help with your immediate gift today?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgll5kj0anh18eh33eoai9u689v3fp9e4oljlco8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh2bs)

Ever since our founding nearly 30 years ago, Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress.

We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well.

But now, the situation has become much more urgent. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and President Biden have full control of our government. Pro-life Americans are once again on defense. And the pro-abortion Left is moving more aggressively than ever to direct our tax dollars to fund the abortion industry.

It is critical that we shore up every ounce of pro-life support we can muster to protect the Hyde Amendment until we can reestablish a pro-life majority in Congress next November. With your support, FRC Action can lead the charge, as we have for nearly three decades.

Your gift today will enable us to continue rallying support for the Hyde Amendment and pro-life policy on Capitol Hill. It will fund consistent outreach to our nationwide network of pastors and faith leaders. It will help us continue raising awareness about the clear and present threat to the Hyde Amendment.

And it will enable us to hold the line against taxpayer-funded abortion when it matters most!

[**Please help us fight back against President Joe Biden, Speaker Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Schumer, and their pro-abortion allies today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z483bqdiq04ldnsaij8qpmbjg7f5pp437stg5iv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh2bs)
[**STOP taxpayer-funded abortions!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhp75a29qtf1e0jcunn2ghqrdbvsto06ab02vafo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh2bs)
Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election.

[Privacy Policy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z539jepl9lcpfe0qfvni0guu891r7m942ahvnu4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zupj8p0lbb3irkgj1spc01nd69ovffc279ktal28).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2b6ddpv9ltc009jrqiafdq9a3kii9pt6c7c78f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmcpj2clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
