body:
I am inspired by the courageous activism of the student survivors who have become national gun violence activists in the immediate aftermath of experiencing such trauma.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793862/330366495/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220214-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220214-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220214&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=5bf19c8d-dc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYxOWM4ZC1kYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KxKUeBXjqMJhkrSqucDGBEFrEBt0XJe8P5cUCJH1TtY=)
---
| As we reflect on the four years that have passed since the tragic school shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, **I am inspired by the courageous activism of the student survivors who have become national gun violence activists in the immediate aftermath of experiencing such trauma. ** Across the nation and here in Maryland, diverse groups of young people are stepping up, walking out, sitting in, raising their voices, and working together to make real positive change. **Schools should be a safe place for our students, and we owe it to our kids to deliver on the promise of a brighter future where every kid can feel safe at school. ** But to do so, we need more effective gun laws in our state and that starts with the banning of ghost guns. I have spent years working to protect our children and fighting to end the scourge of gun violence through my work as an educator and on the board of Marylanders to Prevent Gun Violence, and I am committed to continuing that work as the next governor of our state. **In 2019, I penned an op-ed with Jaxon O’Mara, the head of March For Our Lives in Maryland and a former student of Great Mills High School, to call for stronger gun laws here in Maryland.** We came together – one of us a traumatized student, one of us an educator who has lost students to gun violence – to write this piece in the Baltimore Sun, and I hope you will take a moment to read it and learn more about the ways in which we can make schools safer and protect our kids’ future. | [READ THE ARTICLE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793863/330366496/-216518613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYxOWM4ZC1kYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KxKUeBXjqMJhkrSqucDGBEFrEBt0XJe8P5cUCJH1TtY=&emci=889d3a30-dc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5bf19c8d-dc8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
In the words of my oldest daughter Amina in the midst of her high school activism around gun violence: “Sometimes, we might seem a little hopeless, but those are in the moments when we feel the tragedies going on, and we see how much of a change is needed." Tragedies like those at Marjory Stoneman Douglas and Great Mills High School cannot be the status quo.
**Maryland’s future, our kids’ future, depends on our actions. We owe it to them to march toward equity and justice because if we fall short, we will have failed their future.**
Thank you for reading and for being a part of this movement,
John King

**A statement from President Trump, Chairman of TMTG**
Facebook and Big Tech are seeking to destroy the Freedom Convoy of Truckers. The Freedom Convoy is peacefully protesting the harsh policies of far left lunatic Justin Trudeau who has destroyed Canada with insane Covid mandates. Now, thankfully, the Freedom Convoy could be coming to DC with American Truckers who want to protest Biden’s ridiculous Covid policies. Facebook is canceling the accounts of Freedom Convoy USA, and GoFundMe is denying access to funds that belong to the Freedom Convoy. This is unacceptable and extremely dangerous in any country that values free expression. TruthSocial is announcing today that we are welcoming the Freedom Convoy with open arms to communicate freely on TruthSocial when we launch – coming very soon! TruthSocial will fight back against Big Tech so we can protect our rights to free expression. Also, on top of everything, it is big news that Facebook daily users went down for the first time ever, people are tired of biased social media like Twitter and Facebook, and it’s showing in their numbers!

Folks – Donald Trump’s Republicans tried to GUT $25 BILLION out of Social Security.

_If Republicans regain power, one of the first things they’ll do is come after this important program._

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Have you heard about Jeff Bezos’s latest stunt?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Ultra-millionaires and billionaires like Jeff Bezos make it clear every single day how much a wealth tax could do for the future of our country. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794230/330367839/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3M_WTX_E_20220214_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3YWI2ZS1kZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wg-MRQda_VRE7rVf7iicl4F6dtccgu-YPICYHD-XA2Y=&emci=68396b68-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3907ab6e-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
Ultra-millionaires and billionaires like Jeff Bezos make it clear every single day how much a wealth tax could do for the future of our country. Bezos’s latest stunt? His brand-new, 417-foot superyacht is too massive to pass underneath a historic Dutch bridge, so it looks like they’re going to have to dismantle the bridge at his bidding. That’s a doozy of a sentence. _417-foot superyachts? Dutch bridges?_ I totally get that Jeff Bezos can do whatever he wants with his money. But using his enormous wealth in such gaudy ways after years of systematically paying less than his fair share in taxes — he paid literally nothing in federal income taxes in 2007 and 2011 — is a blatant gut punch to the tens of millions of Americans who pay what they owe while struggling to make ends meet. **Here’s the way I see it: If someone can afford a yacht big enough that it calls for tearing down a bridge, that someone can also afford to pay his fair share of taxes to invest in things like building bridges, repairing roads, and ensuring universal child care. No questions asked.** [_**Add your name if you agree it’s time for a wealth tax that makes ultra-millionaires and billionaires like Jeff Bezos finally pay their fair share.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794231/330367840/1746648611?refcode=EMZ3M_WTX_E_20220214_V1S1&ms=EMZ3M_WTX_E_20220214_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3YWI2ZS1kZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wg-MRQda_VRE7rVf7iicl4F6dtccgu-YPICYHD-XA2Y=&emci=68396b68-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3907ab6e-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Jeff Bezos isn’t the only ultra-wealthy person to recently indulge in an oversized boat — in fact, superyacht sales jumped by 77 percent last year. Contrast that number with the 84 percent of parents who said in a September 2021 survey that they’re overwhelmed by the cost of child care. I don’t think we need much more proof that our economy has worked better and better for the rich and powerful, and worse and worse for everyone else. **A wealth tax is powerfully important in our fight to level the playing field.** Our plan calls for a two-cent-per-dollar tax on people with a net worth above $50 million, and just a few cents more for the billionaires. That small tax would generate revenue totaling at least $3 trillion, funds that can go such a long way in dismantling the systemic opportunity gaps that have long persisted in this country. [_**These ultra-millionaires and billionaires could stand to spare a few cents and give everyone else a chance. Add your name to support our plan for a wealth tax, and help build the grassroots support that we’ll need from across the country to pass it in Washington.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794232/330367841/1746648611?refcode=EMZ3M_WTX_E_20220214_V1S1&ms=EMZ3M_WTX_E_20220214_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3YWI2ZS1kZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wg-MRQda_VRE7rVf7iicl4F6dtccgu-YPICYHD-XA2Y=&emci=68396b68-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3907ab6e-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

| **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794233/330367842/1746648611?refcode=EMZ3M_WTX_E_20220214_V1S1&ms=EMZ3M_WTX_E_20220214_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3YWI2ZS1kZDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wg-MRQda_VRE7rVf7iicl4F6dtccgu-YPICYHD-XA2Y=&emci=68396b68-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3907ab6e-dd8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)**

body:
| | | **Republicans and Democrats are TIED in the polls**

**[I'm personally asking you to become a 2022 Democratic Member before midnight tomorrow. Forgive me for emailing again, but I'm up against my Mid Month Deadline in 24 hours. We're in serious danger of being outraised by Republicans in the fight for the Majority. Our polling margins are RAZOR-THIN, and I will not allow the likes of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy to barge back into power. I'm calling for THREE Democrats from your area to step up. Please, can I count on you to rush in $3? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)
2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---
* * *

The race for the House Majority is neck-and-neck. And I could not be more grateful for the strong Democrats who have stepped up to protect our Majority against the GOP's schemes (thank you!):

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)

But I'll be blunt: We're at serious risk of being outraised by Republicans and their GIANT war chest.

I'm calling for your immediate help before my Mid Month Deadline to OUTRAISE Republicans and ensure Democrats have the resources to DEFEND our House Majority.

I'm short just $175,000, so I'm asking you personally: **Will you contribute even just $5 before it is too late?**

I want to pull back the curtain and explain why my Democratic Members are so important.

**1.** Trump hinted he'll **run for President** if Republicans flip the House.
**2.** Republicans and Democrats are currently **TIED in the polls.**
**3.** And Kevin McCarthy just lined up **$9.5 MILLION** to give Republicans the edge.

****[I could really use your help. Will you send in any amount to defend our House Majority before time runs out on my Mid Month Deadline in just 24 hours? I can't tell you how much I'm relying on your help to break this tie, push my Democrats into the lead, and SAVE our Majorities from falling into Republican hands. I'm calling for just 8,750 grassroots gifts to close the gap before it's too late. Could you rush in $3 straight away? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****

[_**We’re relying on grassroots support to run this campaign. name: Nick from Team Tom
subject: The elephant in the room
body:
This year’s political climate is going to be challenging for Democrats – and we need you.
#

Hi team,

Did you see this news from POLITICO?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794363/330368446/-618653280?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220214-RedToBlue-1-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWYzYTk0MC1kZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uPgttO5aPC5_ai1_lRPIH-b8OI6ruAnbOrcIoMOJsXs=)
We can't ignore the elephant in the room – this year's political climate is going to be challenging for Democrats. We're defending our majorities in Congress and looking to flip governor's offices from red to blue across the country – including right here in Maryland.

Maryland is Democrats' best chance to flip a governor's office anywhere in the country, and momentum is on Tom's side to seize the opportunity. But this primary is _crowded._ We need to hit every single one of our fundraising goals to get to Annapolis, and right now, **we're a little behind.**

**_[Tom needs your help. We've set a goal to raise $5,200 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track toward our February fundraising goal. Can you rush $5 now to power his campaign through the primary all the way to Annapolis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794364/330368447/-618653280?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220214-RedToBlue-1-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWYzYTk0MC1kZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uPgttO5aPC5_ai1_lRPIH-b8OI6ruAnbOrcIoMOJsXs=)_**

Team, this race is about more than just reclaiming a seat. It's about pushing Maryland forward on key issues like jobs, justice, and equal opportunity to make sure _every single Marylander_ can succeed – regardless of ZIP code. Tom's more committed than ever to bringing this progressive change our country needs to Maryland,**but he can't win this race alone.**

We rely on donations from grassroots donors like you to connect with voters in every corner of the state, put ads on the air, run polls in the field to refine our strategy, and hire staff. **In a race as crowded as this, your $5 could quite literally be the difference between winning and losing.**

**_[Will you please donate $5 or whatever you can to help flip Maryland from red to blue and send Tom to Annapolis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794371/330368454/-618653280?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220214-RedToBlue-1-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWYzYTk0MC1kZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uPgttO5aPC5_ai1_lRPIH-b8OI6ruAnbOrcIoMOJsXs=)_**

Nick

clean_body: This year’s political climate is going to be challenging for Democrats – and we need you. Hi team, Did you see this news from POLITICO? = We can't ignore the elephant in the room – this year's political climate is going to be challenging for Democrats. We're defending our majorities in Congress and looking to flip governor's offices from red to blue across the country – including right here in Maryland. Maryland is Democrats' best chance to flip a governor's office anywhere in the country, and momentum is on Tom's side to seize the opportunity. But this primary is crowded. We need to hit every single one of our fundraising goals to get to Annapolis, and right now, we're a little behind. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Team, this race is about more than just reclaiming a seat. It's about pushing Maryland forward on key issues like jobs, justice, and equal opportunity to make sure every single Marylander can succeed – regardless of ZIP code. Tom's more committed than ever to bringing this progressive change our country needs to Maryland,but he can't win this race alone. We rely on donations from grassroots donors like you to connect with voters in every corner of the state, put ads on the air, run polls in the field to refine our strategy, and hire staff. In a race as crowded as this, your $5 could quite literally be the difference between winning and losing. = Thank you, Nick ****=** Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

| | Today is Oregon's 163rd birthday — our statehood day. I'm telling you this because I absolutely love Oregon! And I don't just mean the beautiful landscape, the rivers, forests, mountains, and beaches. **I love the**** _people_****of Oregon.** Smart, engaged, progressive, and future-oriented. Here in Oregon, we're always looking ahead and trying to make things better. **I love fighting for the people of Oregon because I know that real change is possible if we work for it.[Donate today and join our grassroots movement for progressive change. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794471/330368945/362153935?refcode=2022-02-14-loveoregon&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9442421a-df8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDQyNDIxYS1kZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3zZjRAiWBKJONJx_aUyh4MinN4TMsOl2hFUnWiKXdl0=)** I've spent my adult life working to create better lives for all Oregonians. I've helped pass the most progressive reproductive freedom legislation in the country, worked to raise the minimum wage, held big pharma accountable – helping to lower prescription drug prices. I helped expand family leave for all Oregonians, addressed harassment in the workplace, and led in the fight to decarbonize Oregon. **Why? name: Angela Angel
subject: Be my Valentine 💘
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794482/330369146/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ0NDQ1YS1kZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7HMPXsvDj-Z2Cjj0DJ6wE5d20TS943mrElRvpYtEwU=&emci=343279a4-af8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=88d4445a-df8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825)
---
Happy Valentine's Day, friend!

As much as I love roses, chocolates, and handmade cards, folks, I love this district even more.

That's why I'm asking for a different kind of Valentine's Day gift this year.

While candies and candlelit dinners are nice, you know what's even better? Affordable health care for all, high-quality education for every child, paid family leave, and protecting reproductive rights.

This Valentine's Day, I'm not asking for cards or candy. [**I am asking you to join The A-Team so we can make these transformational changes a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794483/330369147/1465103901?refcode=em22_220214_MMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ0NDQ1YS1kZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7HMPXsvDj-Z2Cjj0DJ6wE5d20TS943mrElRvpYtEwU=)

Back in December, I launched this campaign on the premise that we need our government to have diverse representation and listen to all constituents' needs – because it's always been the support of this community that has helped guide me.

In a country where so many things are up in the air, I know one thing's for sure: Empowering our community and leaning on one another is how we achieve great things.

**[Togetherness is my love language, and I’m so excited for us to make it across the finish line hand in hand. So please, if you’re able, chip in $1 to be a Valentine's Day donor, and let's build something great together>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794484/330369148/1465103901?refcode=em22_220214_MMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ0NDQ1YS1kZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7HMPXsvDj-Z2Cjj0DJ6wE5d20TS943mrElRvpYtEwU=)** [DONATE $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794485/330369149/1465103901?refcode=em22_220214_MMFR&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ0NDQ1YS1kZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7HMPXsvDj-Z2Cjj0DJ6wE5d20TS943mrElRvpYtEwU=) [DONATE OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41794486/330369150/1465103901?refcode=em22_220214_MMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQ0NDQ1YS1kZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7HMPXsvDj-Z2Cjj0DJ6wE5d20TS943mrElRvpYtEwU=) Wishing you all the love this Valentine's Day,

name: Team Lira
subject: Early Vote starts TODAY
body:
Peter, it’s time! That’s right, early voting is starting TODAY.
We want to make sure you have everything you need to get out and vote over these next few weeks, so we wanted to share some resources on voting in the TX-23 primaries with you!
Fast Facts
* Feb 14-25 is Early Voting
*
Feb
18
is
the
last
day
to
apply
for
a
mail-in
ballot
*
March
1
is
the
deadline
to
return
your
mail-in
ballot

To find a polling place, make sure you’re registered to vote, check voting ID requirements, and more, take a look at this 2022 Texas Election Guide! [https://www.texastribune.org/2022/01/17/texas-primary-election-2022-voter-guide/]
The next two weeks of voting could put us in a healthy lead — a lead we need — if we are able to turn out the early vote and get John’s message in front of as many Texans as possible.
Time is running out to make sure that we are able to share not just John’s values and vision of a future with solid voter protection rights, immigration reform, and affordable healthcare — but also to make sure that Texans know how, where, and when to vote in the primaries.
This year a record number of people are registered to vote in Texas — that’s great news! Now we just need to make sure that they come out to vote so we can get real leaders like John in office.
With so much riding on the outcome of this race, we need to hit the ground running before February 14th. Can you make a donation now to help us reach more Texans on the ground and online before early voting begins? We don't have much time so we need to get going! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220214?refcode=em20220214]
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220214?refcode=em20220214]We have our work cutout for us and we need all the support we can get over the next two weeks in making sure voters show up for John at the ballot box!
That’s why we need your help — can we count on your support for John as early voting kicks off? Whether that’s sharing voting resources or making a donation, every little bit counts!
Click here to find your polling place and double check ID requirements, then share this resource guide with your neighbors to make sure we get as many Texans to the polls as possible between NOW and February 25! [http://www.texastribune.org/2022/01/17/texas-primary-election-2022-voter-guide/]
Once you’ve done that, help fuel our push during early voting! Click here to make a donation right now to help give John a head start before the primary. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220214?refcode=em20220214]
Show Lira Some Love!
Team Lira
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220202?refcode=em20220202]https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.
Email is the most important way we keep in touch with our supporters. But, if you'd you need to remove yourself from our email list, you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f3aa1392-da8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/3537da21-e08d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTM3ZGEyMS1lMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=siefnsxJeTC50jeN1VEIrGMYRtBvKoSXBLb3tu8N7iQ=&id=129132840

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: Friend, could I get your input on a few things?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend - checking to make sure you saw my message. **Our campaign is scaling up our operation now that we 're officially in the election year**, which is why I need all hands on deck from this grassroots team. However, we're still 592 responses short of our new election year survey goal.
---
Hearing what's on YOUR mind is essential to building a laser-focused campaign strategy that will protect Democratic Senate control and deliver progress for the people of our great nation. **[So please, with my next strategy meeting tomorrow, can you please make sure you've submitted your feedback? Click here to take our election-year focus group (only takes about 45 seconds!) right now.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-feb-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1141-su-nd)**
Thanks,
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Sat, Feb 12, 2022
Subject: Friend, could I get your input on a few things?

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=k8uB0WKbNNJaI%2BByEntbKdImbKFK54kG&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
This is important: We're in the thick of an election year, and a new Republican opponent just entered the race to flip my seat.
With the entire GOP establishment beholden to the disgraced and dangerous former president, Donald Trump, we can't afford to hand Senate control back to the GOP - **but with the Senate split 50-50, we have zero margin for error.**
**That 's why my campaign is scaling up its operations to keep this seat. And I'm asking you to share your feedback right away - because I can only win this race with direct input from people like you.**
[**So please: Will you take a few moments to let me know what issues matter most to you? It only takes a few moments, and your input is essential to keeping me current on your priorities so I can do my best to fight for them and for you.** ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-feb-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1141-su-nd)
I know I speak frequently about Senate control and what's at stake, but it's because I've seen the harm and obstruction of a Mitch McConnell-led GOP majority up close and personal. Their focus is not on you. Their eyes are on the halls of power and efforts to do political damage to President Biden. My eyes are on you.
People's lives and livelihoods are at stake. Our fundamental civil rights are at stake. Our planet is at stake. I am here to serve you and make sure your voices are heard.
The Republican Party is united around defending Donald Trump, amplifying his lies, and obstructing efforts to investigate his potential criminal wrongdoing. Meanwhile, I'm focused on improving the lives of everyday Americans, protecting our democracy from dangerous attacks, and supporting investigations into Donald Trump's administration - even, and perhaps especially, when the wrongdoing goes all the way to the top.
**My willingness to stand up against Donald Trump and the extremism that has taken over the Republican Party has made me a target of the national GOP. I know I can only keep this seat if I have the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you. **
[**So please, before my team 's next strategy meeting on Tuesday morning, will you partake in our official campaign survey? I'd love 1,200 more members of this team to submit their feedback tonight.** ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-feb-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1141-su-nd)
With gratitude,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=X1mq27fcxEw%2F%2BQ5%2BYt4fgjEQ0QIVaqiI&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Respectfully asking if you can chip in $5 before our mid-month fundraising drive ends. Imagine Mark gone from the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We need more Mark Kellys in the Senate, not less.
#

Friends —
We need more Mark Kellys in the Senate, not less.
Just imagine for a second, Mark replaced by some far-right politician who has spent the last year trying to out-Trump all of his opponents.
Imagine Mark replaced by an extremist who is far more interested in angering their opponents than helping the people they serve.
If we are EVER going to repair our broken politics, it’d be a tremendous loss to trade someone like Mark Kelly for one of Trump’s cronies.
So, please. There is so much on the line here, and with so much being spent by so many to beat Mark, every donation matters.
Help us keep pace before our mid-month fundraising drive ends TOMORROW AT MIDNIGHT.
[**Can you please make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — to help Mark Kelly defend this seat and continue his work putting people ahead of party politics? This is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220214-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2117_6688874_TbsJeo&akid=2117%2E6688874%2ETbsJeo)

clean_body: We need more Mark Kellys in the Senate, not less. Friends — We need more Mark Kellys in the Senate, not less. Just imagine for a second, Mark replaced by some far-right politician who has spent the last year trying to out-Trump all of his opponents. Imagine Mark replaced by an extremist who is far more interested in angering their opponents than helping the people they serve. If we are EVER going to repair our broken politics, it’d be a tremendous loss to trade someone like Mark Kelly for one of Trump’s cronies. So, please. There is so much on the line here, and with so much being spent by so many to beat Mark, every donation matters. Help us keep pace before our mid-month fundraising drive ends TOMORROW AT MIDNIGHT. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Huge Endorsement!
body:
I can’t wait to make him proud in Washington.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oRsUztIFGDChugPZ0PWNHQ/XJa9pKZORSg763f16lSt0e892w)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oRsUztIFGDChugPZ0PWNHQ/XJa9pKZORSg763f16lSt0e892w) I just got a _huge_ endorsement from President Trump’s former National Security Advisor, **General Michael Flynn!**

Here is what he said:
> "**Laura Loomer is a courageous America First fighter** for the American people, and she is NOT a career politician.
>
> Through her boldness and constant search for the truth as an investigative journalist and activist, she always stands up for American values and principles.
>
> Laura is exactly the type of candidate Americans need in Congress, and she will tirelessly be a voice for regular people and will not allow for political correctness to impede her fight to save America.
>
> I strongly and wholeheartedly endorse Laura Loomer’s congressional campaign and pray people in Florida’s 11th District join me to get her elected to Congress where she will fight for all of us in Washington DC."
General Flynn is a true American hero--having served our nation bravely and boldly, both on the battlefield, and in the Oval Office.

He also survived one of the most vicious, Deep State, fake news malpractices, and FBI shakedowns of all time:

In 2017, the mainstream media, the Deep State, and Big Tech colluded to frame General Flynn for the “Russiagate” scandal we now know never existed.

**Like me, General Flynn knows what it’s like to have everyone fighting against you with lies and smears. Like me, General Flynn knows what it's like to be targeted by the FBI, and _still_ manage to win.**

I can’t wait to make him proud in Washington. But I need your help to amplify our message and grow our momentum in these critical weeks to come.

[**Will you stand with me, General Flynn, and America First Patriots all across the country... by making a donation of $25 or more to my campaign today?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oRsUztIFGDChugPZ0PWNHQ/XJa9pKZORSg763f16lSt0e892w)

[**Please make your most generous donation of $10, $25, or even $50 to help me get to Washington so I can FIGHT for YOU.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oRsUztIFGDChugPZ0PWNHQ/XJa9pKZORSg763f16lSt0e892w)

Thanks for your support!

Keep up the fight,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Our bill is more ambitious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Congress should be working for the people, not their own financial interests.
#
Peter,
Our elected representatives in Congress are supposed to serve the people, not their personal financial interests. Yet, all too often, we see that Members of Congress use information from briefings and knowledge of pending federal legislation to enrich themselves.
**That’s why we need to ban Members of Congress and their spouses from holding and trading stocks. Pramila was proud to join Senator Elizabeth Warren last week to introduce the Bipartisan Ban on Congressional Stock Ownership Act in order to put this stock ban in place.** It’s good policy, and it’s simply the right thing to do. We cannot leave this door open for corruption any longer.
[**Can you chip in $3 to help fuel Pramila’s advocacy alongside Senator Warren to root out corruption in Congress? Members of Congress need to serve the people, not their own bank accounts.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10820?refcode=em20220214-1029&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1029%2E420207%2E0x0aHn)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10820?refcode=em20220214-1029&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1029%2E420207%2E0x0aHn)**
There are other bills in Congress right now that deal with stock bans for lawmakers in the House and Senate, but Pramila’s bill with Senator Warren is the strongest.
The legislation would ban Members of Congress and their spouses from owning and trading individual stocks, bonds, commodities, futures, and other securities including an interest in a hedge fund, a derivative, an option or other complex investment vehicle. No other bill is quite this expansive.
And any violations of this legislation would lead to $50,000 fines enforced by the Department of Justice.
[**Again, Peter, this is just the right thing to do. So, can you fuel our efforts to end stock ownership in Congress? Lawmakers in the House and Senate should focus on legislating for the people, not the stock market.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10820?refcode=em20220214-1029&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1029%2E420207%2E0x0aHn)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220214-1029-footer&t=22&refcode2=1029_420207_0x0aHn&akid=1029%2E420207%2E0x0aHn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1029%2E420207%2E0x0aHn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1029%2E420207%2E0x0aHn)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:

name: Randolph Bracy
subject: Remembering Parkland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Peter,

Four years ago today, a gunman walked into Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School with a legally purchased weapon. That day, he murdered 17 students and teachers in the deadliest school shooting in our nation’s history.

Four years later, it’s still hard to wrap my mind around the scope of the tragedy we witnessed that day, not just because of the lives lost, but because that loss could have been prevented if only those in power had the courage to take action.

The victims of the Stoneman Douglas shooting had families they loved, friends they cared for, dreams they were working toward. They had full, promising lives ahead of them — lives that were stolen in an act of senseless gun violence.

And every day since then, the Florida GOP has dishonored their memories, refusing to take basic steps to prevent another tragedy like Parkland from happening again — to prevent the loss of more innocent lives. And under their watch, gun violence in our schools has only increased.

As a State Representative and State Senator, I’ve fought for common-sense gun control. I’ve introduced legislation that would restrict the sale and use of assault weapons and I’ve advocated for measures that reduce the risk of gun violence in our communities.

And as your next Congressman, I’m going to continue that fight. Because our community deserves leaders who won’t just plaster platitudes across social media, but who will take real action to keep our state safe and end the scourge of gun violence in our communities.

We can’t bring back those we’ve lost. We can’t undo the harm that’s been done. But we can work to make sure that what happened at Marjory Stoneman Douglas never happens again.

So today, I stand with the families, friends, and neighbors of every student and teacher who lost their life at Marjory Stoneman Douglas four years ago. I stand with everyone who has lost a loved one to gun violence in our communities. And I promise you that I will fight every day to put an end to these senseless tragedies.

With gratitude,
Randolph

Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=0214]

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

Fixing our roads and bettering Kansas infrastructure is another common sense goal that will have long term payoffs and be an investment in our economy and communities. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = My experience as Mayor of Kansas City prepared me to negotiate effective, bi-partisan solutions. In the Senate, my priority will always be the hardworking, everyday people of Kansas. It’s our state, where I learned two of my core values, hard work and caring for my community. The elections this year are shaping up to be extremely competitive. I feel so proud of this campaign, how far we’ve come, and our exciting plans for the future. = Thank you for all that you do, Rev. Mark Holland | | | = Meet Mark: Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years. name: Katie Pavlich
subject: They tried to silence me
body:
If you’ve watched me co-host “The Five” on Fox News or guest co-host “Fox and Friends” then you know I don’t apologi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9vrbanihlgcjim1hkjrkeboic57sj9c5j77c400_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp7dcb4sqr34dj7m5i74pb46hjr0tblckq65ddl6ap32dlhmprm8tj3m9oe8orgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6hj3collmkrreob66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5gm1pr7c3i62oh5u)
If you’ve watched me co-host “The Five” on Fox News or guest co-host “Fox and Friends” then you know I don’t apologize for my conservative values, and I’ll defend my constitutional rights to the hilt. I’m proud of America... **NOT ASHAMED!** **And, I know since you are reading this, that you aren’t ashamed of America or our values either.** **But there are millions of young people who aren’t provided with the truth about your conservative ideas... ** [**Will you help give these young people the opportunity to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zp2mualndculee7kju2qe0jtf4lar1s8r91vd8go_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs) It’s easy to see why young people are impressionable to liberal indoctrination. They’re high school and college students in schools where free speech is under constant assault and where political correctness and socialism is pushed in the classroom. Liberals bully students showing interest in your conservative ideas. I should know—just ten years ago I was a young, impressionable student at the University of Arizona. **It didn’t take me long to realize that my teachers didn’t just dislike the conservative values my parents had instilled in me...****_they hated them._** My professors relied on MSNBC and CNN as the “gold standard” when it came to presenting the “truth” in their classes. But I had no idea they’d try to silence my voice until I got involved with a national conservative organization called **Young America’s Foundation (YAF).** With YAF’s support and access to their campus lecture program, I decided to invite conservative author and activist **David Horowitz** to speak on our campus. He had just written a book about “how radical professors at America’s top colleges indoctrinate students and undermine our democracy. “ And I was just about to discover just how right he was. Just two days before the lecture, the school threatened to shut David Horowitz’s lecture down unless our campus group coughed up cash to pay for “security” because administrators had deemed the lecture “controversial.” Meanwhile, leftist activists tore down our signs and posters advertising the event so students wouldn’t know about it. Then, just three hours before the start of the event, the school moved the lecture to a hidden-away classroom in the hopes that no one would show up. Yet, despite every roadblock they threw at us, **the event was a HUGE success.** University of Arizona students got to hear David Horowitz explain why free enterprise and conservatism are the true roots of freedom. **And I learned a valuable lesson: ** **The Left will do anything to prevent young people from hearing conservatives because they know that students who hear the truth about our values will reject socialism.** Oh, you won’t hear much about the threats, violence, and intimidation pointed at conservatives in schools from the mainstream media. But I've witnessed it firsthand. [**And despite the fear and intimidation tactics these radical leftists use in schools, I want you to know YOU can play a pivotal part to ensure more young Americans hear the truth about our conservative values by joining YAF today.**** **](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zan8iontdpgkiivkfflv86hd1o9kf947hnjae20o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs) **You see, YAF had such an impact on my life that today I’m one of their speakers.** And I personally know how enraged the Left can get when we speak up for commonsense values that used to be taken for granted – such as border security, free enterprise, and traditional family values. For example:
* When I spoke at the university of Wisconsin, radical campus activists protested my speech by committing an obscene act that should have been treated as sexual harassment. Instead, the university ignored protestors, labeled me as “controversial” and imposed a “security fee” on the local YAF chapter.
* And later, at Kennesaw State University in Georgia, campus administrators tried to prevent me from speaking. They claimed I was “controversial,” and campus administrators tried to force the local YAF chapter to pay a heavy handed “security fee” in a clear effort to stifle free speech.

But I’m not the only YAF speaker who’s had to deal with this kind of intimidation. Many other YAF speakers have been disrupted... **and even seriously endangered.** **Ben Shapiro was threatened by a violent Antifa terrorist demonstration, after U.C. Berkeley was forced to allow him to speak after a lawsuit filed by YAF.** The First Amendment says every American deserves to have their voice heard in the public square. Everyone deserves a chance to share their opinion and defend their viewpoints. **_But the Left is terrified of your ideas._** That’s why the Left seeks to SILENCE our voices, instead of debating us. I’ve heard many good people say it’s too late...there’s nothing we can do to stop the Left from indoctrinating young people on college campuses with socialism. **_But it’s simply not true – YAF is living proof we CAN stop them. _** Time and time again, **_YAF has sued campuses who sought to censor conservative speakers and WON_** – ensuring young Americans can hear our shared conservative values and ideas. **Let’s face it – with the far Left firmly in control of our public school system and most colleges, young Americans won’t hear these basic truths unless YAF is there to tell them** And time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students. **[If you want to help recruit the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement, I hope you will make a tax-deductible gift to Young America’s Foundation today.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zclmu7crfuit0gpfogj6424jq7t2c2c3g4oanmao_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs)** Remember, the Left is determined to silence voices like ours in schools across the country. In fact, they tried their best to stop YAF... _Your support of YAF is so important because without your help, they'll succeed and your conservative values WILL BE SILENCED._ **This is simply not a battle we can afford to lose.** We must decide whether our country remains a bastion of freedom or it will be twisted and transformed into a socialist dystopia. The next generation is the key in ensuring that our nation doesn't make the wrong choice. Thank you in advance for you support of this crucial mission. Gratefully, **K atie Pavlich ** _Fox News Contributor_ _New York Times Bestselling Author_ _Editor, Townhall.com_ _Young __America's Foundation Speaker_ [**DONATE**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq8gj6q93fo047k4koiuj0drcbhlq0s9p1bpigog_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zma4l6qkjui71qhdig8js9qmhqrrgkqu6hd6g248_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs) | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrq02dfucak29f22a9a4qlo8vocd1t8sn6a2d9hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z200qj86lno44ltiut97svnqd0hdu72trskg8k8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3guclc3aaaaegegbr1an4ntnnt4t3c32vcrq0to_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c3jmeo74c5h2bs)

subject: the GOP's special sweetheart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

I wanted to reach out to say thank you for being on this journey with me. I'm grateful to have you as a real partner as we fight for Iowa – and I'm so, so proud to be running a grassroots campaign powered by passionate, committed people just like you.
**But Republicans have a special sweetheart this Valentine's Day, too: the far-right megadonors shelling out millions to take back the Senate.** They're a scarily perfect pair, with their right-wing ideologies, need for power and complete disregard for our democracy.
My opponent, Sen. Grassley (R-IA), is working right alongside them – defending Trump's attempts to overturn the election, pushing his far-right agenda and protecting his own political career instead of fighting for the people he's supposed to serve.
**To take on Sen. Grassley and the GOP's megadonors, I'm going to need committed grassroots people like you behind me every step of the way – including tonight.**
You see, I'm up against a critical mid-month deadline at 11:59 p.m., but I'm still $9,446 short of where I need to be. McConnell's allies are sitting on a war chest of $39 million to defeat Democratic challengers like me and take back the Senate, so I just cannot afford to miss this goal.
**[Please, I'm counting on you tonight: Will you donate $5, or whatever you can spare right now, to help me defeat Sen. name: Daniel Cool
subject: Help Get John Gibbs on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Gibbs for Congress
body:
| |
---
# **Help Get John Gibbs
on the ballot**
---
|
---
**Thank you to all of you who supported, attended and volunteered at our event with Dr. Ben Carson. It was a huge success, and we could not of done it without your help.** We have a lot of momentum. We now need to ensure that John's name is on the ballot in order to **_fire meijer_.** To make this happen, we need every supporters help. We have a goal of collecting 2,000 ballot petition signatures by April. We will be holding a **TRAINING EVENT** this Wednesday the 16th to train our volunteer army to collect signatures. We will ensure you have the properly filled out ballot petitions and teach you everything you need to know in order to successfully collect signatures. Please come and be a part of this critical **ACTION** step. **Date: Wednesday 2/16/22** **Time: 6:00 - 7:30 pm** **Location:****Fricano 's Pizza Restaurant** 5808 Alpine Ave NW Comstock Park, MI 49321 **Together, We can Save America!**
---
|
---
|
---
Please check out our website!
---
[ **VoteJohnGibbs.com** ](https://www.votejohngibbs.com)
---
Paid for by John Gibbs for Congress
---
|
---
© 20XX All Rights Reserved

name: Bob Healey Jr.
subject: I believe you deserve better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress |
body:
Sent from my iPhone Friend, I’m about to head into a business meeting, so I need to keep this short. But I just wanted to reach out to you personally and ask for your support in my election campaign. New Jersey’s 3rd is represented by Andy Kim right now, and while he presents himself as a nice guy, Andy’s really just a career politician who will do whatever it takes to get re-elected.. I’m running to defeat him in November because I believe that we deserve better than a lifelong bureaucrat. I want to serve our district to represent the values we hold dear, like hard work, patriotism, and the importance of family. As a father and business owner myself, I pledge to be YOUR VOICE in D.C. But I can’t get there without your help, and my campaign has a HUGE mid-February deadline ending TONIGHT. [_**Will you chip in to help my campaign?**_](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=5ecac5b4ee2f4879aea0e2c00347e8dc&_e=X2uzNPHfG0qhvRaruGhSO6GajcMa9nfuvVD_te7A241A5ZDU5PvI_VkL7yfoMgRQPBjZqrMSSY-seQvU25XqA7rjqpH0ZVWC8pOwhCQxtCJTrk3iTOzTVzON0uL14EEE1O8NXfZS2nKoSk3x7UQUYZCKWQ7CvbVIt7uEgZpi-4sNbeh2gBE7r7eaon50t0QAVW1BFL1B8wyWhb97E4id_-degh8Ip5yXOAl-FQW1pgFzD0Oos6voAs973jx1kO5pYfUHub2_7i2AlqTYi74c27Qh5on1TW3PkntyI97WjQAHsVSLPxp8bGTLts1GEwhpdpT2uUDi5-mhaepKReG71GZ6FhiCjB0I9YVjeLvCeMV8yI-tzqdAn8fMZAs1mmD45l2-HIIK-oaBGDwLkIE-PWxA-Kqc9EtkFAUz7TdoQvp4rz32Rmwilo1OTESEh5OevzSU4X6QxqTsnye0Z-6aoA%3D%3D) I would really appreciate it, and I don’t think you’ll regret it. name: Michele Rayner
subject: Thoughts and prayers aren't enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785874/330329792/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNx27v51qED5jXAyAgilQITbRB3AfSu1Xwa5zMFupGg=)

Peter,

4 years ago today, just a few towns down from us, tragedy struck at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School.

On February 14th, 2018, a gunman opened fire with a semi-automatic rifle at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. 17 people were killed and 17 others were injured that day.

The Parkland shooting and countless other tragedies should've been enough to reform our state's and our nation's gun laws. Legislators always offer their thoughts and prayers after events like this, but that's simply not enough – we need policy and action that ends gun violence in America.

**We need to build trust within our communities. We need to invest in our schools, health care, and reform public safety to systems of direct care and compassion. This starts with policy reform and enacting long-overdue legislation.**

**[Passing common sense gun safety measures in conjunction with investing directly in our communities is long overdue. If you're ready to overcome the gun violence epidemic, sign the petition demanding action from Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785876/330329797/-1824943531?ms=em22_220214_gunreform&refcode=em22_220214_gunreform&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNx27v51qED5jXAyAgilQITbRB3AfSu1Xwa5zMFupGg=&emci=653d5451-998a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8c9e41e9-bf8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785882/330329801/-1824943531?ms=em22_220214_gunreform&refcode=em22_220214_gunreform&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNx27v51qED5jXAyAgilQITbRB3AfSu1Xwa5zMFupGg=&emci=653d5451-998a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8c9e41e9-bf8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788) Gun violence is a preventable epidemic. The National Rifle Association has a chokehold on many of our political leaders, including my opponent Anna Paulina Luna.

The NRA has wielded its influence to cause divisiveness and inaction in Congress for far too long. Their leadership blocks even the smallest commonsense reforms that are supported by a majority of Americans -- commonsense reforms that could have prevented what happened 4 years ago.

Unlike her Republican opponent, Michele is beholden to the people and the people only. It's why she's the candidate to tackle gun violence head-on. She knows just how important it is that we end the gun violence epidemic in Florida and beyond, and she knows it starts with centering our communities.

Despite the odds, we can honor the 2nd Amendment _and_ put legislation in place that prevents senseless gun violence -- like making background checks more extensive, and ensuring gun violence stays out of our communities.**If we don't, our communities will continue to face tragedy and the cycle of "thoughts and prayers," instead of action and safety.**

**[So Peter, on the 4 year anniversary of one of the deadliest school shootings in our history, please join me in the fight to put an end to gun violence by adding your name to our petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785884/330329806/-1824943531?ms=em22_220214_gunreform&refcode=em22_220214_gunreform&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNx27v51qED5jXAyAgilQITbRB3AfSu1Xwa5zMFupGg=&emci=653d5451-998a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8c9e41e9-bf8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785886/330329811/-1824943531?ms=em22_220214_gunreform&refcode=em22_220214_gunreform&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNx27v51qED5jXAyAgilQITbRB3AfSu1Xwa5zMFupGg=&emci=653d5451-998a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8c9e41e9-bf8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788) Thanks for showing up, Peter.

Michele Rayner [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41785889/330329815/1870454853?refcode=em22_220214_gunreform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNx27v51qED5jXAyAgilQITbRB3AfSu1Xwa5zMFupGg=)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/653d5451-998a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/8c9e41e9-bf8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzllNDFlOS1iZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNx27v51qED5jXAyAgilQITbRB3AfSu1Xwa5zMFupGg=&id=140435042). Contributions or gifts to Michele Rayner for Florida are not tax-deductible. Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
PO Box 35218
St. Petersburg, FL 33705

body:
Denver School Board Director Scott Esserman has endorsed Neal Walia for CD1.... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2c8a64a0afeb/your-help-is-needed-6775562?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| [ ](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=577e3f01cd&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | **Hello Friend,** **I am so proud to announce that Denver School Board Director Scott Esserman has endorsed my campaign for Colorado's First Congressional District!** [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=31ab57d39f&e=e67cbb3f92) **Scott Esserman is a person that is rooted in community. My parents are both public school educators so I understand the difficulties they face each day in trying to do the best job they can in a system that does not support them as well as it should. I am grateful to have the support from a leader who works to make the system better and who fights for our students and their families every single day.**

[**Can I count on you to keep this momentum going by making a donation of $10, $25, $50, or $100?**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=f89673f91a&e=e67cbb3f92)

**I am humbled by the outpour of support I have received so far and the type of leaders that have endorsed this race. I am a product of Colorado's public school system and I look forward to working with Scott to reprioritize our education system.**
In Solidarity,
Neal Walia
Candidate, CO First Congressional District
www.nealwaliaforcongress.com
---

This will be a great opportunity to speak directly with John and Michelle, share what issues matter most to you, and hear their exact plans to build a more equitable future here in Maryland. Can you join us?
You can RSVP here: _**[https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/440978](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41798277/330384411/2067969934?utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_campaign=p2ptour_takoma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjM0ZTM5ZC1lYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NXv06FaDD0ah4QdAH_FgZWtRK_iGPtNLWDJoAdfAhx0=&emci=3724c71a-be8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ef34e39d-ec8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_ or reach out to _**ben@johnkingforgovernor.com**_ with any questions about the event. Team King

body:
I’ll keep this quick because it’s important. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41798320/330384459/346420601?refcode=20220214_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDM0ZTM5ZC1lYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=REF0DnWWqAnS7b1GfyDPj_mDHWsQuXp7gmn-PfyNW0s=)
---
Friends,

I’ll keep this quick because it’s important: I just had a meeting with my staff, and we’ve noticed a pretty significant dip in funds raised this month compared to last. We can’t afford to fall short if we’re going to beat Ron DeSantis: **_[Can you rush a quick donation now to help us catch up?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41798321/330384460/346420601?refcode=20220214_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDM0ZTM5ZC1lYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=REF0DnWWqAnS7b1GfyDPj_mDHWsQuXp7gmn-PfyNW0s=)_**
December goal: **MET**
January goal: **MET**
February goal: **???**
---
Normally I wouldn’t be so concerned, but a recent poll from USA Today shows I’m the candidate best positioned to defeat DeSantis in November, and that he's below 50% against me – which puts a major target on my back starting right now.

We all know DeSantis has plenty of far-right, out-of-state billionaire pals who he can call on to help bail him out. And with that new poll showing he’s vulnerable, you can bet he’s going to be calling in some favors pretty soon.

**I don’t have right-wing billionaires. I have grassroots supporters like you pitching in $10, $20, or even $50 at a time. Can I count on you to make a donation before our deadline tomorrow night to help us get back where we need to be and DEFEAT Ron DeSantis?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I’ll keep this quick because it’s important. | | | | = Friends, I’ll keep this quick because it’s important: I just had a meeting with my staff, and we’ve noticed a pretty significant dip in funds raised this month compared to last. We can’t afford to fall short if we’re going to beat Ron DeSantis: = December goal: MET January goal: MET February goal: ??? Normally I wouldn’t be so concerned, but a recent poll from USA Today shows I’m the candidate best positioned to defeat DeSantis in November, and that he's below 50% against me – which puts a major target on my back starting right now. We all know DeSantis has plenty of far-right, out-of-state billionaire pals who he can call on to help bail him out. And with that new poll showing he’s vulnerable, you can bet he’s going to be calling in some favors pretty soon. I don’t have right-wing billionaires. I have grassroots supporters like you pitching in $10, $20, or even $50 at a time. Can I count on you to make a donation before our deadline tomorrow night to help us get back where we need to be and DEFEAT Ron DeSantis? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you and God bless, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Jeff Warner
subject: You're Invited! Come Celebrate!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
| | | | |
---

| |
# **Newsletter-February 11 ****Vol. 2, #4**
---
| | | | |
##
13 February 22
**It's Time To Celebrate! **

**You're invited to the Jeff Warner For Congress****
**Campaign Kick-Off Celebration!****

Saturday, February 26
5-7p
Severna Park Elks Lodge
160 Truck House Road, Severna Park, 21146
This is a time primarily intended to inspire, motivate and encourage you as you meet others who share our mutual concern for the direction of the District and of the nation. We'll share a pasta meal together, hear briefly from Jeff, and have a great time socializing.

We have intentionally kept the cost low solely to cover our costs. **We don't want finances to stop anyone from attending.** We want to fill the hall, so please tell your friends, family, and other like-minded people about this!

**Minimum suggested donations to cover our costs are listed below.** Please make whatever donation you can in order to attend. We want a great fun-filled evening that will be refreshing and we can’t do that without you there!
* Single Adult - $15
* Couple - $30
* Family - $40 (A family is a parent/guardian with legal child(ren))
* Additional Campaign donations are appreciated
* The campaign will make a solicitation for funds at the event, but please don't feel compelled to give.

[**RSVP HERE**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=39b3b51d7d&e=4868b92baf)
Your participation is important since it will send a strong message regarding the uniqueness of our movement. Please use this event as an opportunity to invite others to attend who share our mutual concern for the District and for the nation.

**Please RSVP by Monday night, February 21.** If you miss this deadline, be sure to reach out to see if openings remain.

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---

| [**Jeff Warner For Congress Website**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=627af5bd21&e=4868b92baf "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---

|

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto:%20info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [ update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=4868b92baf&c=4ac6e9e076) or [ unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=4868b92baf&c=4ac6e9e076).

Team, The National GOP is coming out in droves to try and take Michael’s seat. Not only did the Republican committee tasked with flipping the Senate raise over $100 million last year, but a Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC raked in another $94 million. Then Trump ally, Kellyanne Conway, joined one of Michael’s opponent’s campaigns**,** and you can bet she’ll bring with her lots of attention from National Republicans. Our slim Senate majority, and continued progress on the issues that matter most, hang in the balance this election year. And Washington Republicans know it. If we want to compete against their warchest, we need to meet our fundraising goals and build the infrastructure it takes to win. Michael is fighting every day for Colorado’s values. He’s working to build on the wins he secured including: tax cuts for working families that kept nearly 4 million kids out of poverty last year; historic investments in Colorado’s high-speed internet infrastructure; protecting patients from surprise medical bills after emergencies; and repairing our roads and bridges, while creating good-paying jobs all across the state. If we want to compete against their warchest, we need to meet our fundraising goals and build the infrastructure it takes to win. Michael is fighting every day for Colorado’s values. He’s working to build on the wins he secured including: tax cuts for working families that kept nearly 4 million kids out of poverty last year; historic investments in Colorado’s high-speed internet infrastructure; protecting patients from surprise medical bills after emergencies; and repairing our roads and bridges, while creating good-paying jobs all across the state. He doesn’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, which is why we are counting on folks like you to power this campaign against the National GOP’s incoming attacks. Pitch in $10 — or what makes sense for your budget — and with your support, we will be able to keep Colorado blue and build on all we’ve achieved for working families. name: Michael, NRCC Communications Director
subject: RE: Please don't let your membership expire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

---
| | | Hello Peter,

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Generic Button")
---
Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Will you answer
Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 14th, 11:59 PM deadline.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before
the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

Don't let Dan Crenshaw or the rest of the House Republicans down.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Generic Button")
---

Thank you,

Michael
NCCC Communications Director

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: Please don't let your membership expire!

It's Dan Crenshaw. I'm reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Generic
Button")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1.Beating Nancy Pelosi's House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes - it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3\. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed. **But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 7th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Generic
Button")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time - but it's critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I'm humbly asking: renew today >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Please,
Peter. I’m humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555971:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555972:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555972:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59555972:6Jc_aBETN:m:1:3253819041:91281B3804A72C2882DF22E07BE0C2B0:r "Donate Button in Footer")

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: Stacy Abrams caught GRINNING while our kids are muzzled
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NUsAfiXIkAXmJKbzNQPHmPbBN3mAURR2SvJ9ikUgQx8XoLewDOca4UEXoOBxUzWO049xFvlF4o-EwW4mhdDq1h7hwQ37Whd6VztyBWWcpZA0wvJo2WXeYbWlhaqeCBk56OX4V_8gA8m7VNtf0y_r6fEVKuFqHV7Bbjt3Ciq77aSK94xJg51N5U_IZNfrQLYg&c=c3A-q0XNduI_sZG3s0IUe8ef-5rfGcw19jBLesqAGR_ynlK58QeCaw==&ch=2W-6iXbhwUNUPqh4lmMe1syA430bciU8XgGEFE3EjWDs_Qn6-QsFvQ==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter ,
---
| Last week, photos posted to social media revealed perennial Democrat candidate Stacy Abrams grinning from ear to ear while the schoolchildren she was visiting were all muzzled in masks.
The hypocrisy is stunning. After TWO YEARS of "15 days to slow the spread" and "masks save lives," Democrats in power still flaunt their own rules for the rest of us.
Watch this [important message](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NUsAfiXIkAXmJKbzNQPHmPbBN3mAURR2SvJ9ikUgQx8XoLewDOca4UEXoOBxUzWO049xFvlF4o-EwW4mhdDq1h7hwQ37Whd6VztyBWWcpZA0wvJo2WXeYbWlhaqeCBk56OX4V_8gA8m7VNtf0y_r6fEVKuFqHV7Bbjt3Ciq77aSK94xJg51N5U_IZNfrQLYg&c=c3A-q0XNduI_sZG3s0IUe8ef-5rfGcw19jBLesqAGR_ynlK58QeCaw==&ch=2W-6iXbhwUNUPqh4lmMe1syA430bciU8XgGEFE3EjWDs_Qn6-QsFvQ==) I have for Stacy Abrams and the Democrats who want to keep our kids masked:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NUsAfiXIkAXmJKbzNQPHmPbBN3mAURR2SvJ9ikUgQx8XoLewDOca4UEXoOBxUzWO049xFvlF4o-EwW4mhdDq1h7hwQ37Whd6VztyBWWcpZA0wvJo2WXeYbWlhaqeCBk56OX4V_8gA8m7VNtf0y_r6fEVKuFqHV7Bbjt3Ciq77aSK94xJg51N5U_IZNfrQLYg&c=c3A-q0XNduI_sZG3s0IUe8ef-5rfGcw19jBLesqAGR_ynlK58QeCaw==&ch=2W-6iXbhwUNUPqh4lmMe1syA430bciU8XgGEFE3EjWDs_Qn6-QsFvQ==)
---
| | | [WATCH THE VIDEO HERE >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NUsAfiXIkAXmJKbzNQPHmPbBN3mAURR2SvJ9ikUgQx8XoLewDOca4UEXoOBxUzWO049xFvlF4o-EwW4mhdDq1h7hwQ37Whd6VztyBWWcpZA0wvJo2WXeYbWlhaqeCBk56OX4V_8gA8m7VNtf0y_r6fEVKuFqHV7Bbjt3Ciq77aSK94xJg51N5U_IZNfrQLYg&c=c3A-q0XNduI_sZG3s0IUe8ef-5rfGcw19jBLesqAGR_ynlK58QeCaw==&ch=2W-6iXbhwUNUPqh4lmMe1syA430bciU8XgGEFE3EjWDs_Qn6-QsFvQ==)
---
| It's time we fight back against these left-wing rulers who want to keep our kids in masks and out of the classroom.
We let these people rise to power and take away our freedoms - NOW IT'S TIME TO TAKE IT BACK!
I hope you'll [join me](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NUsAfiXIkAXmJKbzNQPHmPbBN3mAURR2SvJ9ikUgQx8XoLewDOca4UEXoOBxUzWO049xFvlF4o-EwW4mhdDq1h7hwQ37Whd6VztyBWWcpZA0wvJo2WXeYbWlhaqeCBk56OX4V_8gA8m7VNtf0y_r6fEVKuFqHV7Bbjt3Ciq77aSK94xJg51N5U_IZNfrQLYg&c=c3A-q0XNduI_sZG3s0IUe8ef-5rfGcw19jBLesqAGR_ynlK58QeCaw==&ch=2W-6iXbhwUNUPqh4lmMe1syA430bciU8XgGEFE3EjWDs_Qn6-QsFvQ==) in my campaign for U.S. Senate. I will always fight for our kids - whether it's keeping them in school or protecting them from CRT indoctrination, I will take on the woke left who think they own our kids.
You can join me in this fight by chipping in a donation and helping me win this Senate seat!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NUsAfiXIkAXmJKbzNQPHmPbBN3mAURR2SvJ9ikUgQx8XoLewDOca4UEXoOBxUzWO049xFvlF4o-EwW4mhdDq1h7hwQ37Whd6VztyBWWcpZA0wvJo2WXeYbWlhaqeCBk56OX4V_8gA8m7VNtf0y_r6fEVKuFqHV7Bbjt3Ciq77aSK94xJg51N5U_IZNfrQLYg&c=c3A-q0XNduI_sZG3s0IUe8ef-5rfGcw19jBLesqAGR_ynlK58QeCaw==&ch=2W-6iXbhwUNUPqh4lmMe1syA430bciU8XgGEFE3EjWDs_Qn6-QsFvQ==)

| Kathy Barnette

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Peter , | Last week, photos posted to social media revealed perennial Democrat candidate Stacy Abrams grinning from ear to ear while the schoolchildren she was visiting were all muzzled in masks. The hypocrisy is stunning. After TWO YEARS of "15 days to slow the spread" and "masks save lives," Democrats in power still flaunt their own rules for the rest of us. Watch this == I have for Stacy Abrams and the Democrats who want to keep our kids masked: | == | | | == | It's time we fight back against these left-wing rulers who want to keep our kids in masks and out of the classroom. We let these people rise to power and take away our freedoms - NOW IT'S TIME TO TAKE IT BACK! I hope you'll == in my campaign for U.S. Senate. I will always fight for our kids - whether it's keeping them in school or protecting them from CRT indoctrination, I will take on the woke left who think they own our kids. You can join me in this fight by chipping in a donation and helping me win this Senate seat! | | | == | For Pennsylvania, | == | Kathy Barnette | | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | == | | | == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O.
