subject: Trump's allies are funneling millions into Walker's campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I have a critical update about our battleground race:
**First, GOP super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves to smear my record and turn Georgia red. Then, a recent poll showed me 1 point down. And now? Donald Trump is set to host _another_ fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago for my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R).**
Experts at _POLITICO_ say defending our razor-thin Democratic majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue. That's why the GOP is zeroing in on me as its TOP target for defeat – and it's why Trump's allies are funneling millions into Walker's campaign to crush our people-powered movement.
**Republicans know they could retake Senate control if they win this race – so they're pulling out all the stops to make it happen. **If we don't have the critical grassroots resources to fight back against this surge in GOP spending, I'm worried we could fall behind and put our Senate majority at risk.
**We need to raise another $9,685 towards our mid-month goal by midnight tonight, but with time running out, we're on track to fall short. There’s no way I win this race without folks like you by my side – so please, team, I'm personally asking:**
**[Will you rush a split donation of $5 or more now between Jacky Rosen and my campaign to help fight back against GOP attacks, defend this critical seat, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41798685/330386022/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1636-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQxOTZiNy1lZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YHl_LzPJrUK-X3xo4Y2slrb9ImAse8OReOJPbzGdrgI=)**

The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Begging you... to remember the flowers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, Today is Valentine’s Day. (If you haven’t gotten flowers or something nice for your significant other, let this be your reminder!) And on Sunday, Eve and I celebrate twenty-seven years of marriage. I was looking through some old photos this weekend, and I wanted to share one that really brought back such wonderful memories (_shush, it’s Valentine’s Day, I’m allowed to be mushy today!_): If you had told me that a blind date with Eve Sanderson in Los Angeles all those years ago would lead to the amazing life and family we’ve had together, I would not have believed it. Neither would Eve. I’m convinced she only went out with me out of curiosity — how often does an Eve go out with an Adam? (We went out for Italian food and to a jazz bar.) And here’s the thing about Eve — she has been such an amazing partner through thick and thin, Trump’s tantrums and threats, and even both of us going vegan. And she still crushes me easily and soundly on the tennis court. _I couldn’t have done it without you, Evie._ I know you don’t hear from Eve very often — she’s a private person, who just happens to be married to a very public figure — but she’s the rock that holds our family together. Since our anniversary is the same week as Valentine’s Day, it is kind of a rip, because the two often get merged into only one celebration. But we plan to celebrate with at least one nice vegan dinner out. I hope you will too (vegan or otherwise). Since I’m focused on keeping the home fire burning this week, do you mind helping me keep the campaign fire going? **Can you chip in $10 to keep our campaign on track for a successful quarter? It makes a big impact on my re-election campaign and helps Democrats all across the country.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41798690/330386028/2106225420?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20220214_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODQzYmQwNi1lZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdK39bg2EKJ3dNSPkP9otbjpsQNrIlYRtcvQU0DIH8Y=)

| | Hi Peter, I'm Val's son, Aidan.[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41798856/330386531/-1599294071?refcode=2022-02-14-birthday&recurring=0&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2e677b71-ef8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTY3N2I3MS1lZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juTzwmvBNcI-Rv7p4_TYrJjQA-hiix-0bTnphu48lhw=) **Today's her birthday – that's right, on Valentine's Day – so I thought I'd take a chance to explain what makes her special to me.** To start with, she is one of the hardest working people I've ever met. She was always there for me and my sister when we needed her while also working a full time job, organizing the PTO, campaigning for better schools, leading the state legislature on Oregon’s most pressing issues, or offering to help one of my classmates (whether I knew them or not) with anything they might need. **She never turned away anyone that needed help.** My mom has a strong sense of community and brings her all to everything she does. She raised my sister and I to fight for what we believe in and to care for our community. As a State Representative and as Labor Commissioner, I’ve seen her put her head down and deliver. She doesn’t talk about it but I will. **She fights to win.** I know in Congress she will fight for Oregon and won’t forget where she came from. She will continue to deliver for people who don’t have a voice and she will continue to do what she’s always done: show up, do the work and deliver for Oregonians. Today is a special day. Not only is it my Mom’s birthday and Valentine's day, it’s also Oregon’s birthday! On Valentine’s day in 1859, Oregon became a state. I can’t think of a better birthday present to Oregon than to help send my mom to Congress. **[So, for my mom's birthday, would you chip in $17 to her campaign right now? I know she'll be thrilled.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41798857/330386532/-1599294071?refcode=2022-02-14-birthday&recurring=0&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2e677b71-ef8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTY3N2I3MS1lZjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juTzwmvBNcI-Rv7p4_TYrJjQA-hiix-0bTnphu48lhw=)** clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I'm Val's son, Aidan.= Today's her birthday – that's right, on Valentine's Day – so I thought I'd take a chance to explain what makes her special to me. To start with, she is one of the hardest working people I've ever met. She was always there for me and my sister when we needed her while also working a full time job, organizing the PTO, campaigning for better schools, leading the state legislature on Oregon’s most pressing issues, or offering to help one of my classmates (whether I knew them or not) with anything they might need. She never turned away anyone that needed help. My mom has a strong sense of community and brings her all to everything she does. She raised my sister and I to fight for what we believe in and to care for our community. As a State Representative and as Labor Commissioner, I’ve seen her put her head down and deliver. She doesn’t talk about it but I will. She fights to win. I know in Congress she will fight for Oregon and won’t forget where she came from. She will continue to deliver for people who don’t have a voice and she will continue to do what she’s always done: show up, do the work and deliver for Oregonians. Today is a special day. Not only is it my Mom’s birthday and Valentine's day, it’s also Oregon’s birthday! On Valentine’s day in 1859, Oregon became a state. I can’t think of a better birthday present to Oregon than to help send my mom to Congress. = Aidan Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Team Bass
subject: We have a new opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
**BREAKING: A billionaire developer enters race for L.A. mayor**
Team — it's official. A billionaire developer has just entered the race for mayor of Los Angeles.

This could be a big problem. We're powered by the biggest grassroots team in the field, but this new opponent has the ability to entirely self-fund.

We're worried that this race will go from a campaign of ideas to a shopping trip for the richest person! We cannot let someone BUY this race.

This grassroots team has gotten us this far. We're going to have to dig deep, but with your help, we can take on this billionaire. We need to pull together to show everyone who's watching that we have what it takes to elect Karen as L.A.'s next mayor.

name: Marissa Tully
subject: Did you see this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

I want to make sure you saw our email from last week, because this PPP poll sets the tone for the entire campaign.

The bottom line is that we’re in a STATISTICAL TIE with Charlie Crist with six months until the Democratic primary.

But today, I want to share a few other findings we left out in our last email:

1. Nikki is dominating among younger voters
2. Charlie Crist has an abnormally high unfavorability rating among Black voters
3. Nikki has 19% more room to grow among undecideds than Charlie

We’re building a powerful grassroots movement here — and, like everything Nikki does, it’s something new. Our movement is a vibrant coalition of voters of every demographic: young voters, voters of color, and voters who have been overlooked for years by out of touch politicians like Charlie.

Long story short, we’re off to the races. And by the looks of this poll, it’s going to be a close finish.

Let’s make every single second count, Peter. Click here to rush a $5 donation and help us build on our momentum! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-feb-2022?refcode=214ppp]

Thanks!

— Marissa

-------- Begin Forwarded Message --------
From: Team Nikki
Date: Thu, Feb 10, 2022 at 4:15 PM
Subject: It's a DEAD HEAT

Peter —

This is HUGE news.

Public Policy Polling just released a new poll of likely Democratic voters that puts Nikki in a DEAD HEAT with Charlie Crist.

So, let’s talk numbers:

- Nikki has a net favorability of +40 compared to Crist’s +37
- In a head-to-head race, 34% of voters said they would support Nikki, while 36% would support Crist — putting us well within the margin of error
- Plenty of voters remain undecided — and plenty of them haven’t heard about our campaign to bring something new to Florida

With months to go until the primary, we’re already closing the gap. We have room for growth, and we have the advantage in favorability. In short, we’re well on our way to winning this race.

Now, all we need is your help, Peter. Nikki is the ONLY Democrat in this race who has what it takes to defeat Ron DeSantis, and we need to spread the word about her campaign. Can you chip in $10 to help us build on our momentum, close the gap, and bring something new to Florida? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-feb-2022?refcode=214ppp]

Thanks!

— Team Nikki

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Ron Wyden
subject: A promise I’ve kept, a thousand times.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799227/330387680/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGVhYjRlYS1mMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yFsKEcoeRuOB_bGpbkrKIlD5lqiewaW34XWntdi5Dw8=&emci=2955012b-ee8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ddeab4ea-f08d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Today is Oregon's 163rd birthday. It's also Valentine's Day, which makes it a good day to tell you why I love Oregon so much. I love Oregon because of the people. It's that simple. Oregonians are big-hearted, resilient, and full of love for this place we are proud to call home. Oregonians will always tell you exactly what they think, usually with a smile. And Oregonians show up — we show up when our neighbors need help, we show up on election day, and we show up when it's time to talk about the future. _That's the Oregon Way._ **Back when I first ran for the Senate, I promised Oregonians that I would visit every single county, every single year, and hold an open-to-all town hall meeting.** Not many people believed that I would keep that promise. Well, I'm proud to say that I have. From that first one in Fossil (population 515) to the 800th one in 2017 (over 3500 people in the gym!) **And later this month, I'll host my 1000th town hall.** Keeping my promise to host a town hall in every Oregon county, every year, has been one of my top priorities as Oregon's Senator. I love hearing about what's on the mind of working Oregonians because it guides my work in Washington D.C. every day. _That's the Oregon Way._ If you've attended one of my town halls, thank you for being part of this incredible milestone. I look forward to seeing you all at many more town halls to come. |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Ron Wyden](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799228/330387681/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGVhYjRlYS1mMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yFsKEcoeRuOB_bGpbkrKIlD5lqiewaW34XWntdi5Dw8=&emci=2955012b-ee8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ddeab4ea-f08d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9818364)**

I look forward to seeing you all at many more town halls to come. | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. ---|--- | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? . Click here to If you no longer want to hear from Ron Wyden, . Questions or concerns? . |

First, we were endorsed by 5 current and former State Assembly members, **Wisconsin State Assembly Minority Leader Greta Neubauer, three current and former Wisconsin State Senators, the Beloit City Council President, and WomenLead, an organization dedicated to advocating for women's rights.**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799235/330387770/-1782087676?refcode=em22_220214_maxvday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGZiMGMxNi1mMThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rj-IK6fbJbtEQlZN96W1FYnlhuKLkC_dRho-O1ayXK0=)

---
* We're super excited about the event in Janesville that will be happening later this month. The Roe campaign will be hosting our first fundraiser of the year on **February 27th** , I can't go – but I hope you do!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799237/330387799/-1782087676?refcode=em22_220214_maxvday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGZiMGMxNi1mMThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rj-IK6fbJbtEQlZN96W1FYnlhuKLkC_dRho-O1ayXK0=)

body:

Hey folks—it’s Andrea, Tim’s wife.

Tonight, Tim and I are going out to dinner to celebrate Valentine’s Day
(probably Italian, if I know anything about my husband). But before we
head offline, I wanted to send you a quick note.

Tim has been stressing about his $100,000 fundraising goal. He told me
that if we want any chance of winning this race, he needs the funds to go
on TV asap but his campaign just doesn’t have the resources.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7404?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2319%2E3611125%2EZC60XH ]Will you help me surprise Tim by chipping in
$25? Your
donation will help his campaign get in front of the far-right attacks
heading his way—which could make the difference between winning and losing
this race.

I want Ohio voters to see the Tim Ryan I know, before the GOP tries to
contort him into one of their far-fetched caricatures. So I really

Happy Valentine’s Day!

Andrea

clean_body: Collect them all! We made these for you. | | | Peter, Senator Sinema hasn’t shown her constituents any love. She ignores their interests, obstructs the Build Back Better Act, votes against raising the minimum wage, and hasn’t held a town hall in years. Instead, she spends her time crushing on conservative donors and getting love from corporate PACs. It’s time to hold her accountable, and we made some special Valentine’s cards to do just that. Will you pick your favorite one below and share it on social media? Happy Valentine’s Day, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. Friend,
---
As of this morning, early voting is officially underway here in Texas and election day is just 15 DAYS away.
---
_But today is also a critical fundraising deadline for us – it’s the FINAL mid-month deadline before election day._

And as it stands, we still need to make up another **$19,110** before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT.

Hello,
**$5,800.** That’s the maximum amount that a person can give to a candidate running for Senate. And a lot of candidates, like my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, wile away their time calling millionaires and flying to fancy dinners around the country to ask wealthy donors to cut them that $5,800 check.
**$24.42.** That’s OUR average contribution this month. And that’s what sets the people-powered campaign we’re building apart from Chuck Grassley’s. Grassley has a $3.7 million campaign war chest thanks to special interests. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. **My campaign is funded entirely by people like you, from across the country, giving what they can, when they can.**
So how does $24.42 compete with $5,800? By doing it together. I know in my bones that 250 people giving $24.42 is a lot stronger than one person giving $5,800. And a grassroots campaign is the only way we’ll defeat Chuck Graassley, take on the NRA, and rein in Wall Street.
**I’m facing my most important mid-month deadline yet, and we’ve set a big goal of raising $200,000 from grassroots donors like you before midnight tomorrow.**
**We’ve still got $21,671 left to raise, but if you and hundreds of others chip in right now, we will crush our goal and send Chuck Grassley packing this November:** [**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical mid-month deadline at midnight tomorrow – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799613/330390349/-42398318?refcode=em20220214pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNhMGQzNC1mMjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2H8-FpycIkgzyQRUOzAQLkxbqrmr5Z90M7HIXjB1EmY=)

name: Dan Farough
subject: Another attack on our elections
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

Recently, we learned that an unauthorized individual may have gained access to a vote tabulation machine in Roscommon County. This is illegal and directly aligns with so many of the attempts to access tabulators following the 2020 election to overturn the legitimate outcome and nullify the will of American citizens.

For example, in December of 2020 a third party accessed Dominion vote machines in Antrim County and used the data to falsely claim voter fraud. And we know that Trump’s lawyer, Rudy Giuliani, pressured a Michigan prosecutor to seize our voting machines. Finally, we also know that the Trump administration drafted an executive order to allow the Department of Defense to seize voting machines in swing states around the country.
The Department of Defense. Seizing our voting machines. Read that again.

No Michigander should have to worry about their vote being seized by an outside political force (and it goes without saying that the military seizing our voting machines under orders from political extremists fits into that category.) This goes against everything we’re working on together for our democracy.

Here’s what Jocelyn’s doing about it – and how she’s working to prevent it from happening in future elections:

Jocelyn referred the Roscommon matter to Attorney General Dana Nessel for further investigation.
She sent a letter to all of Michigan’s election clerks - appointed, Democratic and Republican - thanking them for their effort to protect election security, and providing guidance on how to deal with unauthorized individuals who attempt to gain access to election equipment.
And she continues to share information with federal authorities to ensure there is accountability for those who coordinated all these attempts across the country to undermine our democracy.

Make no mistake, we need Jocelyn Benson. We need her continued leadership on this issue and others that are sure to come, friend, or attacks like this will continue to plague our elections for years to come. Donate to Jocelyn’s re-election campaign so she can continue protecting our elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021422]

Donate>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021222

No Michigander should have to worry about their vote being seized by an outside political force (and it goes without saying that the military seizing our voting machines under orders from political extremists fits into that category.) This goes against everything we’re working on together for our democracy. Here’s what Jocelyn’s doing about it – and how she’s working to prevent it from happening in future elections: Jocelyn referred the Roscommon matter to Attorney General Dana Nessel for further investigation. She sent a letter to all of Michigan’s election clerks - appointed, Democratic and Republican - thanking them for their effort to protect election security, and providing guidance on how to deal with unauthorized individuals who attempt to gain access to election equipment. And she continues to share information with federal authorities to ensure there is accountability for those who coordinated all these attempts across the country to undermine our democracy. Make no mistake, we need Jocelyn Benson. We need her continued leadership on this issue and others that are sure to come, friend, or attacks like this will continue to plague our elections for years to come. Donate to Jocelyn’s re-election campaign so she can continue protecting our elections. [] Donate>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021222 [] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [] To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: Paid for by Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State PO Box 21368 Detroit, MI 48221 United States

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799868/330391059/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjNhMGQzNC1mMjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvYL0k1iVlzH2O51uHa6p8vclbDLPUbBmylRnoEiypg=&emci=435bfc1c-ed8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=923a0d34-f28d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Happy Valentine's Day, Peter.

Today, in the spirit of love, I'd like to send a Valentine. No, not to my husband of 32 years (love you, Phil), but to CA-27: the beautiful community I've called home for over four decades.

[**Valentine's Day not your thing? Chip in $5 to support my grassroots campaign and avoid the rest of the sappy love letter. >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799869/330391060/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220214_loveletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjNhMGQzNC1mMjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvYL0k1iVlzH2O51uHa6p8vclbDLPUbBmylRnoEiypg=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799870/330391061/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220214_loveletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjNhMGQzNC1mMjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvYL0k1iVlzH2O51uHa6p8vclbDLPUbBmylRnoEiypg=) Right here, in Santa Clarita, California is where I met my husband and raised our two amazing daughters. It's where I learned to drive on the California freeways, where I took my daughters camping, and where I found my love for public service.

From the stunning wilderness of the San Gabriel range to the sun-soaked neighborhoods of LA County, from mountains to the valley, from California mountain lion to California fan palm, this is the place I love and am proud to call home.

This is also the place where I found my voice, first in organized labor, then as a California school board delegate, and finally as a California Assemblywoman. Attending College of the Canyons, a community college in Santa Clarita and the same college my mother attended, gave me the education and backbone I needed to eventually run for Congress.

There are so many reasons why I love CA-27 – the arts, the schools, the culture, and the views are all up there – but you know what I love the most? It's the people. Running for Congress means you get to meet so many amazing ones, and this campaign is no exception.

From the activist moms working to end gun violence to the teachers who invest so much to educate our young people. From all the folks on construction crews building our roads so we can safely travel to the restaurant and service sector workers taking care of our community – it's the people who are truly the backbone of this district and from where I draw my inspiration.

While roses may be red (unlike CA-27 after November), and violets may be blue, this campaign is ultimately about you – and all the hardworking, everyday people who make up our wonderful community.

**[Rather than cards, chocolates, or roses – this Valentine's Day I'm asking for a donation to my campaign. Help bring my love of CA-27 to Congress where I can fight for the hardworking people of the district.>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799871/330391062/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220214_loveletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjNhMGQzNC1mMjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvYL0k1iVlzH2O51uHa6p8vclbDLPUbBmylRnoEiypg=) ** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799872/330391088/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220214_loveletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjNhMGQzNC1mMjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvYL0k1iVlzH2O51uHa6p8vclbDLPUbBmylRnoEiypg=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41799873/330391145/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220214_loveletter&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjNhMGQzNC1mMjhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvYL0k1iVlzH2O51uHa6p8vclbDLPUbBmylRnoEiypg=) Happy Valentine's Day,

Christy

Since we launched [Nuestro PAC in 2020,](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=83cbd61a46&e=b8f90417f9) with your help, we have invested:
* $2.9 million in advertising statewide across TV, radio, and digital in Arizona
* $1.25 million in advertising statewide across radio, digital, newspapers, and 380,000 mail pieces in Michigan
* $2 million in advertising across TV, digital, and 450,000 mail pieces in Pennsylvania

And we continue to do [much, much more](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=299d24401e&e=b8f90417f9) thanks to your unwavering support.

**Simply put, your support, generosity, and vision to create change that positively impacts our Latino communities have made this PAC possible.**

Because of you, we can continue to run culturally competent paid advertisements in English and Spanish via TV, radio, mail, phone calls, texts, newspapers, and digital ads. Thank you for helping run multi-layered, culturally competent paid bilingual communication strategies that help us talk to Latinos about what matters most to them.

To help us send out mail, digital ads, calls, texts, TV, and radio ads during this incredibly important midterm election year, please consider giving today.

subject: Peter,will you show us some love?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

Hey friend, Yasmine here, Dr. Kermit’s wife. His team asked if I wanted to send a note for Valentine’s Day, and I wasn’t going to turn down an opportunity to brag about my husband. Kermit and I met in Los Angeles. We were working at a community clinic that offered healthcare services to folks, regardless of their ability to pay. In typical love story fashion, I was the nurse practitioner, and he was the doctor. I know, I know, someone call the Hallmark channel! The way Kermit cared so deeply for his patients...I couldn’t help but fall for him. The feeling was mutual, and we’ve been together ever since. Over the years, I’ve watched Kermit develop from a bright and goofy young man into a loving father, a brilliant doctor, and a respected leader. I’m incredibly proud to call him my best friend, husband, and the father of our sons. To my man: Happy Valentine’s Day! I’ll see you at home. [And to everyone else: Help me wish Kermit a Happy Valentine’s Day by chipping in to support his campaign for Congress!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41800251/330395632/-1403528303?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220214valentinesday_yas_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjI2MTEwNC1mNDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aNM237p6XHRCApsYn9qmxlVlWpISEwujKk0dqXto6ow=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey friend, Yasmine here, Dr. Kermit’s wife. His team asked if I wanted to send a note for Valentine’s Day, and I wasn’t going to turn down an opportunity to brag about my husband. Kermit and I met in Los Angeles. We were working at a community clinic that offered healthcare services to folks, regardless of their ability to pay. In typical love story fashion, I was the nurse practitioner, and he was the doctor. I know, I know, someone call the Hallmark channel! The way Kermit cared so deeply for his patients...I couldn’t help but fall for him. The feeling was mutual, and we’ve been together ever since. Over the years, I’ve watched Kermit develop from a bright and goofy young man into a loving father, a brilliant doctor, and a respected leader. I’m incredibly proud to call him my best friend, husband, and the father of our sons. To my man: Happy Valentine’s Day! I’ll see you at home. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Sincerely, Yasmine | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. Fellow American,

At midnight, our campaign has an important fundraising deadline. Let me explain why it is so important we hit our fundraising goal:

1. I am running for Governor of Texas against a well-funded incumbent opponent. To overcome these advantages, my campaign is counting on the grassroots conservatives, like yourself, to make up the difference and build the momentum we need to win.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: What $5 can accomplish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)
---
If you knew that $5 could change the course of political history for a generation, would you make that contribution?

If you knew $5 could guarantee we **hold our Senate majority so we can pass President Biden’s bold agenda, prevent Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress, and keep America on the right track forward** , would you take that leap?

[**Now’s your chance: we’re running behind today’s $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and we need support from folks like you. Will you donate $5 now to help make up the difference and defend Democrats’ Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)

Here’s what I mean when I talk about $5, friend: President Biden's critical agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate, and Mitch McConnell only needs ONE seat to regain power. **That’s a single seat preventing McConnell from completely blocking President Biden’s transformative agenda -- and a single seat could be decided by a single vote.**

Democratic champions like Mark Kelly, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, and Catherine Cortez Masto are all up for re-election this year -- and we’re looking at four _extremely close_ races. _One loss_ could be _devastating._

**I’m not exaggerating when I tell you that $5 from supporters like you could decide our political future.** But right now, we’re still waiting on a contribution from you today, and I know you wouldn’t miss out on a chance like this to be a real difference-maker.

**[If everyone reading this message contributed right now, we’d hit today’s mid-month goal in no time. But as it stands right now, Republicans are threatening to out-raise us AGAIN. We can’t let that happen -- and it all starts with $5. Please, contribute now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=6&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)**
We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=8&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=9&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=10&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)
---

Republicans _will_ outraise us again if we don’t rise up and challenge them. And they could take back the Senate -- maybe by a margin so thin that meeting today’s $125,000 goal would be enough to stop them.

But we’ll never know unless folks across the country band together and pitch in $5 to protect our Senate majority.

I know that $5 doesn’t sound like a lot in the face of the GOP megadonor machine, but think of it this way: **we have strength in numbers, and if we learned anything in 2020, it’s that our numbers are greater -- as long as everyone steps up to do their part.**

[**Friend, control of the Senate is in our hands, and I’m counting on YOU to keep it there. $5 just might make the difference -- so please chip in now.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=11&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)

I'm so grateful to have you on our team,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6249?t=12&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220214-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)
| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2967_9716520_yB-zQf&akid=2967%2E9716520%2EyB-zQf)**.

subject: My son, Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I'm so proud of my son.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41800428/330397740/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGI1Y2FiNS1mNDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=izswKg6qeNvCYtbSpHsuqgrp6vfYnIQ2IFz6XrOKy10=)
---
Peter,

My name is Willie Takano – Mark’s dad. I’m so proud of my son and everything he’s accomplished – but I know he didn’t do it alone. It’s because of each of you, his supporters, that have helped him get elected to Congress where he has been able to do so much good work.

**But now, that work is at risk.** That’s because he’s behind on his fundraising goals and Republicans are eager to overtake his seat.

Look, I’ve seen America’s dark side before. When I was young, my family was forced into a Japanese American internment camp. Those were hard days. But since then, we’ve come a long way.

Now, I worry about that dark side emerging again. Extremist Republicans have spread hateful rhetoric and anti-Asian sentiment has reared its head once more.

**But seeing my son fighting for progress and justice as a lawmaker gives me hope. I know that good Democrats like you and Mark can make a difference.**

[**Peter, Mark has a huge fundraising deadline tomorrow and he still needs to raise $3,000. clean_body: I'm so proud of my son. | = Peter, My name is Willie Takano – Mark’s dad. I’m so proud of my son and everything he’s accomplished – but I know he didn’t do it alone. It’s because of each of you, his supporters, that have helped him get elected to Congress where he has been able to do so much good work. But now, that work is at risk. That’s because he’s behind on his fundraising goals and Republicans are eager to overtake his seat. Look, I’ve seen America’s dark side before. When I was young, my family was forced into a Japanese American internment camp. Those were hard days. But since then, we’ve come a long way. Now, I worry about that dark side emerging again. Extremist Republicans have spread hateful rhetoric and anti-Asian sentiment has reared its head once more. But seeing my son fighting for progress and justice as a lawmaker gives me hope. I know that good Democrats like you and Mark can make a difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for your support. | Friend,

| Last Friday, Oklahoma Congressman Frank Lucas, the ranking Republican member of the U.S. House Committee on Science, Space and Technology, appointed me as the Republican Leader and Ranking Member of the Subcommittee on Research and Technology. This is an amazing opportunity, and I am so humbled that Congressman Lucas and our leadership have entrusted me with this responsibility. Above all else, this will help me continue to deliver the results you deserve. We are on the cusp of making groundbreaking discoveries into precision agriculture, biofuels research, and so much more that will grow our economy and help us compete with the growing threats of China and Russia. And we can’t take our foot off the pedal now. I am ready to roll up my sleeves and deliver results for our rural communities, family farms, small businesses, and main streets. I wouldn’t be in this position without your continued support. Thank you for always standing with me. Randy
---
|

Breaking news: **Donald Trump just endorsed Loren Culp, the most extreme of my right-wing GOP opponents in Washington’s 4th Congressional District.**

I’m running for Congress to take on extremist Republicans like Loren Culp, stand up for Central Washington, and fight for a better future for all of us. I’m ready to help our communities thrive as a strong advocate in the halls of Congress — but that means we’ll have to go toe-to-toe with our GOP opponents.

[Will you help us fight back against Donald Trump and Loren Culp? Rush a donation of any amount to help us flip this seat from red to blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41800562/330400342/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_NO_220214_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWVmN2FkYS1mNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXGFaatBnLoWUIzlcKITk7QD_rVW5W37HvW6vvJTRbQ=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41800563/330400343/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_NO_220214_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWVmN2FkYS1mNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXGFaatBnLoWUIzlcKITk7QD_rVW5W37HvW6vvJTRbQ=) You may remember Loren Culp as the Republican gubernatorial nominee in 2020. He spent his campaign railing against mask mandates and efforts to protect our communities from COVID-19. And after he lost, he joined Trump in promoting the Big Lie, lobbing baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. Yesterday, before the Trump endorsement he sent a message to his supporters about the “Chinese virus.”

**Loren Culp’s dangerous political views are why he was endorsed by Donald Trump — and exactly why we can’t let him get any further.**

[I’m running a grassroots campaign to take on Republicans like Loren Culp and stand up for our priorities in Congress — but I can’t do this without you. Will you rush a donation right now to support my campaign and help defeat Culp?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41800564/330400344/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_NO_220214_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWVmN2FkYS1mNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXGFaatBnLoWUIzlcKITk7QD_rVW5W37HvW6vvJTRbQ=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41800565/330400345/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_NO_220214_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWVmN2FkYS1mNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXGFaatBnLoWUIzlcKITk7QD_rVW5W37HvW6vvJTRbQ=) We can’t let up — not for a second. We have to keep fighting for the kind of future that Central Washingtonians deserve.

Thanks for being a part of this.

— Doug

clean_body: | | Breaking news: Donald Trump just endorsed Loren Culp, the most extreme of my right-wing GOP opponents in Washington’s 4th Congressional District. I’m running for Congress to take on extremist Republicans like Loren Culp, stand up for Central Washington, and fight for a better future for all of us. I’m ready to help our communities thrive as a strong advocate in the halls of Congress — but that means we’ll have to go toe-to-toe with our GOP opponents. = = You may remember Loren Culp as the Republican gubernatorial nominee in 2020. He spent his campaign railing against mask mandates and efforts to protect our communities from COVID-19. And after he lost, he joined Trump in promoting the Big Lie, lobbing baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. Yesterday, before the Trump endorsement he sent a message to his supporters about the “Chinese virus.” Loren Culp’s dangerous political views are why he was endorsed by Donald Trump — and exactly why we can’t let him get any further. = = We can’t let up — not for a second. We have to keep fighting for the kind of future that Central Washingtonians deserve. Thanks for being a part of this. — Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. | Peter,
Single party rule has been setting us back here in the state of Nevada...
It has total command over our elections, is targeting our rights and freedoms, and is focusing on serving the rights of criminals instead of ours.
It's been my job to keep our communities safe from danger for the last 30+ years. When I become Governor, that's also going to mean breaking up the total Democrat control in Carson City and Keeping Nevada Safe from Single Party Rule. [Will you help me make it happen?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fi-J3zT1GzKQLuqC1xjQciJHeSuTpiJ5qaGjLlF6rc0WjfiJa8BUWz_zZ1-uxMe7DZh8Z_kucXy-4ZKGbCm7tOkBT9hSBEBRNwR521HbaQjk8VSps_LZ2bcdvjQ-8M61wniiM0kHcnepPNOSMv68jF-_rCMTHFi9-tvxXTDuT7gGjokykLgYc1em4ibyGgumACejlF1mAN1PF5LV8GISX7hOusCEFSkXmWrom0grar8=&c=ewRbJfJar3xtvYHgH7vmVK2bp0JH3wc5H_-lipZyF2C-QJKkwDVzBw==&ch=T4chhn3OAuQmdt9rCgOZuoLl-m15_LFgSC404vxKCpVJYTJmenac8Q==)

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Dirty Tricks Alert -- MLG Attacks Me In GOP Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is already resorting to dirty tricks. The Democrat Party of New Mexico has launched an attack ad against me in the R Peter, Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is already resorting to dirty tricks. The Democrat Party of New Mexico has launched an attack ad against me in the Republican primary! Why? MLG clearly knows I will defeat her and is desperate to avoid facing me in the general election. She hopes the attack ads will trick Republicans into nominating a weak candidate, so she can win re-election. MLG is right to be afraid of me – **polling shows that I’m already tied with her 46% to 46%****.** And I’m leading her among Independents by 16 points! From her open border policies to her extreme and failed approach to COVID to her soft-on-crime record that she’s trying so desperately to paper over, MLG is out-of-touch with New Mexicans. She knows I will be able to make the case to voters that she has failed and that our conservative approach for the future is better for New Mexico. [**Don’t let her and the Democrat Party get away with this! clean_body: They underestimate YOU. | Friend, While it may seem daunting to go up against Tony Evers’ $10.5 million in cash on hand, I want you to know that we have something far more valuable... ...patriots like YOU. Time and again, the Democrats make the same mistake – they underestimate you. You see, it’s not about the amount our supporters give,but the sheer size of our grassroots coalition that will WIN this toss-up governor’s race. Friend, I will never forget all the support my family and I have received during this campaign. Because of patriots like you, we came out of the gate strong last year and now Tony Evers is scrambling to salvage his failing reelection bid. But our monthly fundraising goals are vital to keeping up our momentum – and we simply can’t afford to fall behind as early as halfway through the month. Without the continued support of our entire grassroots coalition, Evers will use his $10.5 million in cash on hand to attack and slander me and give himself the lifeline he so desperately needs. I’m counting on you to help me fight back before tonight’s critical deadline. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Quick, before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
Right now, we are still short of our $10,000 mid-month grassroots fundraising goal. We've got to meet this benchmark by midnight to continue organizing across our district and win this critical open seat for progress.
I'm asking, please pitch in $5, $10, $25 -- whatever you can -- so we can keep reaching voters and I can fight to end health care disparities, stand up for racial equity, and reform our unjust and often predatory criminal justice system for all of us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_link1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Give $5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=abx5] Give $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=abx10]
Give $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25] Give $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50]
Give $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode2=abx100] Give Other » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=abx-other]

We need fresh voices in Congress who will deliver real results instead of empty rhetoric. The work I'm doing in the Maryland House of Delegates -- like banning solitary confinement for juveniles and pregnant women, funding a grocery store in a food desert, and getting the first cardiac care unit in Prince George’s County built -- is making a difference. If enough of us pull together, I can do much more in Congress.
Our primary election in this solidly blue district is in less than four months. But I don't have deep pockets, and reaching voters is expensive. My family fought their way to the middle class, so our people-powered campaign relies on grassroots supporters to give whatever they can to make sure we get our message out.
Chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can to make sure we meet our mid-month goal by midnight and stay on track for victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_link2]
Change can't wait,
Jazz Lewis
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

body:
President Biden is SOUNDING THE ALARM:

| **Peter, Democrats in crucial swing elections are worried of a MAGA takeover – so President Biden is SOUNDING THE ALARM:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41800840/330406938/2092632403?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220214_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzNzc0NDdjLWY4OGQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rme89FlNntC8z8xJWu7yc1D5YyoQKCudc6aKSYBsHKM=) President Biden is RIGHT, Peter! From the Supreme Court, to Voting Rights, to COVID-19 – EVERYTHING is on the line. __We CANNOT afford to lose this year!__

clean_body: | | | | Click to send —> | Peter, Ever notice how close your favorite Washington D.C. Insiders are? Liz Cheney and Nancy Pelosi are such great friends that Pelosi asked Cheney to take the lead on the sham Jan 6 committee! These two are such great friends, that we wanted to do something special for them. That is why we decided this Valentine's Day to help send a Digital Candy Valentine for them. Help us send a Digital Candy Valentine by clicking. To show our appreciation for their friendship, we decided to customize the candies: BFF, D.C. insiders 4 eva, I Need You, and even UR The Best. you, Team Hageman | | | |

body:

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: I'll get right to it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
It's time to report our numbers again.
#
Hey, Nick here.
I'll get right to it: Our next Texas Ethics Commission (TEC) mandatory reporting deadline is coming up this Saturday, February 19, and we can't afford to be outraised by Greg Abbott again.

As a reminder, here's what the last two public filings showed:
**Candidate** | **Total raised** | **Time period**
---|---|---
Beto O'Rourke | $7.2 million | 11/15/21-12/31/21
Greg Abbott | $18.9 million | 7/1/21-12/31/21
Beto O'Rourke | $1.3 million | 1/1/22-1/20/22
Greg Abbott | $1.4 million | 1/1/22-1/20/22
Greg Abbott outraised us in both filings since Beto joined the race, all while adding to his $62 million cash-on-hand. But the good news is that we've shown we have _far more grassroots support than Greg Abbott._
**Now, we need to show Texans that we can fundraise a lot faster than Abbott and take on his corporate mega-donors.** That's why I'm reaching out today to see if you can help us pick up the pace and ensure we outraise Abbott this time around.
[We've set a goal to raise $250,000 by Saturday at midnight, and falling short is not an option. Please, pitch in your first $3 contribution right now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52876?refcode=ema20220214-176227&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=176227%2E444211%2EeOgOI6)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52876?refcode=ema20220214-176227&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=176227%2E444211%2EeOgOI6)**
**Your donation before Saturday's deadline is in investment in the campaign we're building to take on Abbott.** Every dollar will go towards building the infrastructure we need to run the largest grassroots campaign Texas has ever seen. And it will show that we can elect the first Democratic governor of Texas in decades without a cent from corporate PACs.
We're already making history. We have over 44,000 folks volunteering — writing letters, calling voters, and talking to Texans at their door. Beto has already been to dozens of counties and met thousands of folks. And as of today, we surpassed our goal of contacting 2 million voters in February — and we’re aiming to reach a million more before March 1st.
**But, if we're going to reach our goals and win this election, we can't suffer a blowout on the money side.**
**This grassroots team has had Beto's back before, so I have to ask you personally:**[Can Beto count on you to be one of the supporters we need to step up and chip in before Saturday's TEC deadline?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52876?refcode=ema20220214-176227&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=176227%2E444211%2EeOgOI6)
Thanks for everything you do,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220214-176227-footer&t=22&refcode2=176227_444211_eOgOI6&akid=176227%2E444211%2EeOgOI6)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=176227%2E444211%2EeOgOI6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=176227%2E444211%2EeOgOI6)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

** **Alyssa Alhadeff. Scott Beigel. Martin Duque Anguiano. Nicholas Dworet. Aaron Feis. Jaime Guttenberg. Chris Hixon. Luke Hoyer. Cara Loughran. Gina Montalto. Joaquin Oliver. Alaina Petty. Meadow Pollack. Helena Ramsay. Alex Schachter. Carmen Schentrup. Peter Wang.** Team, today we remember the 17 lives that were stolen 4 years ago in the senseless violence at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High school. 4 years of mourning, remembering, and 4 years of inaction by Congress and the White House. You all know my story by this point, gun violence in Chicago isn’t something any of us could escape, so we organized. But leading the largest gun violence prevention nonprofit in the state of Illinois and sitting on the Biden-Harris transition team’s task force on gun violence isn't enough to curb gun violence nationwide. Not while Congress and the White House refuse to act. How many school shootings or thoughts and prayers does it take for our government to do something about it? Not lip service, not tweets, but actual common sense gun safety legislation to ban assault weapons, expand background checks, close loopholes, invest in community violence intervention programs and hold the gun industry accountable. **This problem is not unsolvable. With common sense gun safety legislation, as well as combating the root causes of gun violence by investing in healthcare, jobs, housing, and education, we can make our communities safer by investing in them.** Today, March for Our Lives, Guns Down America, and Change the Ref launched [https://www.shockmarket.org/](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDAbtAVc76C_zuoFjgjXKPsgfv3Nmce6GKR4cb3E8u9lBHsYQQKuAzDwiolPetLqTU0n0j1co-7hAe4IRyVpFv26qVA1eqINAxH7oYLYB-xaZEnKCKJcoX3EQtXqIsZIMf8OYu5RD5C6iUqVycVttdIye2yA_5FNkI2C0CcBybA9sjYKMZaUtop4nxj0LpWVmpBZHdlHv6OZc7-SIeWw7GihPH0iaz5XUha50qIgTFjb3eA9KbAH57vKyOI-R5MVv1w/3jk/FK2jjzhkSLmgDRFAHYz1gw/h1/4_0pOlhTr0-rujBtCdleRngrzWIX-5L6Ce9eIGlTUi4) to document just how pervasive gun violence is in our country and what we can do about it. While we mourn the lives stolen at the hands of gun violence today, we owe it to them to demand a better future for our country. In Solidarity, Kina Collins

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, In the New Hampshire State Senate recently, we’ve worked to achieve success after success... We’ve attained the lowest poverty rate in America, are the number one state for taxpayer return on investment, consistently rank as the freest state in the nation, gave more than $300 million in tax relief for working families, and so much more - we’ve shown that there’s a way of doing things here in the 603 that’s just better. But what’s been coming out of Washington D.C. during the same time? The highest inflation rates in 40 years, excessive spending that’s creating unsustainable debt for future generations, diminished energy independence, open borders, and otherDISASTERS! It’s clear that we need leaders who will do things the 603 way - NOT the D.C. way! __ | | | | | | | | | | | As much as we’ve seen success in the Granite State, we’re still being held back as long as we’re being represented by the likes of Maggie Hassan. She’s gone along with every piece of the disastrous Biden agenda, even thoughSIXTY PERCENTof folks in New Hampshire disapprove of the President’s job performance! That’s not representing our state - that’s serving the interests of the D.C. crowd. I’m on a mission to stop this, and to unseat Maggie Hassan so that we can make sure New Hampshire is represented in Washington - not the other way around! If you’re on board, will you send in any support you can to this campaign? It’s going to take all hands on deck to finally prioritize OUR interests! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing up for the 603, Chuck Morse ___ | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | Friends of Chuck Morse | | PO Box 106 North Salem, NH 03073 | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friends,
Many of you have reached out with questions about the new New York Congressional districts, so I am writing today to explain the process of redistricting, what the new NY-3 looks like, and why this race is important.
Earlier this month, the New York state legislature voted on new Congressional maps after the bipartisan commission failed to come to an agreement to pass maps. This process, called redistricting, is done every 10 years in accordance with new data from the U.S. Census. This is what NY-3 now looks like:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?source=em220214-1-15&refcode2=484_59515_BgPGOr&akid=484%2E59515%2EBgPGOr)
As you can see, this new district encompasses much of Long Island, parts of Westchester including my hometown of Pelham, and some of the Bronx.
**Now, here’s why this is a race to watch:** the current representative from NY-3 is not running for this seat in 2022, and the district has a history of conservative representation. The _Cook Political Report_ says that this will be a competitive election.
So it’s important that we have the resources to come out on top both in the primary and general elections. If you are able, please:
[**Make a contribution to support my campaign for New York’s 3rd district. This is sure to be a close race, so any amount you can give, even $3, will go a long way.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?source=em220214-1-15&refcode2=484_59515_BgPGOr&akid=484%2E59515%2EBgPGOr)
All my best,
Alessandra
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?source=em220214-1-15&refcode2=484_59515_BgPGOr&akid=484%2E59515%2EBgPGOr)**

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=484%2E59515%2EBgPGOr).

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America Donald J. Trump February 14th, 2022 Funny thing about Susan Collins, who is absolutely atrocious, and has been for a long time, I won Maine 2, by a lot, and those hard working people attended a rally of many thousands. Just one word about her and the fact that she didn’t help the fisherman, as their rights were taken from them from the federal government, and the lumberjacks, she would have had no chance to win. But I remained silent and positive and allowed her to have her victory. She would have lost in a landslide. Gee, aren’t I nice? | Donald J. Trump February 14th, 2022 I was proven right about the spying, and I will be proven right about 2020! Donald J. Trump February 14th, 2022 Can you imagine that, what should be the biggest story of our time, bigger than Watergate, is getting absolutely no mention, ZERO, in the New York Times, Washington Post, ABC Fake News, NBC Fake News, CBS Fake News, ratings-dead CNN, and MSDNC. This in itself is a scandal, the fact that a story so big, so powerful, and so important for the future of our Nation is getting zero coverage from LameStream, is being talked about all over the world. Just like they wouldn’t talk about the many Biden corruption scandals prior to the Election, (or for that matter now!), they won’t talk about this, which is potentially even bigger. It shows how totally corrupt and shameless the media is. Can you imagine if the roles were reversed and the Republicans, in particular President Donald Trump, got caught illegally spying into the Office of the President? All hell would break loose and the electric chair would immediately come out of retirement. The good news is, everybody is talking about not only this atrocity against our Nation, but that the press refuses to even mention the major crime that took place. Donald J. Trump February 13th, 2022 Could somebody please inform the low-rated political shows that plague our Sunday morning programming that my Endorsement of candidates is much stronger today than it was even prior to the 2020 Election Scam. I am almost unblemished in the victory count, and it is considered by the real pollsters to be the strongest endorsement in U.S. political history. There are plenty of existing politicians who wouldn’t be in power now were it not for my Endorsement (like the Old Crow!). The Fake News does everything within their power to diminish and belittle but the people know, and the politicians seeking the Endorsement really know! Donald J. Trump February 13th, 2022 THEY SPIED ON THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES! Donald J. Trump February 13th, 2022 What Hillary Clinton and the Radical Left Democrats did with respect to spying on a President of the United States, even while in office, is a far bigger crime than Watergate. It will be interesting to see how it was covered by the media and what Mitch McConnell and the RINOs will be doing about it. This is an insult to the Republican Party, but a far greater insult to our Nation. Covered very powerfully this morning by Fox and Friends and, of course, Maria Bartiromo. Donald J. Friends,

Early voting has started, and we need your help to win this campaign. body:
Texas’ 28th district is ready for systematic change and deserves a Progressive who will fight for them. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrReHuEMYyFK8mZSe02p6eWLiYAvLrpJk1rcL5bcbuQHSAHBqzWrkqrs0HxgOVbb9WgPeCq3BRukCPcXoFuGmOAvazfRBjRgGsbJqG-OSg0Vc_sMedBiCDGPsWTUyU73PT0VRP6D2UMVC6a1_uVck9fVi9RAjT05wERfEvr9cOvDVwqTKUuNqMfTBECQAaCKx9_cHwLybI1hDGRFPsuXJPNnuoUjLSkNg9XX9GyX3QYMUJ/3jk/T5mBw5oyQpWS72DAwFs3pA/h0/lH4AgvuwAQyu94UblPzma2N9hhvygo5pYfElK6p0z1s) Hi Peter, it’s Bernie Sanders. **Today, I’m proud to announce my endorsement for Jessica Cisneros.** Jessica knows that real change comes from the bottom on up, not from the top on down. She will fight for the working class in Congress and together we will build a movement to transform this nation so that it works for all our people. With early voting already underway, now is the time to show that our movement supports Jessica today. [**_Today, I am writing to ask you to contribute to progressive Jessica’s campaign for TX-28 to oust a corporate Democrat. Let me explain why this request is so important — especially today._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCr6bmv5VkeE0Z9WXnZDVO3ZpK3HdnIPf76d6NSiwnM50q3TVEb6S38Sozgsx2HBoMEVHtCt8CtNE5stx8XTs8uHTvijs9Qlr_5GSIdTqEIj1J_aIgg4qMG3u2RXNDZropyev7ZXS_IrSFvM9c2oPPxqI45Pzwlx6vvkI9NzoEp25iwgYKtcgeQqdPIlhJ6mEdbAwfDio544msSDIg1zykk_bSP5wqri3LiXHUrQN2VFk0gGCShLMaEuTueG9Atdg6xjsvFKFFuQ5oogmiOK59WwZst1cvAniIEyGX23q2jeoDeBX61MrcaMN3MRk_O88XPHCZ_7Vmx-O932PBhc4mEw/3jk/T5mBw5oyQpWS72DAwFs3pA/h1/NksGAjbBn3JixhgZfgYSoP4sRTKLP3Z6022gi8aGSVI) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCr6bmv5VkeE0Z9WXnZDVO3ZpK3HdnIPf76d6NSiwnM50ffyFiHSjqSiATPAC_o1vJ_mtviTRigaHMXVp-70mQCUBJHasQAh_OxfLpkdcGpwP_SKRceZnDbDcFJ1Xmyre9PSQqBPBNjEIAsdKANRCgJYfOfd6ANIZQmmLdQVAZo4RHuM0xXnVy_VF6218yE6JwuKZN1ypd5-9kCwuj51F6P9Ahp3zfdoBKbe6vVYDGwZZrzSswJ5XhXlX-4Y_wvPU4GCBGH1EE6FPdN55K5UfHwRxuTrdFpam70rWw-yjZ3uEU99y-fRLF6e2bm0MOtTrwDytq4Azj4TontkOeMNyyoQ/3jk/T5mBw5oyQpWS72DAwFs3pA/h2/OJIT73nIqY2eLvIig13scX-pmeAYVrx-vzGgdNNvrNk) Our progressive values are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby, anti-abortion rights extremists, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel giants are using their deep pockets to block progressive change in Washington and attack our rights across the country. During times like these, it’s important that TX-28 elects a progressive who will fight for them and their families — not corporate donors and special interest groups. The people of Texas’ 28th district are ready for change. They deserve a representative who will fight for working families instead of the 1%. **That’s why I’m proud to endorse Jessica Cisneros for Congress.** I’m confident that Jessica will uphold our progressive values, and treat health care, bodily autonomy, immigrant rights, workers’ rights, and economic freedom as human rights. **She knows our diversity is our strength and that when progressives are unapologetic about our values and who we’re in this battle for, we win.** It’s time South Texans have a champion in Congress who does just that. [**_This is an important moment for our movement. With our progressive values under constant attack, we must elect incredible progressives who will fight for the bold and transformative change we need. So if you can, please make a contribution today to elect Jessica to Congress._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCr6bmv5VkeE0Z9WXnZDVO3ZpK3HdnIPf76d6NSiwnM53XXwxlDjP9YdTp_pczu6R2rw26OHG3xdSquzIaqtAoOIOBZrWS5CrfYS5l9AgLmllK0yFzC6o7PArMVIcHDEoYC90mRutR9td44hvWkKPfPpEXE2fg8tuK_NzKzpIrNfdJ4FbMeyF-JenJk7DtJ577jxn4JD91QJ3eXuQAX9xrEQ0kJeLl6iS8OkdHD9vDDH57BpdJoiFpCrk163PXYaDosgCG-J8JnP6fJPwU2ZO51q69ZDcar4DCGHL24P_Qkq6Udc5xv1bW4HJPDDEBzlOce7QO7F-P9bjlVqK62tI7wQ/3jk/T5mBw5oyQpWS72DAwFs3pA/h3/MtfOddx9uH6_x8ckE3fQYsl8iJJbPoifPiSdMUc8acg) clean_body: Texas’ 28th district is ready for systematic change and deserves a Progressive who will fight for them. | | | Hi Peter, it’s Bernie Sanders. Today, I’m proud to announce my endorsement for Jessica Cisneros. Jessica knows that real change comes from the bottom on up, not from the top on down. She will fight for the working class in Congress and together we will build a movement to transform this nation so that it works for all our people. With early voting already underway, now is the time to show that our movement supports Jessica today. Our progressive values are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby, anti-abortion rights extremists, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel giants are using their deep pockets to block progressive change in Washington and attack our rights across the country. During times like these, it’s important that TX-28 elects a progressive who will fight for them and their families — not corporate donors and special interest groups. The people of Texas’ 28th district are ready for change. They deserve a representative who will fight for working families instead of the 1%. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Jessica Cisneros for Congress. I’m confident that Jessica will uphold our progressive values, and treat health care, bodily autonomy, immigrant rights, workers’ rights, and economic freedom as human rights. She knows our diversity is our strength and that when progressives are unapologetic about our values and who we’re in this battle for, we win. It’s time South Texans have a champion in Congress who does just that. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for being a part of this. — Bernie | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042
