name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Communist Media Terrified of Decertification
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I'm standing strong |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dc6952a7c3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I made waves just a couple of days ago by sponsoring groundbreaking legislation to recall electors in Maricopa, Pima, and Yuma counties in Arizona.

**And the media absolutely hates it.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=044b40f5e1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **According to Laurie Roberts, this crucial bill should be “dispatched to oblivion.”**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=20bc03ef36&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This article which came out yesterday is trying to convince people this bill is a “show,” and that I’m not dead serious.

_Talking Points Memo_ reads:

_Within hours of Arizona state Rep. Mark Finchem (R) introducing his bill to “decertify” and “set aside” the 2020 election results in three of Arizona’s largest counties, two things happened._

_Donald Trump celebrated the move in a public statement, calling it “Big News in Arizona!”_

_And Arizona House Speaker Rusty Bowers (R) essentially doomed the bill to failure: “Mr. Finchem’s obviously unconstitutional and profoundly unwise proposal will receive all of the consideration it deserves,” Bowers said in a statement._

_The two statements say a lot about Finchem’s bill: It’s likely not going anywhere, and it also thrilled Finchem’s most important supporter in his campaign to become Arizona’s next secretary of state._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ebdd1cfb77&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Here, I am being attacked with the suggestion that the NFL move the Super Bowl out of Arizona because I support election integrity. Ridiculous and petty. When they mock me, they are really dismissing you. I will not let that happen.

**They won’t challenge me to my face. They won’t debate me. But they will threaten the Super Bowl.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9fd78f6963&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Even _Vice_ interviewed me on Election integrity.**

_Finchem is a staunch advocate for the so-called audit in Arizona which was conducted last spring by Cyber Ninjas, a company that had no prior experience with election audits._

_When asked about the election reviews that did occur, and that did not find evidence of widespread voter fraud, Finchem told VICE News, “That is absolutely crap and you know it. You didn't look at the findings.”_

_At Trump’s first rally of the year in Florence, Arizona in early January, Finchem got a primetime speaking slot. “Ladies and gentlemen,” he told the crowd, “We know it and they know it. Donald Trump won.”_

_Trump has already said what he expects from his chosen secretaries of state if they win. In a video for a Pennsylvania Republican group, the former president said, “There’s a famous statement– sometimes the vote-counter is more important than the candidate. And we can’t let that ever ever happen again.”_

_When asked if he would certify the 2024 election results, no matter the outcome, Finchem told VICE News, “It's a hypothetical I can't answer. You're asking me, ‘OK, no matter what happens in an election, would you certify it?’ Only a moron would say yes.”_

**There’s a clear pattern here. We make big strides in Election Integrity and the media freaks out. Every. Single. Time.**

_If this wasn’t real, if we weren’t a threat, then Biden’s attack dogs wouldn’t be after us. We have seen exponentially more attacks because we are making exponential progress._

[_Please help me push forward with this critical bill to decertify. I can’t do it without your help. Donate today!_

_This is the only way to stop election fraud in the future. This is the only way to fight back against the unjust, incompetent, and evil coup of a Presidency that is the Joe Biden administration. Join the fight today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ddf53cc064&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dbf9deb5ed&e=44b8c466b0)

From: Jerry Evans for Congress <info@jerryforcongress.com>
Date: Sat, Feb 12, 2022 at 11:41 AM
Subject: 🔑 Key Endorsement Alert
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
---
| | _**BREAKING: Former Illinois Supreme Court Chief Justice and Chicago Bear Bob Thomas Endorses Jerry Evans for Congress**_
Friend,
Our campaign just received a HUGE endorsement from former Illinois Supreme Court Chief Justice and Chicago Bear Bob Thomas.

Chief Justice Thomas has been a champion for Illinois for decades, and it is truly an honor to have his support.

Read Chief Justice Thomas's full endorsement here:
---
| | **Former Illinois Supreme Court Chief Justice Bob
Thomas Endorses Jerry Evans for Congress**

_"From the Gridiron to the Courtroom, Bob Thomas
has always been a Voice Illinois Can Trust "_
**WARRENVILLE, IL** \- Today, Jerry Evans, Republican Congressional Candidate in
Illinois' 11th District, announced that Illinois Supreme Court Chief Justice and former Chicago Bear Bob Thomas has endorsed his candidacy. This major endorsement from the highly prominent Illinoisan Thomas is indicative of the tremendous momentum Evans has garnered shortly after announcing his candidacy.

**"| am endorsing Jerry Evans for US Congress. Jerry Evans is a committed
husband, father, teacher, and businessman. He is a man of integrity, service, and hard work. He is a committed Christian with conservative values. After sitting down with Jerry and taking the time to ask him the tough questions, am convinced he would represent conservative, pro-life, and pro-family values in the halls of Congress," **writes Bob Thomas.**"Jerry has done the hard work of
garnering support that has positioned him well to win a Republican Primary, and he has the message and skills to reach independents and swing voters to prevail in the 2022 General Election."**

**"From the Gridiron to the Courtroom, Bob Thomas has always been a trustworthy voice for Illinois," **writes Jerry Evans.**"It is truly an honor to receive his endorsement, and I am proud to continue building the coalition Illinois needs to flip the 11th District."** ###
---
| Just like Chief Justice Thomas, I promise to be a fighter and a WINNER for Illinois.

If you'd like to join Chief Justice Thomas in supporting our campaign, [you can contribute $10 or more today. >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=05633a4baf&e=b78e7c4d40)

Thank you,

Jerry Evans
Republican Candidate of Congress, (IL-11)

---

name: Andy Levin
subject: Peter, all workers have the right to form a union. Sign your name if you agree >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress
body:
This uprising of workers across the country and on Capitol Hill is a reckoning for those in power.
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793214/330363703/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220214_p_a_union&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2JiY2QyZS1kOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPk8TNVnQxKVEoQANyuP0dLw4sL-FZR9N5ROnQUp5po=&emci=e3853cdd-f68c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d3bbcd2e-d98d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793215/330363704/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220214_p_a_union&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2JiY2QyZS1kOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPk8TNVnQxKVEoQANyuP0dLw4sL-FZR9N5ROnQUp5po=&emci=e3853cdd-f68c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d3bbcd2e-d98d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926)
---
| | Peter, I want to take a second to talk about something historic that happened last week on Capitol Hill, how it’s part of a larger trend and how we can fight side-by-side to make it a whole lot less novel. After countless workers in Congress shared their stories of the workplace environment they endure, I was proud to introduce legislation that would allow for staff to form unions in our House offices and committees. Workers’ rights are human rights, and everyone deserves a just and safe working environment, with fair wages and equitable benefits. Over 130 of my Democratic colleagues have cosponsored my resolution, and I’m thrilled to stand in solidarity with the workers organizing this effort. Of course, this issue is way, way bigger than Capitol Hill. Across the country, workers are raising their voices and taking to the streets with a clear message for employers everywhere who treat their employees poorly and barely pay a living wage: time’s up. Working people are demanding change, and CEOs are getting a wake-up call. [_**Peter, every worker deserves the opportunity to join a union. It’s time to show the bosses — from Washington to board rooms — that we’re demanding action. Add your name in support of the right to form a union right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793216/330363705/1282557617?refcode=em_20220214_p_a_union&ms=em_20220214_p_a_union&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2JiY2QyZS1kOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPk8TNVnQxKVEoQANyuP0dLw4sL-FZR9N5ROnQUp5po=&emci=e3853cdd-f68c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d3bbcd2e-d98d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) I’ve spent my career fighting for the rights of workers across Michigan — starting as a union organizer with the SEIU, and now in Congress. I’m honored to earn endorsements from some of the largest labor unions in the country (including SEIU!) in my reelection campaign, and I look forward to advancing worker-first policies in the House. The news that came out of Washington last week is just the tip of the iceberg, Peter. I’ve seen these efforts on the ground — last year, I fought alongside the Amazon employees in Bessemer, Alabama before union busting prevailed. After the NLRB declared Amazon had cheated, the workers there are voting again right now! And earlier this month, I joined Starbucks employees in Clinton Township, Michigan to stand in solidarity as they aim to unionize. These moments motivate me every day to keep fighting for progressive values – so working people can get the fair share they’ve earned. [_**Sign your name if you agree that every worker has the right to form and join a union, Peter. This is what I came to Congress to do, to amplify the voice and power of working people to bring about the fundamental change we need. I hope you’ll join me.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41793217/330363706/1282557617?refcode=em_20220214_p_a_union&ms=em_20220214_p_a_union&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2JiY2QyZS1kOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPk8TNVnQxKVEoQANyuP0dLw4sL-FZR9N5ROnQUp5po=&emci=e3853cdd-f68c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d3bbcd2e-d98d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) Let’s go!
---

clean_body: This uprising of workers across the country and on Capitol Hill is a reckoning for those in power. | | | | | Peter, I want to take a second to talk about something historic that happened last week on Capitol Hill, how it’s part of a larger trend and how we can fight side-by-side to make it a whole lot less novel. After countless workers in Congress shared their stories of the workplace environment they endure, I was proud to introduce legislation that would allow for staff to form unions in our House offices and committees. Workers’ rights are human rights, and everyone deserves a just and safe working environment, with fair wages and equitable benefits. Over 130 of my Democratic colleagues have cosponsored my resolution, and I’m thrilled to stand in solidarity with the workers organizing this effort. Of course, this issue is way, way bigger than Capitol Hill. Across the country, workers are raising their voices and taking to the streets with a clear message for employers everywhere who treat their employees poorly and barely pay a living wage: time’s up. Working people are demanding change, and CEOs are getting a wake-up call. I’ve spent my career fighting for the rights of workers across Michigan — starting as a union organizer with the SEIU, and now in Congress. I’m honored to earn endorsements from some of the largest labor unions in the country (including SEIU!) in my reelection campaign, and I look forward to advancing worker-first policies in the House. The news that came out of Washington last week is just the tip of the iceberg, Peter. I’ve seen these efforts on the ground — last year, I fought alongside the Amazon employees in Bessemer, Alabama before union busting prevailed. After the NLRB declared Amazon had cheated, the workers there are voting again right now! And earlier this month, I joined Starbucks employees in Clinton Township, Michigan to stand in solidarity as they aim to unionize. These moments motivate me every day to keep fighting for progressive values – so working people can get the fair share they’ve earned. Let’s go! | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

name: Team Sarah
subject: Report: Ron Johnson has more than $2 million cash on hand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Three quick things for you:
1. The latest public fundraising report shows Ron Johnson has more than $2.1 million cash on hand. That means he was building up his war chest before even announcing his re-election campaign — and now, he’s got more money in the bank than anyone in the race.

2. Donald Trump and national Republicans have well over $200 million to defend Ron Johnson. With Wisconsin most likely being the tipping point for Senate control, they will spend whatever it takes to keep this seat red.

3. The most recent head-to-head poll of the race shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat who can defeat Ron Johnson. We’re best-positioned to flip this seat blue and grow our Democratic Senate majority, but we've got to pick up the pace on our fundraising to be able to compete with the Republicans.

[**Please consider making a small contribution to our campaign today and help us take down Ron Johnson for good. February is the shortest month of the year, so we have a lot less time to hit our fundraising goals — but your donation will allow us to stay on track for our mid-FEC deadline. name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: can you keep this on the DL?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
A *love* note about João ❤️
#
Derek,
If my husband John — or João, as I call him — ever read what I'm about to tell you, I would tell him my account was hacked 😂. For the past 15 years I've held the title of being his number one troll, and I'm _not_ planning on breaking that streak just because it's Valentine's Day.
**But I wanted to reach out to you with an earnest note about why I'm so proud of João and his journey to represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate,[and then ask if you can pitch in your first $5 to our campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44152?refcode=ema20220214-4590&t=1&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)**
This picture of the two of us is from our very first Valentine's Day we spent together. It was taken at the Braddock Elks Lodge. Can you tell he likes to get dressed up for special occasions? 😂🙄
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44152?refcode=ema20220214-4590&t=2&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)
Derek, João has been an incredible role model for our three kids, showing them what it means to not turn your back on the communities and issues you care deeply about.
He's always been the most dedicated person I know — to our community and to our family, from the days when he was Mayor of Braddock to now as he serves our great Commonwealth as your Lieutenant Governor.
He's never changed who he is to please others. He's honest and real — and will always call things as he sees them. He’s been fighting for the same things since the days when he and I first met and his views have always remained solid. I wish he’d “evolve” on closing cabinet doors, but one can dream. 🙄
One of the things I love about João is that he knows that love is LOVE and we need more of it in the world, not less. When same-sex weddings were still illegal, he was the only elected official to officiate marriage ceremonies for those amazing couples in western Pennsylvania. But João defied that (AWFUL) law to do right by LGBTQIA+ couples, because he knew then what he knows now: That our LGBTQIA+ neighbors, siblings, and loved ones deserve the right to marry the person they love. 🌈
**And while I may rag on João about 99% of the time, he’s the absolute best person I know — and he'd make us all proud as Pennsylvania's next Senator.** But he can't take on this challenging journey alone, so I have to ask:
**[Can you make a $5 contribution to João's campaign today? By donating today, you’re joining a huge coalition of grassroots supporters who believe in this campaign — and I know how grateful João would be to have your support.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44152?refcode=ema20220214-4590&t=3&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44152?refcode=em20220214-4590&amount=5&t=22&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)**
Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for being on our team.
All my love today and every day,
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
SLOP
Second Lady of Pennsylvania
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44152?refcode=ema20220214-4590&t=23&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220214-4590-footer&t=24&refcode2=4590_434096_ykz-L5&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4590%2E434096%2Eykz-L5)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking for $5 before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is a big one, and we can’t come up short.
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5948?t=6&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v) Good afternoon. Mark Kelly here.

I’m writing to you today to humbly ask if you can make a contribution before our fundraising deadline ends at midnight tonight. This is a big one, and we can’t come up short.

If you understand the stakes of this election and are ready to chip in today, you can use this link:

[Please, split a contribution of $5 between Voter Protection Project and my re-election campaign by clicking here.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5949?t=7&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v)

Otherwise, let me explain why this request is so important:

This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the year. CNN says it’s one of the most likely to flip.

Corporate special interest groups are spending millions to beat us and Donald Trump is telling his supporters “taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the Senate.”

It will also be one of the most expensive races in the country. And because I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, I need a ton of donations to push back against these attacks.

And all along the way, we have to hit a series of deadline goals to keep pace. Tonight is one of those deadlines, and we’re not at our goals just yet.

So, please:

[Can I count on you to make a $5 contribution split between Voter Protection project and my re-election campaign before our fundraising deadline ends at midnight tonight? I would not ask if it were not so important.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5949?t=8&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5950?t=9&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5951?t=10&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5953?t=12&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5954?t=13&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v)
Thank you in advance for contributing. Especially today.

Mark Kelly
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1266%2E878179%2EPLQp9v)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: The Parent's Bill of Rights 🍎
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Today, I joined three of my colleagues to introduce the Parents’ Bill of Rights which gets parents back in the classroom and puts kids first! | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=0f9857937a&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4bca57daa4&e=9d6926af69)
---
| Today, I joined three of my colleagues to introduce the [**Parents’ Bill of Rights**](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=5cb99f7d18&e=9d6926af69) which gets parents back in the classroom and puts kids first in their education.

Throughout the last few years, I have continued to hear the frustration from parents and families **about the lack of transparency and accountability in the education** **system**. Our legislation would fix these problems.

Our Parents’ Bill of Rights would:

* **Enhance disclosure and transparency** to families about what’s happening in the classroom
* Require schools to share the class syllabus with parents
* **Inform parents about their rights to review** instructional material and seek alternative options
* **Protect privacy of parents** speaking publicly at school board meetings
* Create educational savings accounts to **expand flexibility for families** on school choices

Parents have the right to know what their kids are being taught. It is imperative our schools have a **well-planned and transparent curriculum**. This legislation affirms what many educators are already doing and allows parents to have the information necessary to help decide what education option is best for their child.

I look forward to hearing from you about your thoughts related to how we can make Minnesota schools world class organizations.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Michelle Benson
Candidate for Governor

clean_body: Today, I joined three of my colleagues to introduce the Parents’ Bill of Rights which gets parents back in the classroom and puts kids first! | | | | | | | | Today, I joined three of my colleagues to introduce the which gets parents back in the classroom and puts kids first in their education. Throughout the last few years, I have continued to hear the frustration from parents and families about the lack of transparency and accountability in the education system. Our legislation would fix these problems. Our Parents’ Bill of Rights would: Enhance disclosure and transparency to families about what’s happening in the classroom Require schools to share the class syllabus with parents Inform parents about their rights to review instructional material and seek alternative options Protect privacy of parents speaking publicly at school board meetings Create educational savings accounts to expand flexibility for families on school choices Parents have the right to know what their kids are being taught. It is imperative our schools have a well-planned and transparent curriculum. This legislation affirms what many educators are already doing and allows parents to have the information necessary to help decide what education option is best for their child. I look forward to hearing from you about your thoughts related to how we can make Minnesota schools world class organizations. We're calling for 7,500 gifts before our 24-hour Mid Month Deadline to answer their calls, DEFEAT House Republicans, and make Joe and Barack proud. Will you step up with $3 to defend our House Majority? This is so critical, your gift will be 300%-MATCHED - but only for the next nine hours! >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Every dollar you donate will be DOUBLED instantly during our gift-matching challenge and help Turning Point USA unlock $1 MILLION in additional funding for our critical work!_](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147271&L=79584&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS9mN2RmYTlmNS1hMTg0LTQ3MGQtODBhMi0wYTc3Y2RjMWRiNWY/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V1JEMjU3MTM=)**

You and I are at risk of LOSING an entire generation to the indoctrination of the radical Left and the control of the D.C. Swamp. **But with your support, I’m confident that Turning Point USA can reach 5 MILLION students this year and inspire them to love America again!** No other group — on either side of the ideological spectrum — reaches as many young people as Turning Point USA. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Shawn=20DeRemer?=
subject: Talk about love.
body:
I need YOUR help

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/b56f6d06ea99/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6758866?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214

Friend,

Happy Valentine's Day!

As we celebrate love and our loved ones today, I need YOUR help in celebrating the love of my life for over 30 years, Congressional District 5 Candidate, Lori Chavez-DeRemer.

Click here to listen to my Valentine's day message to Lori.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214

Lori loves Oregon and our country so much, there is no greater present than your support; join me in wishing her a Happy Valentine's Day by contributing to her journey to the House of Representatives. Her campaign has a goal of reaching $3500 over the next 24 hours.

Chip in to her campaign today and together we can give Lori a Valentine's Day she’ll always remember!>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214?amount=100
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214?amount=50
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214?amount=25
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214?amount=10

Remember no donation is too small and each one is greatly appreciated.

Together we can take back the state we love and give Oregonians a future worth celebrating.

With your help, this will be the best Valentine's Day ever. Can I count on you to donate $14 or ANY AMOUNT right now? (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214

Thank you,

Dr. Shawn DeRemer

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-14-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vday214

body:
In honor of Valentine’s Day, I’ve been doing a little writing. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefLMt2QdOcPNPLywNpTLRu6yjBIzKvXMr7Tt0MJ0XY1IuUvGT35mWJH3thmdyWGK2LJMzLKu4UsGtoXeI71mGVTCK0xCNWu6ZaH1np67pGirL2mkEkXf7lv9rs0Yj0r63tweHknkdafiMm7rTF6fwR6NvUXzm4H4N7tgJ4ayn91PnZ1F2dFOHfz55aRiVldcp7BVO5Ly62PYkfLllhgKRMnu0SdnDQuXyMCgun323c7Zs/3jk/r8y6HWTeReKsmqUY5NhKZA/h0/FOwSyKQntFPB_Bt26O5OBfeGLDzZESsitRVfephcs7Y) Peter, **__[Roses are red
Nashville is blue
With your help, Peter
Progressive change is coming in 2022!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiSjaAXe4VbJXd8JNsGe8gey7s7QPMxHXVqeBNKqt6AFm0miFWsDWWVDWZmj9YSepSLlsUwCIEASeqGoARp7HibU1pBG9GOo6mjvjn_ZAzJLj9lF3J4DkQ81zpZxHI824-SwEdVCH0cVF_4dD1_m_0jEDSU2J-7WUYpQDOlyFCRohKDkiOHCz7vmn9ndvRugD6zBh5uS5MInHJSNgU2BUNqCOcDEATSW7b0Iw6AH8gYDBVd7FX6mZ7_xnLuo8ee-M6NegksqbdwO41P6R7IPdbzdPzck_1V96CD5ei26l_JTaTEznyXE79c_Lbd8uA2PPO/3jk/r8y6HWTeReKsmqUY5NhKZA/h1/LNgMK17Y_30G5ApR9LnE9X-U1PcGgkvElvCzMI-EK9U)__** In honor of Valentine’s Day, I’ve been doing a little writing — and in addition to my poem, I wanted to write to you to express my gratitude. You’ve done so much for me and for this campaign, and I wouldn’t be where I am today without you! Thanks to you and our amazing community of supporters, we:
* Shattered fundraising records on the day of our campaign launch,
* Received countless endorsements, both local and national, including the endorsement of my union, the Service Employees International Union (SEIU),
* Hosted dozens of campaign events, including a “listening tour” of Nashville, where community members helped shape and sharpen our agenda,
* Broke the record for most money raised for a Black woman candidate in Nashville history,
* And even when the far-right Tennessee legislature finalized new congressional districts that attempt to dilute our voices, we spoke truth to power and made it clear that our movement is here to stay.

This month has been tough, no doubt about it.**But****Peter,****it’s folks just like you that power our movement for change and allow us to keep fighting.** I know that with you in our corner, it doesn’t matter what the GOP throws at us. Thanks for all the love you’ve shown this campaign. I’d be so grateful for anything you can chip in to help us keep up this momentum — [**_if it’s in the budget for you today, you can contribute here._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiSjaAXe4VbJXd8JNsGe8gey7s7QPMxHXVqeBNKqt6AFk8w7vHGFALWEHPZO5RT-y6lCbqYuY8Ez9bd7ggJLQtga1cneuXb6Sfc4nGHEFK3QY9cTOteiCNf4-hx-9S5-Rf_qAImo9qZJOl9n16sGMx1z6Q6q4UuhJt5C2I3AhnDttioym_-WLzEqQBHBs97_nvTVxZUrym4lUyizsSyu3kgSwJV2urBb7F1_2R4TOGeEgMxUPRbdUfQT83PnJGDT1LLPSRwLXRRESLkEfpjD_F9Iy2vciiPm3q3qa1wPqj2Pfnwk5CevG3PGmWFf8yQplI/3jk/r8y6HWTeReKsmqUY5NhKZA/h2/2GHTpFCLwUVGytXMFrlenJEjdJ8u07LReY2z3p_TGSw) Happy Valentine’s Day, Peter, and thank you for all you do today and every day to fight for working people. I’m thankful! ❤️ With love, Odessa Kelly

[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEatRNCsTVn981SUndArwi2hKiKqiBCCrkafcAzgUcB-2EY4FS3mDLFp0e19n1oy35DQZu69NY-aru7oqy9ETL5tQIZE0NqreQOwHS7AFYT27eAOMXFM5RnJYMqOXAuGAzIvX-Vtmxd6oLz4ZdkmF-WAUot3V6dVIIyHgbEjqir5Oe7cyGU2YdkFfYkl-M_oFtm19ILqKFKtskAgDiQeUyaV61_esaP5XKAEjaVE71fC_H1-kdK3qeOMF7U0DZyRc497gl9vBoomP3QmviDzx5-_hcxCTQr7E6dEFKL91-WOx/3jk/r8y6HWTeReKsmqUY5NhKZA/h3/ZEAkIzK-M73HTWpewnm2fGlJvfrzPu4lU_bxdLi2Lbo) | To give by check:

clean_body: In honor of Valentine’s Day, I’ve been doing a little writing. | | | Peter, In honor of Valentine’s Day, I’ve been doing a little writing — and in addition to my poem, I wanted to write to you to express my gratitude. You’ve done so much for me and for this campaign, and I wouldn’t be where I am today without you! Thanks to you and our amazing community of supporters, we: Shattered fundraising records on the day of our campaign launch, Received countless endorsements, both local and national, including the endorsement of my union, the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), Hosted dozens of campaign events, including a “listening tour” of Nashville, where community members helped shape and sharpen our agenda, Broke the record for most money raised for a Black woman candidate in Nashville history, And even when the far-right Tennessee legislature finalized new congressional districts that attempt to dilute our voices, we spoke truth to power and made it clear that our movement is here to stay. This month has been tough, no doubt about it.But**Peter,it’s folks just like you that power our movement for change and allow us to keep fighting. I know that with you in our corner, it doesn’t matter what the GOP throws at us. Thanks for all the love you’ve shown this campaign. I’d be so grateful for anything you can chip in to help us keep up this momentum — Happy Valentine’s Day, Peter, and thank you for all you do today and every day to fight for working people. I’m thankful! ❤️ With love, Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Charles Booker
subject: Happy Valentine’s Day, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, Happy
Valentine’s Day.

As we celebrate love in all its forms today — I want to start off by
saying thank you.

Because of this movement’s generosity, love, and commitment, this work is
possible.

As we continue our road trip across Kentucky, my heart is filled with hope
knowing that thousands of you are ready to make change in 2022. I find
myself constantly blown away by the power of this movement.

The road ahead is not easy, but I know with everything in me that we can
win this fight. This year, Kentucky’s going to elect a Black man from the
hood to the United States Senate.

Whether you’ve chipped in $5, shared our campaign with a friend, or just
signed up to be on our email list — please know your support means the
world to me. Together, we’re showing our opponents and the establishment
how strong grassroots donors can be, and how wrong they are to doubt us.

We are the people who will beat Rand Paul. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220214?refcode=em20220214-1568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1568_346206_1B21Zq&akid=1568%2E346206%2E1B21Zq ]If you’re ready to fight
with me this year to turn the tides of Kentucky and the U.S. Senate, will
you chip in $5 to our people-powered campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220214?refcode=em20220214-1568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1568_346206_1B21Zq&akid=1568%2E346206%2E1B21Zq ]Contribute $5

Thank you,
Peter. I’m feeling the love
today and always from this movement, and I cannot wait to serve you in the
Senate.

I love you Kentucky,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220214-1568-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1568_346206_1B21Zq&akid=1568%2E346206%2E1B21Zq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1568%2E346206%2E1B21Zq

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Climate inaction will cost us trillions more than climate investments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The cost is painfully clear.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4283?t=2&akid=12943%2E53494%2E-gDhU6) Friend, The West's wildfire season is now year-round. The Southwest is in a permanent state of drought. Hurricanes are growing more powerful and destructive, and the frequency of coastal flooding has multiplied across the country. The cost of climate inaction is painfully clear: Climate-fueled extreme weather disasters have cost the U.S. $750 billion over the past 5 years. In 2021 alone, the country suffered $145 billion in climate-disaster damage. **Let me put this as simply as I can: We can't afford _not_ to pass the climate investments in the Build Back Better Act.** [**_If you, like we do, believe we can't afford not to pass climate investments, I need you to sign our petition right now. Then, follow it up with a call to your senators. (We even have a script for you!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4283?t=3&akid=12943%2E53494%2E-gDhU6) | [SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4283?t=4&akid=12943%2E53494%2E-gDhU6)
---
It's not just about avoiding the billions of dollars in damages that the climate crisis already costs us. If Congress can pass the climate investments in the Build Back Better Act, working families will see countless financial benefits, including lower energy bills and over a million new jobs. Plus, these investments are fully paid for.
Now, it's time for President Biden and Democratic leadership to deliver on their climate commitments by passing the transformative climate provisions before March 1. Anything less or later risks even more unnecessary economic devastation.
[**_Congress needs to know the truth: Climate inaction will cost us trillions more than climate investments. Sign our petition right now, and then call your senators to demand they pass this urgent legislation ASAP!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4283?t=5&akid=12943%2E53494%2E-gDhU6)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4283?t=6&akid=12943%2E53494%2E-gDhU6)
---
Only bold federal action can help us avoid the worst of these deadly, costly disasters. Failure to act now will all but guarantee that American families bear the burden of those escalating costs.
Thanks for taking action alongside us,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action
[**_P.S. Want to learn more about the cost of climate inaction? Read our memo here!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4284?t=7&akid=12943%2E53494%2E-gDhU6)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=12943%2E53494%2E-gDhU6). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Tom Winter
subject: This is going to be all over Montana newspapers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana
body:
This is about corruption, deception, and pretending to live at a fancy hotel. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkER6EhOxl7C27V4_Ptd8NsIkOzyBUZ3jerwCV7OPK13KFr8N0xdKxX_ytKGTyPz9TGcbCEEIpQWFO2H3dkWp5VXZBUnf2Ms7y9bQ7T6gOQ1U0_FGbmMzO9XYJpZnHConnjgycUX9icQsOLzloBe0dV70XpZqHfXjym0VjwdTpJULCnHkn-k67j-J-bx9rW9ZYuHC1RX_f81zJJt5nPgGpMGxbsYRajaXAiE5x-XEacvS9h3xRumG9qbIR_OX1cmpSrPx6QBXuAAOZL3IGoVbKNxu4ju5CU-utpiw2AVobigeO903c0zT9_kG6SGQ1Kfl2ZB5NFt8g4zbuLdMJ5FyLnFPm6shLFhKAtHbNHl3gk1BkauHh4XGqdPneKnTP5BEQ/3jk/ueEBkNy2RZOrsTHq3I1zCw/h0/VoTWRQOlcJGk2I3RYOubozNCfYioZSjGejvxJc3656s) Friend,

I can’t stand corrupt, two-faced politicians abusing Montanans’ trust — and I know voters can’t either.

As it happens, our Republican opponent Ryan Zinke was too corrupt even for the Trump Administration, and now he’s trying to trick Montana voters into thinking he lives here.

So we’re going to tell them.

**We’re aiming to place ads in local newspapers throughout Western Montana that directly call out Zinke for his corruption. Thousands of voters in key swing areas across this district will see our message — but it’s not going to be free.**

_**[Luckily, a group of generous donors has offered to MATCH every grassroots donation we receive up to $2,500 to help us fund this important action. Can you make a grassroots donation of $5 today to help us make sure we can run this ad in key cities across our district?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkER6EhOxl7C27V4_Ptd8NsIkOzyBUZ3jerwCV7OPK13KFr8N0xdKxX_ytKGTyPz9TI8tB5BgR4rkd7w5Yjl8F_68GarzJD4dmezomiFt_-OhFH1Y2PmiGMsZo0_KkLbTcI3vjOlBrOCFCjOd8r1WrjgNjiNZfYNNSgsFj_URUg9hu31A98T5JqIYjUMDNSZoUre6DN85w10cBTVOeFaspUcPmmcJqBVmFY-TUe2SKC-QqTMhpV8D1D2EorcfTshUfmojvDZGmcrov5JGxdZkqlUxjcyNALl38xgSXTEk4uE6oajmgXJrrQG9Xgkp_3yZJZBX2ZnLS1NDRKi1VHU0OMOjOINaa-lZdqm7bmLVHT6r0EKvNAZXu0CkXkD5VMQDw/3jk/ueEBkNy2RZOrsTHq3I1zCw/h1/1EHCUHQV06mBCCIVuVfdIjn-mRO5W2heIxziN-gg_5o)
**_
As one of our top supporters, I wanted to tell you directly what we want this ad to say. As you may remember, a few weeks ago I headed up to Whitefish to the address where Ryan Zinke supposedly lives in Montana — but it turned out it was a literal hotel.

Montana voters need to know that the guy running to represent them in Washington — a corrupt and disgraced former Trump Administration official — actually lives in Santa Barbara, California.

**That’s right, our newspaper ad will expose the fact that Zinke isn’t even a full time Montana resident — in giant lettering for thousands of voters to see.**

Montana values are all about looking out for your neighbors and cleaning the clocks of dirty politicians and their corporate backers. But Ryan Zinke can’t help Montanans when his neighbors are all in California. And at a time when so many of our neighbors need their representatives to make this a stable place to live again, it’s shameful that Zinke is trying to trick voters and trying to represent us.

While Zinke is in California, I’ve been home in Montana. I’ve put thousands of miles on my truck in recent weeks listening to voters of all stripes and their concerns. And at the end of the day, folks are sick and tired of worrying about how high their health care bills will be, how they’ll afford housing, and if their next paycheck will be able to put food on the table.

The problems facing our community need to be addressed by someone who actually lives in our community — and voters need to know that person is NOT Ryan Zinke.

_**[So please, add a donation of $5 right away to help us place our full page ads in key swing areas of our district. Remember, every dollar you donate will be matched by a generous group of donors — so if you’ve been waiting for the best time to invest in our campaign, this is it!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkER6EhOxl7C27V4_Ptd8NsIkOzyBUZ3jerwCV7OPK13KFr8N0xdKxX_ytKGTyPz9TWJySvY_WrOeQuxQqqWZ9ZC94_0_zLSUHP6mLUIGVk_yKWDzMIG-pZQG9_okWyz6esnG-PuHhMmMmOXc7j84ujFbUlg4OFzOrN4kwMut2FIJavw19Ajo3g0o644g_jW-JB1-6cewHkA7mC9i7MSocvEFhpy7qcei_Sd3gq5VkuKARxb4r48GTQZJzrRG7OmRE_oF4ZWOY5P5E9za0_RBuI9s6bemHyWLnKnEYhNRuTZ7wa7kFEDGRn34-BTzVYQDMzFG6c2LBV_1Uqau9kZ9ZuBAkoDuxsWW0L4kEJ_mTkrgg_2Fs5mUuIUu8BTK8fHEs/3jk/ueEBkNy2RZOrsTHq3I1zCw/h2/Bzi1iLDiAETiAb7zc_TbW2dJ5OSGAkD4xdGpl5xRF6Q)**_

clean_body: This is about corruption, deception, and pretending to live at a fancy hotel. | | | Friend, I can’t stand corrupt, two-faced politicians abusing Montanans’ trust — and I know voters can’t either. As it happens, our Republican opponent Ryan Zinke was too corrupt even for the Trump Administration, and now he’s trying to trick Montana voters into thinking he lives here. So we’re going to tell them. We’re aiming to place ads in local newspapers throughout Western Montana that directly call out Zinke for his corruption. Thousands of voters in key swing areas across this district will see our message — but it’s not going to be free. As one of our top supporters, I wanted to tell you directly what we want this ad to say. As you may remember, a few weeks ago I headed up to Whitefish to the address where Ryan Zinke supposedly lives in Montana — but it turned out it was a literal hotel. Montana voters need to know that the guy running to represent them in Washington — a corrupt and disgraced former Trump Administration official — actually lives in Santa Barbara, California. That’s right, our newspaper ad will expose the fact that Zinke isn’t even a full time Montana resident — in giant lettering for thousands of voters to see. Montana values are all about looking out for your neighbors and cleaning the clocks of dirty politicians and their corporate backers. But Ryan Zinke can’t help Montanans when his neighbors are all in California. And at a time when so many of our neighbors need their representatives to make this a stable place to live again, it’s shameful that Zinke is trying to trick voters and trying to represent us. While Zinke is in California, I’ve been home in Montana. I’ve put thousands of miles on my truck in recent weeks listening to voters of all stripes and their concerns. And at the end of the day, folks are sick and tired of worrying about how high their health care bills will be, how they’ll afford housing, and if their next paycheck will be able to put food on the table. The problems facing our community need to be addressed by someone who actually lives in our community — and voters need to know that person is NOT Ryan Zinke. Thank you, Tom PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana PO Box 1592 Polson, MT 59860 | | Sent via . I'm running against Ronny Jackson because I think my neighbors deserves better than him. They deserve a representative that believes the science around vaccines, that stands up for our democracy, that will serve the TX-13 with _honesty_ and _integrity_. I'm a lawyer, a truth teller, and a patriot.

I make sure everyone's voice is heard.

[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=41c33871a0&e=4712f71bea) Ronny Jackson doesn't listen to anyone but Donald Trump, and he doesn't deserve the honor of representing us in North Texas any longer. If you agree,

**[May I humbly ask for your financial support as I stand up to MAGA candidate Ronny Jackson?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=b554bfd1a8&e=4712f71bea)**

Yours Sincerely, Kathleen Brown
Democrat
TX-13

name: Tobias Read
subject: Emergency shelter funding now
body:
Time and again state leaders have punted Oregon’s homelessness crisis to city and county governments to deal with.
---
| | Dear Peter, Time and again state leaders have punted Oregon’s homelessness crisis to city and county governments to deal with. **We’re seeing the results of that under-funding and lack of solutions: Thousands of people homeless on the streets of our cities with nowhere to go.** In 2019 alone there were over 4,000 homeless people in Multnomah County with just 1,400 shelter beds to house them. **[Mayors across Oregon are fed up and rightfully demanding the legislature fund emergency shelters now, and I want to add my voice to theirs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41802483/330423779/338120522?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjgxYTRjYy0wZDhlLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrlCl8AJaGcluvsSP2swdnzpoMtxjk1Do-K_pPRo7bQ=&emci=8f8d5dc6-0d8e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1f81a4cc-0d8e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** Our state has failed to invest sufficiently in mental health supports, drug and alcohol treatment, and affordable housing. We’re short over 100,000 housing units, our state hospital has been hauled before the courts for failing to admit patients, and we spend less than most states on drug treatment despite having one of the worst heroin and methamphetamine epidemics in the nation. **We can’t leave our cities, and the families and businesses who call them home, to fend for themselves any longer. When she was Speaker of the House, Tina Kotek was all too happy to tell our cities they can’t enforce camping bans, but simultaneously didn’t allocate resources to tackle the root of the problem.** As Governor, I’ll change that on day one. I’ll pull together a team of officials at all levels of government and coordinate a statewide response effort. I’ll allocate state resources to ensure every Oregonian can access a shelter bed when they need one, step up drug, alcohol, and mental health treatment, and develop a plan to expedite permanent housing construction. Oregon must do better. Oregon can do better. Stay safe,

---

---

* * *

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Recall Results Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
*_You can_ _RSVP[here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioq55pgteefgkyyYf5WSYuda&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb14_final&n=1) for Thursday's Kickoff._ Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom Ignored](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorDPNAWmZj7loM96YvGt_FL9Dw0ygEVqoTjpM-kMErvWw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb14_final&n=2) Newsom just announced he's extending his school mask mandate even as almost every other state has ended theirs. This will be widely ignored throughout California. This comes a day after LA hosted the world's biggest sporting event. Mayor Eric Garcetti blithely roamed the stadium, neither covering his face nor holding his breath. What will future generations think? California is one of only five states where a school mask mandate remains. But in my district, Roseville’s high school board has courageously voted to make masks optional as of tomorrow. [Here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqeJCr1XJsDNS-j-AWs55XuZTW51c_yniAyvEe3PsDmJxl2QCbGJpBNQZxsFWu2Pf6EovrC0vk43KZF4WRtl2gx&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb14_final&n=3) is their Resolution. Roseville's board is one that has fought Newsom's mandates and shutdowns heroically. The board in San Francisco, on the other hand, has embraced Newsom’s corruption and taken it to peak levels. Now, three of their members face accountability. Tomorrow is the SF School Board Recall. If you have friends in the city, tell them to vote. Ousting these board members will provide some justice to the kids they harmed and jumpstart a year of political change. I’ve never seen an atmosphere for change like 2022. The question is, what kind of change? A lighter shade of the failed status quo – or a bold new direction. At this moment in history, like never before, we need Republicans in office who will _fight._ [Help me bring the bold change our state and country need](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb14_final&n=4). [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxNW_zNO87VbGZnqhtZnIYMTpIvfLjP1lRgHTPMPhjZhA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb14_final&n=5) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

body:
With our Save Illinois Truck Tour in full swing, we’re growing our movement in every county of Illinois. Read on to see what we’ve been up to. | |
---
Team,

We couldn’t start off this week’s email without wishing all of you a Happy Valentine’s Day!
[**CHECK OUT THE OTHER CARDS**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=3d8fa9a5d1164045ae42bb0ffe4cb11f&_e=Wa50tnGyxaCaHTjTyS4yw8Cpf4IecZIZqp8BiWf3Gt5y_NEF2tomyn8tScqQMDfu6xoMujH3q-FhZPAP18kR96k5oXGORU2P-GfEyx7DZUSMXLGLQ2_foruuH1ew920ZRn9uQBaJI3g8UF69e0H-kCW5RE7xnN_mc5e9O-5VzKAG6LrZtq4RjBPCQa6-9KoaKgI6ay9JWmn2H6sivqou7MzpPzj8OoYX0bJ_CvcdZUzW-Bfo-flyntffeQolvteeiQJArxrWkgHdumTnFb4loONfmttyW9zpT8C51b8yXxV7A4INz3YY64Y3i-u8DO26Eibi7sVVQeubyfQSKm8cKjVX31-ghhNtgxbp2aAnxeNmbLNhMc_Z8v11oo1hng75hDhdXx3kYG25C0hC3_OHHWEWAZ0njnYeMjiQab8H208atjvCvN2ZOQJJmfh9jLBn2LLfA6doBq8YRPjh8IFIiZ8ZalUM5r6dLB-39XDeWd68nCRyEVaNxmxT6uTaBF_1)
With our Save Illinois Truck Tour in full swing, we’re growing our movement in every county of Illinois. Read on to see what we’ve been up to.

**🗞️ IN THE HEADLINES**

Governor Pritzker announced on Wednesday that Illinois’ indoor mask mandate would begin to phase out, with mask mandates being fully eliminated by March 3.

Well, except for one place: Illinois schools.

That’s right - Illinois kids don’t have to wear masks in restaurants, stores, museums, or churches...but they do in schools. This isn’t real science - it’s political science.
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=3d8fa9a5d1164045ae42bb0ffe4cb11f&_e=Wa50tnGyxaCaHTjTyS4yw2YeXyai72-vcn07hwRioaRQtUVRATOjXOQyQnZ214W3vUad2ilRsWP7PY2wIMMmO0V6aUjKiaHEeloRp5fxqr6EfoXVffg8yquljXOpnpVQuKj83NuvJDB11xDEMX81TVkLmdbhcbIKBK1GHfYaEoGyQHGDDoKNrzOU3vsYwyGDg7FUtQL3DZ2qtybAgKcTG4a6H7ngD3IfpCUwK8a7Fpng_82gY5Uc3dBfo5aDNWYe4gXifdqy1Zo6SpsB0ynbqIsP_fnu-kXfWnD4TOFB36_hf19ruLslBo91qKeOvPzdeR-es0jkvKI35r6_QqdBYcWlEZw-0Yb_Lm24Iwmra23QTrEgkM6YeiN2Ah_T7oEWz-5i8qRezzQcwGG7wWVsgPoYVpQAMqNuBc2QpccOLDjnMufQ7x4j-X4wMJEz5kqfBNqdpK9wwstaBdX4SHRJc84FLRbrnebk60fyWfb5GGwGScQapH2TnymulkDn0YdT)

🤝 **ON THE TRAIL**

Our first-ever **Save Illinois Truck Tour** is almost done! We’ve _[crisscrossed](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=3d8fa9a5d1164045ae42bb0ffe4cb11f&_e=Wa50tnGyxaCaHTjTyS4ywyOlfllW1d5k-rBGJGL2nQPjw9ZBtSdKfVspqzFmbkkvQn6ffg4mHNm1suWwyb4kjhf3aWA3w9KnpazpG9oywe7SumSs28fWBrLtr3AkD-pwGaYtv0dKUSiygLDHR1_SII3Bt2ialgLYXi7xb-R6aDXQaRK-Zh7Ag-z6fNUQHSBFVpF_xprkBkLW8s-mDqpQfNg6q2kzIKoYXgrp9upl9gn19T1l4KRwbso8NgIhBh56FUPExSLH458amJfnZV7_XhxQpzQbepZs2utf89NDVhzwhwVUNpBITiyYKRn5dlfvxjXENdE9b7HRrDCdAsY-SVmNuPl1Hv4kbEAKq40-JLqjTyxiyyfFrkML6i9RtusKN9Vykgsr_wAY0EiFHKyUlsEJlCZ5YjuhCMvzdndAMwmmB-XtbMhTYxBD-814M-Vac1H8PtWmMnZ0SiLdw8kb0OFuM1FDi_-W2WyyE38XHpg%3D) [central](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=3d8fa9a5d1164045ae42bb0ffe4cb11f&_e=Wa50tnGyxaCaHTjTyS4ywyOlfllW1d5k-rBGJGL2nQOGU5Rwa858yY2OCuH8BFaAA5TLq-bC9QDa_Gxfl6XUOi06jCDTdOddwMnGGsf5KUAc9hK2QIK-ILHEYwFxhXDdL_FHkZMmNgA0ZvvxnN2mBiKdVzs7CwdbCZKLwdzH0xPgIg07aPrdaSYFf69u0w_Ex-t9kiZSrGaNxt9bYSV7lwnJ9MikUG3MNr12ifhYi17611U9DtRqgQckuE3SSYD-GN3PAzgQqboIFpv7Qu0IOPcB4oyIB00MhAfl1qYKs6EO05tIioBvq1nZRH7U944PdxGddlIoccHxt4SuHv5Yn2eiBz6IOZl6fxBvKaujcjqCAvun8HqoNMDCUx2R6ZhGXtSsqAHaGYTh68UqefEfieET8Ue3z-yJ9b9DEvoAra6WGXmfm3v27ygmBSndaWwLm-EPrT1OrHdJmfwFTtvZMZhjIVkbdlAhmDht9Sxj0qQ%3D) [Illinois](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=3d8fa9a5d1164045ae42bb0ffe4cb11f&_e=Wa50tnGyxaCaHTjTyS4ywyOlfllW1d5k-rBGJGL2nQPlpVlVA8eE2Rqst2o7hbeiySgRMkcstasMlJ3VeIDFeeMgBVp_U5Vmi_vM_iDb6lTKC-4RGi1HpZz5WF3nnOL9ttkKOF88SCqGBG7vCfhnD7gG1bIuSbGHQmb61md-UaHhJyiojKJi1VYd5MTmje5DdRAi7yVvgLflAHYNX-BMAezV5ykvxmbGRVA6owzxeDPMZOt5gai34muTTyYgg28ovSp9S4icX0iIDzSOF8GhcGCxB5RWQGl_ypLi1mxqMxi57TfT13FY3pNwWq95xPJcrr9QZbHH3I-ON_C91EN-ROkQq03OLW08p2hz9DMvroYlmuXafw2cZ-iMvizPFavLPJ81uIZp1sgrVd_JI3LBXxsl1pbJObLN9h7wYR9tvEIYxdn_-ltHTYh9Zen1oaWTgbQHyh6mmRewAgoFjK8RW464fHcIuBksYi8ZoJnYquM%3D)_, and we are wrapping up the southern leg of our tour today.

We’ve been to farms, saloons, coffee shops, and more. Head on over to our Instagram page to see photos from the tour so far.
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=3d8fa9a5d1164045ae42bb0ffe4cb11f&_e=Wa50tnGyxaCaHTjTyS4ywyOlfllW1d5k-rBGJGL2nQOz9lQOZYegu5T6C7KNPUbWYJCAS06acnfc03bmVbhn7k0k0fuUkMEzF1Nam-E4zU3bftyusZ4mAg1YgzP2eDJydG4lXJvVWU8UChcpkjhMu4cXOsx7SzDPhFrUFb8-IlmabyggjA6XpNxJusKaaeMK6QyI6-YxRJSnm2sT9GrcPsPZmipLhzRWZUNjm8C0l-Z92keAuxXHz2tra7ioVst0LqyPGFB3d1HXSpfB689Awf0qSxUG6Ba9hv9K3BUsrbLTyTrHdt4r3f7dO0GAimqjZ7Zz4gsCS5f7w_nvsZm-o2LikD2Xtnx1qFRb_e8PSuHUornyXXrFBrGi_h5Xp1yH1YGQ8WaTce9qMfZkxnOU3dXj3Sr25wbyEVPstIOMf3QWvDypc4F5KG9sFeD2gjUdB_kUub3feblViSj3vVBHZ-s4E62yRdIajepwcMgKPlc%3D)

**📺 SULLY TV**

clean_body: With our Save Illinois Truck Tour in full swing, we’re growing our movement in every county of Illinois. Read on to see what we’ve been up to. | | Team, We couldn’t start off this week’s email without wishing all of you a Happy Valentine’s Day! With our Save Illinois Truck Tour in full swing, we’re growing our movement in every county of Illinois. Read on to see what we’ve been up to. 🗞️ IN THE HEADLINES Governor Pritzker announced on Wednesday that Illinois’ indoor mask mandate would begin to phase out, with mask mandates being fully eliminated by March 3. Well, except for one place: Illinois schools. That’s right - Illinois kids don’t have to wear masks in restaurants, stores, museums, or churches...but they do in schools. This isn’t real science - it’s political science. 🤝 ON THE TRAIL Our first-ever Save Illinois Truck Tour is almost done! We’ve , and we are wrapping up the southern leg of our tour today. We’ve been to farms, saloons, coffee shops, and more. Head on over to our Instagram page to see photos from the tour so far. 📺 SULLY TV While out on the campaign trail, we stopped at Wally’s in Pontiac to talk to Illinoisans at the pump. Here’s what they had to say: High gas prices are hurting working families, and JB Pritzker is only making it worse. We need a governor who will do something about it. 🖊️ PETITION SIGNATURES Want to help Jesse and Kathleen get on the ballot? Download your petition here: . Make sure to mail in your petition by February 28, details, and instructions can be found on our website. 📊 ILLINOIS FACTS OF THE WEEK Inflation has hit a 40-year high. This is costing families an extra $250 a month. FNAME, thanks for being a part of our team. Together, we can Save Illinois. | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

According to a new report, now there's proof: | "Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign. " - The Hill, 2/9/2022 Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate. We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help. That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible. subject: 🎂 Happy birthday, Cheri! 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We’re celebrating something special on Team Beasley today: Cheri’s birthday!
#

Hey team -
We’re celebrating something special on Team Beasley today: Cheri’s birthday! So we’re hoping you can help us surprise her with some birthday wishes by [**signing our birthday card for her today!**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-hbd?source=em220214-1-t1&refcode2=412.357359.fFeykf&t=1&akid=412%2E357359%2EfFeykf)
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-hbd?source=em220214-1-t1&refcode2=412.357359.fFeykf&t=2&akid=412%2E357359%2EfFeykf)
Cheri is a trailblazer and fearless champion for the people of our state. She wakes up every day to fight for all of us.
She calls this a people-focused campaign because it is people like YOU who are at the heart of this effort and why she is running for the U.S. Senate.
Cheri has spent her life in service to others, just like her mom taught her. But today, we’re making sure we celebrate her, and we want to surprise her with an outpouring of support from this grassroots team.
[**Will you help us show Cheri some love by signing our birthday card for her today? We’re going to show this to her later, and it would mean the world to her to hear from you today.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-hbd?source=em220214-1-t1&refcode2=412.357359.fFeykf&t=3&akid=412%2E357359%2EfFeykf)
Thank you for helping us celebrate and surprise Cheri for her birthday today!
\- Team Beasley

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: America: the shining light on the hill
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/647e9b9eaa73/were-off-and-running-6758134?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# America is the shining light on the hill - and we have to fight to save her, state by state.
I was able to spend a day in Portland with my friend E. recently. I first met her 30 years ago, just two years after she and her family fled Russia and made their way through Europe to America. She has talked for years about the persecution of Jews, waiting in line for food, and multiple families living in the same flat with one kitchen and one bathroom. She’s now a finance and housing expert.

Oregon is near the bottom for affordable housing compared to all other states. I was asked about this topic in Madras and my response in a nutshell was that the problem is a combination of supply and demand and government over-regulation. E. concurs. She doesn’t anticipate prices to drop or the bubble to burst due to an extreme lack of homes on the market not just here, but nationwide. She pointed out a new 1.5-3% tax from Metro and the fact that building and related permits here can total $60K and take two years to get! I told her a liberal candidate had released a proposal to create a new governor’s committee to study the issue and she said, “For what?! To study what everyone has already studied and knows? And spend a lot of money doing it?!” Exactly my horrified reaction! She finished with the point that these issues are often largely county and city here in Oregon, not state, and she was confused as to why people put this problem completely at the feet of a governor when they might elect better local officials.

E.’s husband also has a wealth of knowledge. He fled the Ukraine and came to Oregon alone in the late 1990s without knowing a word of English. “America is where everyone comes,” he said. “This is it. There is nowhere else, and now we all see Oregon slowly becoming like where we left - and it’s a nightmare. It’s following us here.” He pointed out that every sign, from increased poverty, homelessness and catering to crime are coming from the exact government policies he watched take root before the Soviet Union crumbled. He’s amazed younger Americans don’t see or get taught the pattern into socialism and communism - and defend progressive policies. “They haven’t seen what I saw. I come from the Old World, from another century. They don’t think it will happen here but we didn’t think it would happen there.” He concluded, “Supporters of Lenin and Stalin were yelling out how great they were right to their last breaths. They defended them to the end. They were shot in the head and killed just like anyone else.”

We've seen this past year that our red state governor's are the lions at the gate protecting our country. I look forward to joining them, and adding Oregon to the list of states that fight back for our freedoms. # # #
Reminder! Get your tickets for my upcoming Salem fundraiser with Vance Day on my web site at **[Shop | Kerry McQuisten](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=00600e0e93&e=ae2345792a). **
_**Please join my fight to save Oregon today! **_ Your donations help me stop my wealthy opposition from buying the primary with a flood of TV ads.**Your dollars will be effectively spent.** I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.

Yours,
_Kerry_

ecosystem of campaign resources — from political technology, volunteer
lists, campaign fundraising support from PACs, and big donor money. All to

improve the lives of working people in Congress.

Facebook ads, TV commercials, and text messages to smear the Squad. They
will likely start directing their racist, xenophobic right-wing lies at
our four primary challengers soon enough. We’re relying on you to help us
have the funds to fight back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94586?refcode=em20220214-21977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21977%2E1203867%2EKD_D8s ]When you contribute $3, $9, or $27 to the Primary Power Fund, you are
sending a message that the status quo Democratic Party isn’t good enough.
Will you chip in to fuel our work to elect Jessica, Greg, Kina, Summer,
Odessa, and Rana this year?

Democrats helped AOC oust corporate puppet Joe Crowley. In 2020 we helped
Jamaal Bowman defeat Eliot Engel, Cori Bush win against William Lacy Clay,
and Marie Newman unseat anti-choice Democrat Dan Lipinski. Let’s elect
even more Justice Democrats this year.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

clean_body: Hey, I’m Nate. I’m Dr. Harder’s son. When her team asked me to write an email, I wasn’t quite sure where to start. Well, the procrastination caught u | | | Hey, I’m Nate. I’m Dr. Harder’s son. When her team asked me to write an email, I wasn’t quite sure where to start. Well, the procrastination caught up, and now it’s Valentine’s day. So, please, allow me to tell you why you should support my mom’s campaign for Congress! Me and my mom when she filed to run for Congress! My mom is hard-working, kind, passionate, and she always puts others before herself. I think that’s why she’s such a great doctor. She’s built the life she wanted for our family and has taken every curveball that life has thrown her way with grace and a plan. Over the last two years, I’ve watched her take COVID-19 head-on as she fights on the frontlines while somehow managing to still find the joy in her work. That’s how I know she’s the perfect fit for Washington. She’ll roll up her sleeves and fight for Oregonians here in our new 6th district, much like she’s done her entire life for all of her patients and her family. One thing is for sure, she can’t do it alone. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | This election will be challenging, but my mom knows hard work like the back of her hand. She's always been a fierce advocate for my siblings and me and continues to fight for better healthcare, public education, and action on climate change so we can all inherit a healthier future. She knows that it takes leadership and sacrifice to get things done, and that is the attitude she’ll take to Washington for you. I’m so proud of my mom and all she’s accomplished. I hope you all have a fantastic Valentine’s Day. Sincerely, Nate Democrat Kathleen Harder is a doctor who's been on the frontlines to protect her community against COVID-19. Now, she's answering the call for service again, this time to fight for Oregonians in Congress. Donate today to send a science-driven leader to Congress. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Dellicker Update: Scheller Still Stonewalling on Debates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Why Won't Lisa Scheller Debate Kevin Dellicker for Congress? | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bc006c20eb&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **Lisa Scheller Still Stonewalling on Debates**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Republican candidates for governor are debating. Republican candidates for U.S. Senate are debating. But not Republican candidates for Congress in PA-07. My opponent Lisa Scheller [doesn't want to debate](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7f3d67ed5e&e=1090c5c412).

Scheller’s campaign has doubled down on her stance against debates. At an appearance before the Lehigh County Republican Committee, Scheller confirmed in person what her campaign communicated in writing: no discussion of debates until nominating petitions are filed. That's more than a month away. In fact, it's so close to the scheduled start of mail-in voting that ballots might be cast before we meet in person.

Why is Lisa Scheller unwilling to debate me?

Honestly, it's the politically safe thing to do. She will try to ignore me while airing political ads until she runs out the clock on the primary.

But who really loses in that scenario? You do.

As voters, you have a right to hear directly from your candidates on where we stand on the most important issues. So I won't let Lisa Scheller hide until the votes are cast. I won't let her stalling, stonewalling, and evading deny you the right to hear directly from the candidates.

I'll just have these debates without her.

Look for an announcement this week about the time and place of our first debate, with or without Lisa Scheller. I'll also be rolling out the first of our town halls, which we will continue to hold throughout the election season so you can hear directly from me and I can hear from you too. I'm looking forward to discussing issues important to you, especially Safe Communities, Good Jobs, and Strong Families.

In the meantime, check out the rest of this campaign update to see what we've been up to as we work to KEEP AMERICA FREE.

Sincerely,

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5931601355&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b7d2c24c23&e=1090c5c412)
---
Kevin is hard at work to promote **Strong Families** , **Good Jobs** , and **Safe Communities**. Here's what happened since our last update.
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **Engaging Our Young People**

I often write about how hopeful I am for our country because of our young people. Last week, I got to meet with two amazing groups of students to talk about the issues affecting young people in the Lehigh Valley. First, I met with some college students from Lehigh University, who quizzed me about everything from economic policy to Ukraine. Then I met with a group of high school students from Emmaus and Northwestern Lehigh, who discussed mandates and the divisiveness that plagues our country today. The highlight was distributing voter registration forms to 17-year old students who will vote in their first elections this May. They will be Republicans, of course! [Learn more](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c6c82b73b7&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=10938895ea&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **Small Business Owners Just Want to Do Business**
Just about every day, I speak with somebody who owns a small business. I've talked with owners of pizza shops, fine dining restaurants, building contractors, bakeries, retail stores, dry cleaners, farmers, security firms, information technology companies, and many many more. Its amazing how much they all have in common. They're all concerned about inflation. They're all tired of mandates. And they're all impacted by high taxes and excessive regulations. But more than anything else, local business owners just want to be left alone to do their jobs and serve their customers. In other words, small business owners just want to do business. [Learn more](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=05b3d99798&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ff7901fa96&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **Olympics Highlight Chinese Communist Party Atrocities**

I'm running a campaign website blog series on the top ten reasons why China is not just another normal business partner. So far, the first six are: genocide, forced abortions, slavery, aggression against Taiwan, persecution of Hong Kong, and cybersecurity attacks as the first six. This isn't light reading. And I know people in the Lehigh Valley generally don't wake up in the morning and think about China. But the Chinese Communist Party is the biggest foreign threat we face, and our country cannot keep investing in a regime that plots against us. Its time we take a tough stance on China. [**Read more**](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4b944d0642&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
|
---
| | **Kevin Dellicker in the Community**

Here's where I've been since our last campaign update:

Believers in Business Breakfast Meetings, Bethlehem and Easton
National Federation of Independent Business Policy Discussion, Zoom
Pennsylvania Builders Association Policy Discussion, Zoom
Energy Policy Discussion, Harrisburg
National Security Discussion, Bethlehem
Lehigh University College Republicans, Bethlehem
Bethlehem Fraternal Order of Police Star Lodge #20, Bethlehem
Republican National Committee Hispanic Community Center, Allentown
District 11 Wrestling Matches, New Tripoli and East Stroudsburg
Meet and Greet, Retriever Brewery, Orefield
Youth Pizza Roundtable, Italiano Delite, Macungie

**Upcoming Events**

**Monday, 02/14: Fraternal Order of Police Lodge 40**
Membership Meeting

**Tuesday, 02/15: Meet and Greet**
Bethlehem, PA

**Wednesday, 02/16: Tour of Lincoln Tech**
Allentown, PA

**Thursday, 02/17: Berks County Patriots @ Hamburg Field House**
Pine Street, Hamburg PA 19526 | Doors open 5 PM, Meeting 6:30 PM - 8:30 PM

**Saturday, 02/19: Northampton County Lincoln Day Breakfast @ Blue Event Center**
4431 Easton Avenue, Bethlehem 18020 | 9:00 AM

**Saturday, 02/26: Lehigh County Lincoln Day Breakfast @ Hyatt Place**
621 Grange Road, Allentown PA 18106 | 7:30 AM

**Wednesday, 03/02: Meet & Greet/Petition Signing @ Dolce Mamma Grille**
4505 Bath Pike, Bethlehem PA 18017 | 1 PM – 2:30 PM

**Wednesday, 03/02: Meet & Greet/Petition Signing @ Villa Lentini Ristorante**
2700 Balliet Street, Coplay PA 18037 | 6 PM – 8 PM

Email kevin@dellickerforcongress.com with questions or visit our Facebook page.

subject: Do you miss President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
I want to hear from you

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=94475b80471148cd9af910566d6cc412&_e=B2Md8OnpPOwOODvNcckduvrufOR73IAKJJkIWOskQ1SxcfdYtkW2oN3hFzjGhJhxxMOC9zneY8T2Rx2sxVzIJbmeAog-p7jH7D1V8hQ6PWzlJfrahdEqVm4gCicojBcMAlyDafGPWW9DlsOrbEeVqeQa_00zWb6ysuxSBXn8kEp4iOin0RXYK1RwqN_uwhQ54GIWS5tbFQwlPuTUBUuhXo8ceifjstvCA8WvlJMj6g5e_Kjdw0Z1K9qvWqcMEWABHZcl0PXZCnkQLZal2IzFNa4PFtTAivt2OPw3ei3mF8Y-LuhquoPRvR7UqC4m1gc4bY_sF6PYLh33HM9G8t4tnhlBXri1kAT5fWz9rxQZqkIggRzXoa90r5KvEF8EyV4SDguwMemgj9S5uErgqQAwdwltor1lz24zqw1KuH7YPDoJ2vuBdjsqPp46d-Z7LIE45_o0BCcGd21sOfet9bOJXXm_yMm18QPw9ukZrCW5SsromGneCH1n1LjViRoiHHvnnJ5eMwKtZSNSeq5XDmC5IHvqJGOLmiGdIVGt8SIfV_8%3D)
---
Friend,

I’m not the first to say it, and I probably won’t be the last - I’m tired of President “Hidin’” Biden.
**[Biden thinks he can visit VA-07 and distract Virginians from the FAILED POLICIES he’s hatching with Abigail Spanberger in Washington.](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=94475b80471148cd9af910566d6cc412&_e=B2Md8OnpPOwOODvNcckduvrufOR73IAKJJkIWOskQ1SxcfdYtkW2oN3hFzjGhJhxxMOC9zneY8T2Rx2sxVzIJbmeAog-p7jH7D1V8hQ6PWzlJfrahdEqVm4gCicojBcMAlyDafGPWW9DlsOrbEeVqeQa_00zWb6ysuxSBXn8kEp4iOin0RXYK1RwqN_uwhQ54GIWS5tbFQwlPuTUBUuhXo8ceifjstvCA8WvlJMj6g5e_Kjdw0Z1K9qvWqcMEWABHZcl0PXZCnkQLZal2IzFNa4PFtTAivt2OPw3ei3mF8Y-LuhquoPRvR7UqC4m1gc4YzVZhPrMOxqsR370mayzUJJhgaiQa9AQxyL4BIjp9bL0xVE1LEvZpAN32L8TVhoE6D4q0Q_aoua4Qk4e5QgjnN1y0J2WsUJd3Pft4h8xfjHD8ggUboR9uOwe71rynjymvAXg1eTgf-q7PMRAbWAatOMUs6VDzIjGbMj1dPMSa6T6eOO0UG7RCRde8L6j94qPZCIqDWV0rXlXHpc2eEnLJ8GrqUtLEYbGXWYRRiVqZPE%3D)**

I’m tired of a “President” who ****talks about his favorite ice cream more than he talks to the American people.****

I’m tired of a “President” who ****does nothing about skyrocketing prices and widespread inflation, even as everyday Americans like you and me are suffering.****

I’m tired of a “President” who is ****not respected on the world stage and constantly embarrasses our great nation.****

**And I’m tired of Abigail Spanberger passively putting up with him and NOT FIGHTING BACK.**

**[I miss President Trump and his America First policies.
